```{r ANA Score information}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
ANA_results <- read_xlsx("/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofPittsburgh/PhD_Boxdrive/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/COVID ANA ELISAs/Combined_ANA_Results.xlsx")
ANA_long <- ANA_results %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "Group",
    values_to = "ANA_value"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ANA_value)) %>%
  mutate(
    ANA_status = if_else(ANA_value > 20, "Positive", "Negative")
  )

ANA_long <- ANA_long %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = str_replace_all(Group, "\u00A0", " "),  # fix NBSP
    Group = str_trim(Group)                          # trim
  )
kw_result <- wilcox.test(ANA_value ~ Group, data = plot_df)
kw_result
wilcox.test(
  ANA_value ~ Group,
  data = ANA_long %>% filter(Group %in% c("Healthy Donors", "COVID"))
)
wilcox.test(
  plot_df$ANA_value,
  plot_df$Group,
  p.adjust.method = "BH"
)
ANA_long <- ANA_long %>%
  mutate(ANA_Positive = ANA_value >= 20)

fisher.test(table(ANA_long$Group, ANA_long$ANA_Positive))
wilcox.test(
  ANA_value ~ Group,
  data = ANA_long %>% filter(Group %in% c("Healthy Donors", "COVID")),
  exact = FALSE
)
ANA_HD_COVID <- ANA_long %>%
  filter(Group %in% c("Healthy Donors", "COVID")) %>%
  mutate(ANA_Positive = ANA_value >= 20)

fisher.test(
  table(ANA_HD_COVID$Group, ANA_HD_COVID$ANA_Positive)
)


library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggbeeswarm)

plot_df <- ANA_long %>%
  filter(Group %in% c("Healthy Donors", "COVID")) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Healthy Donors", "COVID")))

# --- background band data (DISCRETE SAFE) ---
bands_df <- data.frame(
  xmin = 0.5,
  xmax = 2.5,
  ymin = c(-Inf, 20, 60),
  ymax = c(20, 60, Inf),
  fill = c("grey95", "#FFF2D9", "#FDE4C8")
)

# --- label positions ---
labels_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1.5,
  y = c(10, 40, max(plot_df$ANA_value, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.9),
  label = c("ANA negative", "Moderate ANA positive", "Strong ANA positive")
)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Group, y = ANA_value)) +
  
  # --- Background bands ---
  geom_rect(
    data = bands_df,
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
    fill = bands_df$fill,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # --- Region labels (CENTERED, Arial) ---
  geom_text(
    data = labels_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    family = "Arial",
    size = 3.4,
    color = "grey40",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  # --- Beeswarm points ---
  geom_quasirandom(
    aes(fill = Group),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.35,
    size = 2.1,
    width = 0.25,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  
  # --- Cutoff lines ---
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(20, 60),
             linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.5) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Healthy Donors" = "grey65",
      "COVID" = "firebrick"
    )
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    y = "ANA titer",
    x = NULL
  )
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggbeeswarm)

# Make x numeric for the whole plot
plot_df <- ANA_long %>%
  filter(Group %in% c("Healthy Donors", "COVID", "Non-COVID")) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Healthy Donors", "COVID", "Non-COVID")),
    x = as.numeric(Group)
  )

x_mid2 <- mean(range(plot_df2$x))

ANAtiters_beeswarm <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = x, y = ANA_value)) +
  
  # --- Background bands ---
  geom_rect(xmin = min(plot_df$x) - 0.5, xmax = max(plot_df$x) + 0.5,
            ymin = -Inf, ymax = 20, fill = "grey95") +
  geom_rect(xmin = min(plot_df$x) - 0.5, xmax = max(plot_df$x) + 0.5,
            ymin = 20, ymax = 60, fill = "#FFF2D9") +
  geom_rect(xmin = min(plot_df$x) - 0.5, xmax = max(plot_df$x) + 0.5,
            ymin = 60, ymax = Inf, fill = "#FDE4C8") +
  
  # --- Region labels (NOW Arial + bold) ---
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(
      x = x_mid2,
      y = c(10, 40, max(plot_df$ANA_value, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.90),
      label = c("ANA negative", "Moderate ANA positive", "Strong ANA positive")
    ),
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.4,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  # --- Beeswarm points ---
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = Group),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.35,
    size = 2.1,
    alpha = 0.9,
    position = position_quasirandom(width = 0.25)
  ) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(20, 60),
             linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(plot_df$x)),
    labels = levels(plot_df$Group),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05))
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Healthy Donors" = "grey65",
      "COVID" = "firebrick"
    )
  ) +
  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    plot.background  = element_blank(),
    panel.border     = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(y = "ANA titer", x = NULL)
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Polyreactive Images/ANAtiters_beeswarm_noncovidtoo.png", ANAtiters_beeswarm,
  width = 6,      # inches
  height = 4,     # inches
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

patient_df <- read_csv("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/COVID pt and HD Spread Sheets/COVID Patients with Clinical Data and Severity score.csv")
patient_df <- patient_df %>%
  mutate(sample_id = paste0("COVID", str_extract(Patient.ID, "\\d{2}$"))) %>%
  rename(PEA_Value = PEA)

ANA_Ids <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/COVID ANA ELISAs/ANA_IDs_Group.xlsx")

merged_df <- ANA_Ids %>%
  left_join(patient_df, by = "sample_id")
head(merged_df)
library(dplyr)

ANA_severity_df <- merged_df %>%   # <-- replace with your object name
  filter(Group == "COVID-19") %>%
  mutate(
    Severity_Group = case_when(
      Severity.Score %in% c(5, 6)  ~ "Low",
      Severity.Score %in% c(7, 8)  ~ "Moderate",
      Severity.Score %in% c(9, 10) ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Severity_Group)) %>%
  mutate(
    Severity_Group = factor(
      Severity_Group,
      levels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High")
    )
  )
ANA_severity_df %>%
  group_by(Severity_Group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_ANA = median(`ANA Score`, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_low = quantile(`ANA Score`, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_high = quantile(`ANA Score`, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
library(ggplot2)
library(ggbeeswarm)

ggplot(ANA_severity_df, aes(x = Severity_Group, y = `ANA Score`)) +
  geom_quasirandom(
    shape = 21,
    fill = "firebrick",
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.35,
    size = 2.2,
    width = 0.25,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "COVID-19 severity",
    y = "ANA score"
  )

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(readxl)


# Clinical data: COVID patients ONLY

patient_df_covid <- read_csv(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/COVID pt and HD Spread Sheets/COVID Patients with Clinical Data and Severity score.csv"
) %>%
  filter(str_detect(Patient.ID, "^COVID")) %>%   # <<< ignore non-COVID
  mutate(
    patient_num = str_extract(Patient.ID, "\\d+"),
    patient_num = as.integer(patient_num),
    sample_id = paste0("COVID", patient_num)
  ) %>%
  rename(PEA_Value = PEA)


# ANA IDs: COVID ONLY

ANA_Ids_covid <- read_xlsx(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/COVID ANA ELISAs/ANA_IDs_Group.xlsx"
) %>%
  filter(str_detect(sample_id, "^COVID")) %>%    # <<< ignore non-COVID
  mutate(
    patient_num = str_extract(sample_id, "\\d+"),
    patient_num = as.integer(patient_num),
    sample_id = paste0("COVID", patient_num)
  )


# Merge (COVID-safe)

merged_df <- ANA_Ids_covid %>%
  left_join(patient_df_covid, by = "sample_id")

ANA_patient <- merged_df %>%
  group_by(sample_id) %>%
  summarise(
    ANA_Score = max(`ANA Score`, na.rm = TRUE),   # or median
    Severity_Score = max(Severity.Score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Severity_Group = case_when(
      Severity_Score %in% c(5, 6)  ~ "Low",
      Severity_Score %in% c(7, 8)  ~ "Moderate",
      Severity_Score %in% c(9, 10) ~ "High"
    ),
    Severity_Group = factor(Severity_Group, levels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High"))
  )
kruskal.test(ANA_Score ~ Severity_Group, data = ANA_patient)

ANA_covid_patient <- merged_df %>%
  group_by(sample_id) %>%
  summarise(
    ANA_Score = max(`ANA Score`, na.rm = TRUE),
    Severity_Score = max(Severity.Score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Analysis_Group = case_when(
      Severity_Score %in% c(5, 6)  ~ "COVID Low",
      Severity_Score %in% c(7, 8)  ~ "COVID Moderate",
      Severity_Score %in% c(9, 10) ~ "COVID High"
    )
  )
ANA_HD <- ANA_long %>%    # or whatever object holds HD ANA
  filter(Group == "Healthy Donors") %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = sample_id,
    ANA_Score = ANA_value,
    Analysis_Group = "Healthy Donors"
  )
ANA_HD <- ANA_long %>%
  filter(Group == "Healthy Donors") %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = paste0("HD_", row_number()),  # unique dummy ID
    ANA_Score = ANA_value,
    Analysis_Group = "Healthy Donors"
  )
ANA_combined <- bind_rows(
  ANA_HD,
  ANA_covid_patient
) %>%
  mutate(
    Analysis_Group = factor(
      Analysis_Group,
      levels = c(
        "Healthy Donors",
        "COVID Low",
        "COVID Moderate",
        "COVID High"
      )
    )
  )
ANA_combined <- ANA_combined %>%
  mutate(ANA_Positive = ANA_Score >= 20)

fisher.test(table(ANA_combined$Analysis_Group, ANA_combined$ANA_Positive))

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)


# 1. Binary numeric outcome

ANA_combined <- ANA_combined %>%
  mutate(
    ANA_Positive_num = as.numeric(ANA_Positive)
  )


# 2. Correct group order

ANA_combined <- ANA_combined %>%
  mutate(
    Analysis_Group = factor(
      Analysis_Group,
      levels = c(
        "Healthy Donors",
        "COVID Low",
        "COVID Moderate",
        "COVID High"
      )
    )
  )


# 3. Proportions + exact binomial CI

prop_df <- ANA_combined %>%
  group_by(Analysis_Group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    pos = sum(ANA_Positive_num),
    prop = pos / n,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci = list(binom.test(pos, n)$conf.int),
    lower = ci[[1]],
    upper = ci[[2]]
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    CI_color = ifelse(
      Analysis_Group == "Healthy Donors",
      "Healthy Donors",
      "COVID"
    ),
    Point_color = ifelse(
      Analysis_Group == "Healthy Donors",
      "Healthy Donors",
      "COVID"
    )
  )


# 4. Plot

Split_Severity_ANA <- ggplot(ANA_combined, aes(x = Analysis_Group, y = ANA_Positive_num)) +
  
  # --- individual subjects ---
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    height = 0.05,
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.8,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  # --- group proportion points ---
  geom_point(
    data = prop_df,
    aes(x = Analysis_Group, y = prop, color = Point_color),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  # --- exact binomial CI ---
  geom_errorbar(
    data = prop_df,
    aes(
      x = Analysis_Group,
      ymin = lower,
      ymax = upper,
      color = CI_color
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.15,
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  
  # --- color mapping ---
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Healthy Donors" = "navy",
      "COVID" = "firebrick"
    )
  ) +
  
  # --- y-axis ---
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("Negative", "Positive"),
    limits = c(-0.1, 1.1)
  ) +
  
  # --- theme ---
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "ANA status"
  )
n_groups <- length(levels(ANA_combined$Analysis_Group))

Split_Severity_ANA <- Split_Severity_ANA +
  
  # --- global comparison line (full width) ---
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 1,
    xend = n_groups,
    y = 1.18,
    yend = 1.18,
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  
  # --- centered p-value ---
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = (1 + n_groups) / 2,
    y = 1.24,
    label = "p = 0.1271",
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("Negative", "Positive"),
    limits = c(-0.1, 1.35),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  )


ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Polyreactive Images/Split_Severity_ANA.png", Split_Severity_ANA,
       width = 6,      # inches
       height = 3,     # inches
       units = "in",
       dpi = 600,
       bg = "white"
)
donut_df <- ANA_combined %>%
  group_by(Analysis_Group, ANA_Positive) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    ANA_Status = if_else(ANA_Positive, "ANA+", "ANA−")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Analysis_Group) %>%
  mutate(
    frac    = n / sum(n),
    ymax    = cumsum(frac),
    ymin    = lag(ymax, default = 0),
    n_total = sum(n),
    inner   = 0.6,
    outer   = 1.0
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

severity_donut <- ggplot(donut_df) +
  geom_rect(
    aes(xmin = inner, xmax = outer, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = ANA_Status),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  xlim(0.5, 1.05) +
  facet_wrap(~ Analysis_Group, nrow = 1) +
  geom_text(
    data = donut_df %>% distinct(Analysis_Group, n_total),
    aes(x = 0.75, y = 0.5, label = paste0("n = ", n_total)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("ANA+" = "firebrick", "ANA−" = "grey70"),
    name = "ANA Status"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    strip.text      = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 10,
                                   margin = margin(b = 8)),
    legend.title    = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.text     = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.spacing   = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin     = margin(40, 40, 40, 40)
  )
severity_donut <- severity_donut +
  labs(subtitle = "p = 0.1271") +
  theme(
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      family = "Arial",
      face = "bold",
      size = 11,
      hjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(b = 8)
    )
  )
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Severity_Donut_ANA.png",
  severity_donut,
  width = 8, height = 3, units = "in", dpi = 600, bg = "white"
)
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Severity_Donut_ANA.svg",
  severity_donut,
  width = 8, height = 3, units = "in", dpi = 600, bg = "white"
)
# Patient-level CRP + ANA
ANA_patient_crp <- merged_df %>%
  group_by(sample_id) %>%
  summarise(
    ANA_Score = max(`ANA Score`, na.rm = TRUE),
    CRP = max(CRP, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CRP))
summary(ANA_patient_crp$CRP)
quantile(ANA_patient_crp$CRP, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9))
ggplot(ANA_patient_crp, aes(x = CRP)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "grey70", color = "black") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "CRP", y = "Count")
ANA_patient_crp_cut <- ANA_patient_crp %>%
  mutate(
    CRP_Group = factor(
      if_else(CRP > 10, "High CRP", "Low CRP"),
      levels = c("Low CRP", "High CRP")
    ),
    ANA_Positive = ANA_Score >= 20
  )
fisher.test(
  table(ANA_patient_crp_cut$CRP_Group,
        ANA_patient_crp_cut$ANA_Positive)
)
wilcox.test(
  ANA_Score ~ CRP_Group,
  data = ANA_patient_crp_cut,
  exact = FALSE
)
Split_CRP_ANA_sig <- ggplot(
  ANA_patient_crp_cut,
  aes(x = Analysis_Group, y = ANA_Positive_num)
) +
  
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    height = 0.05,
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.8,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    data = ANA_patient_crp_cut,
    aes(y = prop, color = Point_color),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  geom_errorbar(
    data = ANA_patient_crp_cut,
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, color = CI_color),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.15,
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 1.5,
    y = 1.08,
    label = "*",
    size = 7,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Healthy Donors" = "#D2B48C",   # tan
      "COVID" = "firebrick"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("Negative", "Positive"),
    limits = c(-0.1, 1.1)
  ) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  
  labs(x = NULL, y = "ANA status")
ANA_HD_patient <- ANA_long %>%
  filter(Group == "Healthy Donors") %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = paste0("HD_", row_number()),
    ANA_Score = ANA_value,
    CRP_Group = "Healthy Donors"
  )
ANA_patient_crp <- ANA_patient_crp %>%
  mutate(
    CRP_Group = case_when(
      CRP < 10  ~ "COVID Low CRP",
      CRP >= 10 ~ "COVID High CRP"
    )
  )

ANA_CRP_combined <- bind_rows(
  ANA_HD_patient,
  ANA_patient_crp %>%
    transmute(
      sample_id,
      ANA_Score,
      CRP_Group
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    CRP_Group = factor(
      CRP_Group,
      levels = c(
        "Healthy Donors",
        "COVID Low CRP",
        "COVID High CRP"
      )
    ),
    ANA_Positive = ANA_Score >= 20
  )
fisher.test(
  table(ANA_CRP_combined$CRP_Group, ANA_CRP_combined$ANA_Positive)
)
make_prop_df <- function(df, group_var) {
  df %>%
    group_by(.data[[group_var]]) %>%
    summarise(
      n_pos = sum(ANA_Positive),
      n = n(),
      prop = n_pos / n,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      ci = list(binom.test(n_pos, n)$conf.int),
      lower = ci[[1]],
      upper = ci[[2]],
      Point_color = if_else(
        .data[[group_var]] == "Healthy Donors",
        "Healthy",
        "COVID"
      ),
      CI_color = Point_color
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-ci)
}
ANA_patient_crp_cut <- ANA_patient_crp_cut %>%
  mutate(
    ANA_Positive_num = as.numeric(ANA_Positive)
  )

prop_df_covid <- make_prop_df(
  ANA_patient_crp_cut,
  "CRP_Group"
)

Split_CRP_ANA_sig <- ggplot(
  ANA_patient_crp_cut,
  aes(x = CRP_Group, y = ANA_Positive_num)
) +
  
  # --- individual subjects ---
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    height = 0.05,
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.8,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  # --- group proportion ---
  geom_point(
    data = prop_df_covid,
    aes(x = CRP_Group, y = prop, color = Point_color),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4
  ) +
  
  # --- exact binomial CI ---
  geom_errorbar(
    data = prop_df_covid,
    aes(x = CRP_Group, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, color = CI_color),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.15,
    linewidth = 0.7
  )  +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "COVID" = "firebrick"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("Negative", "Positive"),
    limits = c(-0.1, 1.35),   # <<< creates space above Positive
    expand = c(0, 0)
  )+
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  
  labs(x = NULL, y = "ANA status")

prop_df_all <- make_prop_df(
  ANA_CRP_combined,
  "CRP_Group"
)

library(dplyr)

# Fisher test (Low vs High CRP only, COVID patients)

fisher_crp <- fisher.test(
  table(
    ANA_patient_crp_cut$CRP_Group,
    ANA_patient_crp_cut$ANA_Positive
  )
)

p_label <- ifelse(fisher_crp$p.value < 0.05, "*",
                  paste0("p = ", signif(fisher_crp$p.value, 2)))

# Donut data (Low vs High CRP)
donut_df <- ANA_patient_crp_cut %>%
  group_by(CRP_Group, ANA_Positive) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    ANA_Status = if_else(ANA_Positive, "ANA+", "ANA−")
  ) %>%
  group_by(CRP_Group) %>%
  mutate(
    frac = n / sum(n),
    ymax = cumsum(frac),
    ymin = lag(ymax, default = 0),
    n_total = sum(n)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
donut_df <- donut_df %>%
  mutate(
    inner = 0.6,
    outer = 1.0
  )

CRP_donut_base <- ggplot(donut_df) +
  
  geom_rect(
    aes(
      xmin = inner,
      xmax = outer,
      ymin = ymin,
      ymax = ymax,
      fill = ANA_Status
    ),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  xlim(0.5, 1.05) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ CRP_Group, nrow = 1) +
  
  geom_text(
    data = donut_df %>% distinct(CRP_Group, n_total),
    aes(x = 0.75, y = 0.5, label = paste0("n = ", n_total)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 5
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "ANA+" = "firebrick",
      "ANA−" = "grey"
    ),
    name = "ANA Status"
  ) +
  
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 13),
    legend.text  = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(40, 40, 90, 40)
  )
CRP_donut_final <- CRP_donut_base +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(
      family = "Arial",
      face = "bold",
      size = 16,
      margin = margin(b = 8)   # <<< THIS fixes the clipped "g"
    ),
    plot.margin = margin(40, 40, 40, 40)  # slight breathing room
  )

safe_max <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}
ANA_patient_clean <- merged_df %>%
  group_by(sample_id) %>%
  summarise(
    ANA_Score = safe_max(`ANA Score`),
    ANA_Positive = ANA_Score >= 20,
    
    CRP = safe_max(CRP),
    Ferritin = safe_max(Ferritin),
    D_dimer = safe_max(D.dimer),
    LDH = safe_max(LDH),
    Fibrinogen = safe_max(Fibrinogen),
    WBC = safe_max(WBC),
    ALC = safe_max(ALC),
    ANC = safe_max(ANC),
    Platelets = safe_max(Platelet.count),
    P_F_ratio = safe_max(P.F.ratio),
    FiO2 = safe_max(FiO2),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ANA_Score))
sapply(ANA_patient_clean, function(x) any(is.infinite(x)))


library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

clinical_vars <- c(
  "CRP", "Ferritin", "D_dimer", "LDH", "Fibrinogen",
  "WBC", "ANC", "ALC", "Platelets", "P_F_ratio", "FiO2"
)

screen_cutoffs <- map_df(clinical_vars, function(v) {
  
  df <- ANA_patient_clean %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[v]]))
  
  # use 75th percentile cutoff
  cutoff <- quantile(df[[v]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      High = .data[[v]] >= cutoff
    )
  
  tab <- table(df$High, df$ANA_Positive)
  
  ft <- fisher.test(tab)
  
  tibble(
    Variable = v,
    Cutoff = round(cutoff, 2),
    OR = unname(ft$estimate),
    p_value = ft$p.value
  )
}) %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_value)


library(ggplot2)

Odd_ratio <- screen_cutoffs %>%
  mutate(Variable = reorder(Variable, OR)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Variable, y = OR)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    y = "Odds ratio (log scale)",
    x = NULL
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Polyreactive Images/Odd_ratio_ANA.png", Odd_ratio,
       width = 4,      # inches
       height = 3,     # inches
       units = "in",
       dpi = 600,
       bg = "white"
)
cor.test(
  ANA_patient_clean$CRP,
  ANA_patient_clean$ANA_Score,
  method = "spearman"
)

library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(broom)

logit_results_scaled <- map_df(clinical_vars, function(v) {
  
  df <- ANA_patient_clean %>%
    select(ANA_Positive, all_of(v)) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[v]]),
      is.finite(.data[[v]])
    ) %>%
    mutate(value_scaled = as.numeric(scale(.data[[v]])))
  
  if (n_distinct(df$value_scaled) < 2) return(NULL)
  
  fit <- glm(
    ANA_Positive ~ value_scaled,
    data = df,
    family = binomial()
  )
  
  broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
    filter(term == "value_scaled") %>%
    transmute(
      Variable = v,
      OR_per_SD = estimate,
      CI_low = conf.low,
      CI_high = conf.high,
      p_value = p.value,
      n = nrow(df)
    )
}) %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_value)

logit_results_scaled

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(grid)

plot_df <- logit_results_scaled %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = factor(Variable, levels = rev(Variable)),
    label = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", OR_per_SD, CI_low, CI_high)
  )

x_min <- min(plot_df$CI_low, na.rm = TRUE)
x_max <- max(plot_df$CI_high, na.rm = TRUE)
x_text <- x_max * 1.35

Oddsratio_regression <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = OR_per_SD, y = Variable)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = CI_low, xmax = CI_high),
    height = 0.2,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_text,
    y = length(levels(plot_df$Variable)) + 0.7,
    label = "OR (95% CI)",
    hjust = 0,
    vjust = 0,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(x = x_text, label = label),
    hjust = 0,
    family = "Arial",
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 0.65,
    xend = 0.12,
    y = 0.35,
    yend = 0.35,
    colour = "#1f5fbf",
    linewidth = 0.7,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"), type = "closed")
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 0.2,
    y = -0.02,
    label = "Lower odds of ANA positivity",
    hjust = 0,
    colour = "#1f5fbf",
    family = "Arial",
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 1.35,
    xend = 4.2,
    y = 0.35,
    yend = 0.35,
    colour = "red3",
    linewidth = 0.7,
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"), type = "closed")
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 3.8,
    y = -0.02,
    label = "Higher odds of ANA positivity",
    hjust = 1,
    colour = "red3",
    family = "Arial",
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  scale_x_log10(
    breaks = c(0.1, 0.3, 1, 3, 10),
    labels = c("0.1", "0.3", "1.0", "3.0", "10")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0.08, x_max * 1.9),
    ylim = c(-0.3, length(levels(plot_df$Variable)) + 0.9),
    clip = "off"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    x = "ANA odds ratio per SD increase of each parameter",
    y = "Clinical parameter"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 12, r = 130, b = 45, l = 12)
  )
library(ggplot2)

       width = 16,      # inches

       bg = "white"

# Pearson correlation analysis + publication-ready plots
# Uses ANA_patient_clean (one row per patient)


library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(patchwork)

ANA_patient_clean <- merged_df %>%
  group_by(sample_id) %>%
  summarise(
    ANA_Score = max(`ANA Score`, na.rm = TRUE),
    ANA_Positive = ANA_Score >= 20,
    
    CRP = max(CRP, na.rm = TRUE),
    Ferritin = max(Ferritin, na.rm = TRUE),
    D_dimer = max(D.dimer, na.rm = TRUE),
    LDH = max(LDH, na.rm = TRUE),
    Fibrinogen = max(Fibrinogen, na.rm = TRUE),
    WBC = max(WBC, na.rm = TRUE),
    ALC = max(ALC, na.rm = TRUE),
    ANC = max(ANC, na.rm = TRUE),
    Platelets = max(Platelet.count, na.rm = TRUE),
    P_F_ratio = max(P.F.ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    FiO2 = max(FiO2, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    length_of_stay = max(length.of.stay, na.rm = TRUE),
    Severity_Score = max(Severity.Score, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(ANA_Score),
    is.finite(length_of_stay),
    is.finite(Severity_Score)
  )
clinical_vars <- c(
  "CRP", "Ferritin", "D_dimer", "LDH", "Fibrinogen",
  "WBC", "ALC", "ANC", "Platelets",
  "P_F_ratio", "FiO2",
  "length_of_stay", "Severity_Score"
)

pearson_results <- map_df(
  clinical_vars,
  function(v) {
    df_sub <- ANA_patient_clean %>%
      select(ANA_Score, all_of(v)) %>%
      drop_na()
    
    test <- cor.test(
      df_sub[[v]],
      df_sub$ANA_Score,
      method = "pearson"
    )
    
    tibble(
      Variable = v,
      r = unname(test$estimate),
      p_value = test$p.value,
      n = nrow(df_sub)
    )
  }
) %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_value)

pearson_results



# 3. Variables to plot
#    (recommend p < 0.1 OR biologically relevant)

vars_to_plot <- pearson_results %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.1) %>%
  pull(Variable)

vars_to_plot
var_labels <- c(
  CRP = "C-reactive protein",
  Ferritin = "Ferritin",
  D_dimer = "D-dimer",
  LDH = "LDH",
  Fibrinogen = "Fibrinogen",
  WBC = "White blood cells",
  ALC = "Absolute lymphocyte count",
  ANC = "Absolute neutrophil count",
  Platelets = "Platelet count",
  P_F_ratio = "PaO2 / FiO2 ratio",
  FiO2 = "FiO2",
  length_of_stay = "Length of stay",
  Severity_Score = "Severity score"
)


# 4. Plotting function (unchanged style)
plot_corr <- function(var) {
  
  stats <- pearson_results %>% filter(Variable == var)
  
  ggplot(
    ANA_patient_clean,
    aes(x = .data[[var]], y = ANA_Score)
  ) +
    geom_point(
      color = "grey30",
      size = 2.2,
      alpha = 0.85
    ) +
    geom_smooth(
      method = "lm",
      se = TRUE,
      linewidth = 0.9,
      color = "firebrick",
      fill = "#F2B6A0",
      alpha = 0.4
    ) +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = -Inf,
      y = Inf,
      hjust = -0.1,
      vjust = 1.3,
      label = paste0(
        "r = ", round(stats$r, 2),
        "\np = ", signif(stats$p_value, 2),
        "\nn = ", stats$n
      ),
      family = "Arial",
      fontface = "bold",
      size = 4
    ) +
    labs(
      x = var_labels[[var]],
      y = "ANA score"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
}

corr_plots <- lapply(vars_to_plot, plot_corr)

combined_corr_plot <- wrap_plots(corr_plots, ncol = 2)

combined_corr_plot


# 6. Save

ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ANA_Pearson_Clinical_Correlations_Extended.png",
  combined_corr_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 6.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ANA_Pearson_Clinical_Correlations_Extended.svg",
  combined_corr_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 6.5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggbeeswarm)

# --- Healthy donor ANA values ---
HD_df <- ANA_long %>%
  filter(Group == "Healthy Donors") %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = paste0("HD_", row_number()),
    ANA_value,
    Group = "Healthy Donors"
  )

# --- COVID ANA values (from merged_df so only valid patients are included) ---
COVID_df <- merged_df %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id,
    ANA_value = `ANA Score`,
    Group = "COVID"
  )

# --- Combine ---
plot_df <- bind_rows(HD_df, COVID_df) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Healthy Donors", "COVID")),
    x = as.numeric(Group)
  )

x_mid <- mean(unique(plot_df$x))

library(ggplot2)
library(ggbeeswarm)

ANAtiters_beeswarm2 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = x, y = ANA_value)) +
  
  # --- Background bands ---
  geom_rect(
    xmin = min(plot_df$x) - 0.5, xmax = max(plot_df$x) + 0.5,
    ymin = -Inf, ymax = 20, fill = "grey95"
  ) +
  geom_rect(
    xmin = min(plot_df$x) - 0.5, xmax = max(plot_df$x) + 0.5,
    ymin = 20, ymax = 60, fill = "#FFF2D9"
  ) +
  geom_rect(
    xmin = min(plot_df$x) - 0.5, xmax = max(plot_df$x) + 0.5,
    ymin = 60, ymax = Inf, fill = "#FDE4C8"
  ) +
  
  # --- Region labels ---
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(
      x = x_mid,
      y = c(10, 40, max(plot_df$ANA_value, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.9),
      label = c(
        "ANA negative",
        "Moderate ANA positive",
        "Strong ANA positive"
      )
    ),
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.4,
    color = "grey40"
  ) +
  
  # --- Beeswarm points ---
  geom_quasirandom(
    aes(fill = Group),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.35,
    size = 2.1,
    alpha = 0.9,
    width = 0.25
  ) +
  
  # --- Cutoff lines ---
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = c(20, 60),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  
  # --- X axis ---
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(levels(plot_df$Group)),
    labels = levels(plot_df$Group),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05))
  ) +
  
  # --- Colors ---
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Healthy Donors" = "grey65",
      "COVID" = "firebrick"
    )
  ) +
  
  # --- Theme ---
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    plot.background  = element_blank(),
    panel.border     = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  
  labs(
    y = "ANA Score",
    x = NULL
  )

ANAtiters_beeswarm2
plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    ANA_Positive = ANA_value >= 20
  )
```

```{r ANA IF analysis}
hep2_df <- read_xlsx(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/HEp-2 IF/HEp-2 Results.xlsx"
)

hep2_df <- hep2_df %>%
  mutate(
    Negative = if_else(
      if_all(c(Intercellular, Cytoplasm, Nuclear), ~ is.na(.x) | .x != "Yes"),
      "Yes",
      NA_character_
    )
  )
hep2_long <- hep2_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Sample,
    names_to = "Pattern",
    values_to = "Result"
  ) %>%
  filter(Result == "Yes") %>%
  mutate(Group = if_else(str_starts(Sample, "HD"), "HD", "COVID"))

group_totals <- hep2_long %>%
  distinct(Sample, Group) %>%
  dplyr::count(Group) %>%
  rename(Total = n)

summary_df <- hep2_long %>%
  dplyr::count(Group, Pattern) %>%
  left_join(group_totals, by = "Group") %>%
  mutate(Percent = 100 * n / Total)
# ---- Explicit ordering: Negative last ----
pattern_order <- summary_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Pattern == "Negative"), Pattern) %>%
  pull(Pattern)


theme_arial_bold <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = base_size),
    axis.title = element_text(size = base_size + 1),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
    plot.title = element_text(size = base_size + 2, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    plot.background  = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
}
pattern_order <- summary_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Pattern == "Negative"), Pattern) %>%
  pull(Pattern) %>%
  unique()

summary_df <- summary_df %>%
  mutate(Pattern = factor(Pattern, levels = c(setdiff(pattern_order, "Negative"), "Negative")))
# ---- Plot ----
HEp2_ANA_Summary <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = Pattern, y = Percent)) +
  facet_wrap( ~ Group) +
  geom_col(
    fill = "grey20",
    width = 0.65
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", Percent)),
    vjust = -0.6,
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      vjust = 1,
      face = "bold"
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 15, 10, 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "% within group") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(summary_df$Percent) * 1.2),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
  )+
  theme_arial_bold()

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HEp2_ANA_Summary.png",HEp2_ANA_Summary, dpi = 600, 
       height = 3, width = 6, bg = "white")
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HEp2_ANA_Summary.svg",HEp2_ANA_Summary, dpi = 600, 
       height = 3, width = 6, bg = "white")
```

```{r ELISA analysis}


library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(pheatmap)


# 1. LOAD AND PROCESS ALL FILES

data_dir <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_DATA_new/"

files <- list.files(
  data_dir,
  pattern = "Processed.*\\.xlsx$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# AUC function
trap_auc <- function(x, y) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  y <- as.numeric(y)
  ord <- order(x)
  x <- x[ord]
  y <- y[ord]
  dx <- diff(x)
  dy <- (y[-1] + y[-length(y)]) / 2
  sum(dx * dy, na.rm = TRUE)
}

calc_auc <- function(file) {
  antigen_name <- basename(file) %>%
    str_remove("\\.xlsx$") %>%
    str_split(" Processed") %>%
    .[[1]][1]
  
  df <- read_xlsx(file)
  
  df_long <- df %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = starts_with("OD"),
      names_to = "Replicate",
      values_to = "OD"
    ) %>%
    group_by(Clone, Concentration) %>%
    summarise(mean_OD = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(Concentration > 0, is.finite(mean_OD))
  
  df_long %>%
    group_by(Clone) %>%
    arrange(Concentration, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    summarise(
      AUC = if (n() >= 2) trap_auc(log10(Concentration), mean_OD) else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Antigen = antigen_name)
}
calc_auc <- function(file) {
  
  antigen_name <- basename(file) %>%
    str_remove("\\.xlsx$") %>%
    str_remove(" Processed.*$")
  
  df <- read_xlsx(file)
  
  df_long <- df %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = starts_with("OD"),
      names_to = "Replicate",
      values_to = "OD"
    ) %>%
    group_by(Clone, Concentration) %>%
    summarise(mean_OD = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(Concentration > 0, is.finite(mean_OD))
  
  df_long %>%
    group_by(Clone) %>%
    arrange(Concentration, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    summarise(
      AUC = if (n() >= 2) trap_auc(log10(Concentration), mean_OD) else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Antigen = antigen_name)
}
all_auc <- map_dfr(files, calc_auc)


# 2. BUILD MATRIX

AUC_matrix <- all_auc %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Antigen, values_from = AUC) %>%
  column_to_rownames("Clone") %>%
  as.matrix()

Scaled_ELISA <- scale(AUC_matrix)


# 3. LOAD ROW ANNOTATION

Clone_Info <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/Monoclonal_Clone_Info.xlsx") %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% rownames(Scaled_ELISA)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("Cloning ID")

# Remove numeric column that breaks pheatmap
Clone_Info_subset <- Clone_Info %>%
  dplyr::select(Isotype, `RKH or Y5`, Cluster, `Expanded Clone`)
# Clean formatting
Clone_Info_subset[] <- lapply(Clone_Info_subset, function(x) {
  if (is.character(x)) as.factor(trimws(x)) else x
})

annotation_colors <- list(
  Cluster = c(
    "Atypical" = "#00BA38",
    "PB/PC" = "#00BFC4",
    "PB/PC Precursors" = "#F564E3"
  ),
  "RKH or Y5" = c("Yes" = "black", "No" = "white"),
  "Expanded Clone" = c("Yes" = "green3", "No" = "yellow2"),
  Isotype = c(
    "IGHG1" = "#3B4CC0",
    "IGHG2" = "#77AADD",
    "IGHG3" = "#EE8866",
    "IGHM"  = "#EEDD88"
  )
)

annotation_colors$Source <- c(
  "Virus" = "bisque",
  "Bacteria" = "black",
  "Self" = "darkred"
)

Scaled_ELISA <- as.matrix(Scaled_ELISA)
mode(Scaled_ELISA) <- "numeric"
AUC_matrix <- as.matrix(AUC_matrix)

Columns2 <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/Columns2.2.xlsx") %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(Columns2) <- Columns2$Antigen
Columns2$Antigen <- NULL

# align to matrix
Columns2 <- Columns2[colnames(Scaled_ELISA), , drop = FALSE]
Clone_Info_subset <- as.data.frame(Clone_Info_subset)

Clone_Info_subset <- Clone_Info_subset[
  rownames(Scaled_ELISA),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]
column_order <- c(
  "Omicron-his",
  "S1 NTD",
  "S1",
  "S2",
  "Spike-his",
  "Spike",
  "dsDNA"
)

Scaled_ELISA <- Scaled_ELISA[, column_order]
AUC_matrix <- AUC_matrix[, column_order]
Columns2 <- Columns2[column_order, , drop = FALSE]
num_mat <- matrix(
  sprintf("%.2f", AUC_matrix),
  nrow = nrow(AUC_matrix),
  ncol = ncol(AUC_matrix),
  dimnames = dimnames(AUC_matrix)
)
num_mat <- num_mat[
  rownames(Scaled_ELISA),
  colnames(Scaled_ELISA)
]
num_mat <- num_mat[, column_order]
max_auc <- max(AUC_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)
mid_auc <- max_auc / 2
colnames(Columns2) <- "Antigen Source"

annotation_colors[["Antigen Source"]] <- c(
  "Virus" = "bisque",
  "Bacteria" = "black",
  "Self" = "darkred"
)

annotation_colors[["Source"]] <- NULL
pheatmap(
  AUC_matrix,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  gaps_col = c(ncol(AUC_matrix) - 1),
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  annotation_row = Clone_Info_subset,
  annotation_col = Columns2,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  fontsize_row = 10,
  fontsize_col = 10,
  cellwidth = 22,
  cellheight = 12,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "firebrick"))(100),
  breaks = seq(0, max_auc, length.out = 101),
  border_color = "black",
  display_numbers = num_mat,
  number_color = "black",
  fontsize_number = 6,
  
  legend_breaks = c(0, mid_auc, max_auc),
  legend_labels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
  res = 600, 
  
  
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ELISA_heatmap3.png"
)
pheatmap(
  AUC_matrix,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  gaps_col = c(ncol(AUC_matrix) - 1),
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  annotation_row = Clone_Info_subset,
  annotation_col = Columns2,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  fontsize_row = 10,
  fontsize_col = 10,
  cellwidth = 22,
  cellheight = 12,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "firebrick"))(100),
  breaks = seq(0, max_auc, length.out = 101),
  border_color = "black",
  display_numbers = num_mat,
  number_color = "black",
  fontsize_number = 6,
  
  legend_breaks = c(0, mid_auc, max_auc),
  legend_labels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
  res = 600, 
  
  
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ELISA_heatmap3.pdf"
)

remove_antigens <- c("Spike-his", "Omicron-his")

AUC_matrix <- AUC_matrix[, !colnames(AUC_matrix) %in% remove_antigens]
Scaled_ELISA <- Scaled_ELISA[, !colnames(Scaled_ELISA) %in% remove_antigens]
Columns2 <- Columns2[!rownames(Columns2) %in% remove_antigens, , drop = FALSE]
colnames(AUC_matrix)[colnames(AUC_matrix) == "Spike"] <- "Full spike"
colnames(Scaled_ELISA)[colnames(Scaled_ELISA) == "Spike"] <- "Full spike"
rownames(Columns2)[rownames(Columns2) == "Spike"] <- "Full spike"
column_order <- c(
  "S1 NTD",
  "S1",
  "S2",
  "Full spike",
  "dsDNA"
)
AUC_matrix <- AUC_matrix[, column_order]
Scaled_ELISA <- Scaled_ELISA[, column_order]
Columns2 <- Columns2[column_order, , drop = FALSE]
num_mat <- matrix(
  sprintf("%.2f", AUC_matrix),
  nrow = nrow(AUC_matrix),
  ncol = ncol(AUC_matrix),
  dimnames = dimnames(AUC_matrix)
)
pheatmap(
  AUC_matrix,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  gaps_col = c(ncol(AUC_matrix) - 1),
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  annotation_row = Clone_Info_subset,
  annotation_col = Columns2,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  fontsize_row = 10,
  fontsize_col = 10,
  cellwidth = 22,
  cellheight = 12,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "firebrick"))(100),
  breaks = seq(0, max_auc, length.out = 101),
  border_color = "black",
  display_numbers = num_mat,
  number_color = "black",
  fontsize_number = 6,
  
  legend_breaks = c(0, mid_auc, max_auc),
  legend_labels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
  res = 600, 
  
  
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ELISA_heatmap4.png"
)
pheatmap(
  AUC_matrix,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  gaps_col = c(ncol(AUC_matrix) - 1),
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  annotation_row = Clone_Info_subset,
  annotation_col = Columns2,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  fontsize_row = 10,
  fontsize_col = 10,
  cellwidth = 22,
  cellheight = 12,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "firebrick"))(100),
  breaks = seq(0, max_auc, length.out = 101),
  border_color = "black",
  display_numbers = num_mat,
  number_color = "black",
  fontsize_number = 6,
  
  legend_breaks = c(0, mid_auc, max_auc),
  legend_labels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
  res = 600, 
  
  
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ELISA_heatmap4.pdf"
)

data_dir <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_DATA_new/"

files <- list.files(data_dir, pattern = "Processed.*\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)

trap_auc <- function(x, y) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  y <- as.numeric(y)
  ord <- order(x)
  x <- x[ord]
  y <- y[ord]
  dx <- diff(x)
  dy <- (y[-1] + y[-length(y)]) / 2
  sum(dx * dy, na.rm = TRUE)
}

calc_auc <- function(file) {
  antigen_name <- basename(file) %>%
    str_remove("\\.xlsx$") %>%
    str_remove(" Processed.*$")

  df <- read_xlsx(file)

  df_long <- df %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("OD"), names_to = "Replicate", values_to = "OD") %>%
    group_by(Clone, Concentration) %>%
    summarise(mean_OD = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(Concentration > 0, is.finite(mean_OD))

  df_long %>%
    group_by(Clone) %>%
    arrange(Concentration, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    summarise(
      AUC = if (n() >= 2) trap_auc(log10(Concentration), mean_OD) else NA_real_,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Antigen = antigen_name)
}

all_auc <- map_dfr(files, calc_auc)

# Check all antigens loaded — confirm RBD, ssDNA, PF4.Heparin appear here
unique(all_auc$Antigen)
AUC_matrix <- all_auc %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Antigen, values_from = AUC) %>%
  column_to_rownames("Clone") %>%
  as.matrix()

Scaled_ELISA <- scale(AUC_matrix)

Clone_Info <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/Monoclonal_Clone_Info.xlsx") %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% rownames(Scaled_ELISA)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("Cloning ID")

Clone_Info_subset <- Clone_Info %>%
  dplyr::select(Isotype, `RKH or Y5`, Cluster, `Expanded Clone`)

Clone_Info_subset[] <- lapply(Clone_Info_subset, function(x) {
  if (is.character(x)) as.factor(trimws(x)) else x
})

annotation_colors <- list(
  Cluster = c("Atypical" = "#00BA38", "PB/PC" = "#00BFC4", "PB/PC Precursors" = "#F564E3"),
  "RKH or Y5" = c("Yes" = "black", "No" = "white"),
  "Expanded Clone" = c("Yes" = "green3", "No" = "yellow2"),
  Isotype = c("IGHG1" = "#3B4CC0", "IGHG2" = "#77AADD", "IGHG3" = "#EE8866", "IGHM" = "#EEDD88"),
  "Antigen Source" = c("Virus" = "bisque", "Bacteria" = "black", "Self" = "darkred")
)

Scaled_ELISA <- as.matrix(Scaled_ELISA)
mode(Scaled_ELISA) <- "numeric"
AUC_matrix <- as.matrix(AUC_matrix)

Columns2 <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/Columns2.2.xlsx") %>%
  as.data.frame()
rownames(Columns2) <- Columns2$Antigen
Columns2$Antigen <- NULL
colnames(Columns2) <- "Antigen Source"

# Fix name mismatch if present
rownames(Columns2)[rownames(Columns2) == "PF4.Heparin"] <- "PF.hep"

# Remove his-tagged antigens
remove_antigens <- c("Spike-his", "Omicron-his")
AUC_matrix <- AUC_matrix[, !colnames(AUC_matrix) %in% remove_antigens]
Scaled_ELISA <- Scaled_ELISA[, !colnames(Scaled_ELISA) %in% remove_antigens]

# Rename Spike to Full spike
colnames(AUC_matrix)[colnames(AUC_matrix) == "Spike"] <- "Full spike"
colnames(Scaled_ELISA)[colnames(Scaled_ELISA) == "Spike"] <- "Full spike"
rownames(Columns2)[rownames(Columns2) == "Spike"] <- "Full spike"

# Virus → Bacteria → Self order
column_order <- c(
  "S1 NTD", "S1", "S2", "Full spike", "RBD",
  "LPS", 
  "PF.hep", "dsDNA", "ssDNA"
)

AUC_matrix <- AUC_matrix[, column_order]
Scaled_ELISA <- Scaled_ELISA[, column_order]
Columns2 <- Columns2[column_order, , drop = FALSE]


Clone_Info_subset <- as.data.frame(Clone_Info_subset)
Clone_Info_subset <- Clone_Info_subset[rownames(Scaled_ELISA), , drop = FALSE]

num_mat <- matrix(
  sprintf("%.2f", AUC_matrix),
  nrow = nrow(AUC_matrix),
  ncol = ncol(AUC_matrix),
  dimnames = dimnames(AUC_matrix)
)

max_auc <- max(AUC_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)
mid_auc <- max_auc / 2

# Gaps: after 5 Virus antigens, after 1 Bacteria antigen
gaps_col <- c(5, 6)

rownames(AUC_matrix)[rownames(AUC_matrix) == "17_18"] <- "79_18"
rownames(Clone_Info_subset)[rownames(Clone_Info_subset) == "17_18"] <- "79_18"
pheatmap(
  AUC_matrix,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  gaps_col = gaps_col,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  annotation_row = Clone_Info_subset,
  annotation_col = Columns2,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  fontsize_row = 10,
  fontsize_col = 10,
  cellwidth = 22,
  cellheight = 12,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "firebrick"))(100),
  breaks = seq(0, max_auc, length.out = 101),
  border_color = "black",
  display_numbers = num_mat,
  number_color = "black",
  fontsize_number = 6,
  legend_breaks = c(0, mid_auc, max_auc),
  legend_labels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
  res = 600,
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ELISA_heatmap4.png"
)
pheatmap(
  AUC_matrix,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  gaps_col = gaps_col,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  annotation_row = Clone_Info_subset,
  annotation_col = Columns2,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  fontsize_row = 10,
  fontsize_col = 10,
  cellwidth = 22,
  cellheight = 12,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "firebrick"))(100),
  breaks = seq(0, max_auc, length.out = 101),
  border_color = "black",
  display_numbers = num_mat,
  number_color = "black",
  fontsize_number = 6,
  legend_breaks = c(0, mid_auc, max_auc),
  legend_labels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
  res = 600,
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ELISA_heatmap4.pdf"
)

```


```{r AbMap paratope analysis }

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

base_dir <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID"
high_clone_sequence_ids <- Clone_Info %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Cloning ID` %in% high_clone_names) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Sequence.ID) %>%
  unique()
bcr_seqs_total <- read.delim(
  file.path(base_dir, "IMGT/5_AA-sequences.txt"),
  header = TRUE,
  sep = "\t",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
bcr_seqs_productive_all <- bcr_seqs_total[
  bcr_seqs_total$V.DOMAIN.Functionality == "productive",
]

bcr_seqs_productive_first <- bcr_seqs_productive_all[
  seq_len(min(24076, nrow(bcr_seqs_productive_all))),
]

missing_high_clone_ids <- setdiff(
  high_clone_sequence_ids,
  bcr_seqs_productive_first$Sequence.ID
)

missing_high_clone_seqs <- bcr_seqs_productive_all[
  bcr_seqs_productive_all$Sequence.ID %in% missing_high_clone_ids,
]
bcr_seqs_productive_final <- bind_rows(
  bcr_seqs_productive_first,
  missing_high_clone_seqs
) %>%
  distinct(Sequence.ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

bcr_seqs_processed <- data.frame(
  Dataset = "COVID",
  Original_ID = bcr_seqs_productive_final$Sequence.ID,
  AbMap_ID = paste0(
    "COVID_",
    seq_len(nrow(bcr_seqs_productive_final)),
    "_",
    bcr_seqs_productive_final$Sequence.ID
  ),
  AA_Sequence = bcr_seqs_productive_final$V.D.J.REGION,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

vaxxed <- read_xlsx(file.path(base_dir, "Vaccinee RBD Specific Sequences.xlsx")) %>%
  transmute(
    Dataset = "Vaccinee",
    Original_ID = as.character(Clone_ID),
    AbMap_ID = paste0("Vaccinee_", row_number(), "_", Original_ID),
    AA_Sequence = as.character(`HC AA Sequence`)
  )

conv <- read_xlsx(file.path(base_dir, "Convalescent RBD Specific Sequences.xlsx")) %>%
  transmute(
    Dataset = "Convalescent",
    Original_ID = as.character(Clone_ID),
    AbMap_ID = paste0("Convalescent_", row_number(), "_", Original_ID),
    AA_Sequence = as.character(`HC AA Sequence`)
  )

abmap_master_key <- bind_rows(
  bcr_seqs_processed,
  vaxxed,
  conv
) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(AA_Sequence),
    AA_Sequence != "",
    !str_detect(AA_Sequence, "\\*")
  )

stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(abmap_master_key$AbMap_ID))

write.csv(
  abmap_master_key,
  file.path(base_dir, "abmap_master_key.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
abmap_master_key_checked <- abmap_master_key %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    AA_Sequence = toupper(trimws(AA_Sequence)),
    Has_Invalid_AA = grepl("[^ACDEFGHIKLMNPQRSTVWY]", AA_Sequence),
    Invalid_AA = stringr::str_extract_all(AA_Sequence, "[^ACDEFGHIKLMNPQRSTVWY]")
  )

invalid_abmap_sequences <- abmap_master_key_checked %>%
  dplyr::filter(Has_Invalid_AA)

invalid_abmap_sequences %>%
  dplyr::select(Dataset, Original_ID, AbMap_ID, AA_Sequence, Invalid_AA)
abmap_master_key_clean <- abmap_master_key_checked %>%
  dplyr::filter(!Has_Invalid_AA) %>%
  dplyr::select(Dataset, Original_ID, AbMap_ID, AA_Sequence)
fasta_file_all <- file.path(base_dir, "abmap_all_COVID_vaccinee_convalescent.fasta")
con <- file(fasta_file_all, "w")

for (i in seq_len(nrow(abmap_master_key))) {
  writeLines(paste0(">", abmap_master_key$AbMap_ID[i]), con)
  writeLines(abmap_master_key$AA_Sequence[i], con)
}

close(con)

writeLines('
import torch
import abmap

print("CUDA available:", torch.cuda.is_available())
print("GPU:", torch.cuda.get_device_name(0) if torch.cuda.is_available() else "No CUDA")

abmap.augment_from_fasta(
    fastaPath="/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/abmap_all_COVID_vaccinee_convalescent.fasta",
    outputPath="/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/abmap_output_all_gpu",
    chain_type="H",
    embed_type="beplerberger",
    num_mutations=0,
    device=0
)
', "run_abmap_all_gpu.py")

system("/home/wen-lab/miniconda3/envs/abmap_env/bin/python3 run_abmap_all_gpu.py")
base_dir <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID"

file.exists(file.path(base_dir, "abmap_master_key.csv"))
file.exists(file.path(base_dir, "abmap_output_all_gpu"))

writeLines('
import os
import pickle
import torch
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import abmap

base_dir = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID"
output_dir = os.path.join(base_dir, "abmap_output_all_gpu")

abmap_key_path = os.path.join(base_dir, "abmap_master_key.csv")
embedding_csv_path = os.path.join(base_dir, "abmap_all_fixed_embeddings.csv")
embedding_npy_path = os.path.join(base_dir, "abmap_all_fixed_embeddings.npy")
embedding_id_path = os.path.join(base_dir, "abmap_all_fixed_embedding_ids.csv")

print("Key file exists:", os.path.isfile(abmap_key_path))
print("Output dir exists:", os.path.isdir(output_dir))

device = 0 if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu"

print("CUDA available:", torch.cuda.is_available())
print("Using device:", device)

if torch.cuda.is_available():
    print("GPU:", torch.cuda.get_device_name(0))

abmap_H = abmap.load_abmap(
    pretrained_path="/home/wen-lab/miniconda3/envs/abmap_env/lib/python3.9/site-packages/abmap/pretrained_models/AbMAP_beplerberger_H.pt",
    plm_name="beplerberger",
    device=device
)

abmap_H.eval()

abmap_key = pd.read_csv(abmap_key_path)

embedding_rows = []
embedding_ids = []
missing_ids = []
failed_rows = []

with torch.no_grad():
    for idx, abmap_id in enumerate(abmap_key["AbMap_ID"]):
        file_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f"{abmap_id}.p")

        if not os.path.isfile(file_path):
            missing_ids.append(abmap_id)
            continue

        try:
            with open(file_path, "rb") as f:
                cdr_embedding = pickle.load(f)

            if not isinstance(cdr_embedding, torch.Tensor):
                cdr_embedding = torch.tensor(cdr_embedding)

            cdr_embedding = cdr_embedding.float().unsqueeze(0)

            if torch.cuda.is_available():
                cdr_embedding = cdr_embedding.cuda()

            fixed_embedding = abmap_H.embed(
                cdr_embedding,
                embed_type="fixed"
            )

            fixed_embedding = fixed_embedding.detach().cpu().numpy().squeeze()

            embedding_rows.append(fixed_embedding)
            embedding_ids.append(abmap_id)

            if (idx + 1) % 1000 == 0:
                print(f"Processed {idx + 1} sequences")

        except Exception as e:
            failed_rows.append({
                "AbMap_ID": abmap_id,
                "Error": str(e)
            })

if len(embedding_rows) == 0:
    raise RuntimeError("No embeddings were successfully converted.")

final_abmap_array = np.vstack(embedding_rows)

embedding_colnames = [f"AbMap_{i + 1}" for i in range(final_abmap_array.shape[1])]

embedding_df = pd.DataFrame(final_abmap_array, columns=embedding_colnames)
embedding_df.insert(0, "AbMap_ID", embedding_ids)

embedding_df.to_csv(embedding_csv_path, index=False)
np.save(embedding_npy_path, final_abmap_array)

pd.DataFrame({"AbMap_ID": embedding_ids}).to_csv(
    embedding_id_path,
    index=False
)

if missing_ids:
    pd.DataFrame({"AbMap_ID": missing_ids}).to_csv(
        os.path.join(base_dir, "abmap_missing_embedding_ids.csv"),
        index=False
    )

if failed_rows:
    pd.DataFrame(failed_rows).to_csv(
        os.path.join(base_dir, "abmap_failed_embedding_ids.csv"),
        index=False
    )

dimension_variance = np.var(final_abmap_array, axis=0)

print("Saved CSV:", embedding_csv_path)
print("Saved NPY:", embedding_npy_path)
print("Shape:", final_abmap_array.shape)
print("Missing:", len(missing_ids))
print("Failed:", len(failed_rows))
print("Mean variance across dimensions:", dimension_variance.mean())
print("Min variance:", dimension_variance.min())
print("Max variance:", dimension_variance.max())
print("Zero variance dimensions:", np.sum(dimension_variance == 0))
', file.path(base_dir, "convert_abmap_outputs_to_fixed_embeddings.py"))

system(
  paste(
    "/home/wen-lab/miniconda3/envs/abmap_env/bin/python3",
    file.path(base_dir, "convert_abmap_outputs_to_fixed_embeddings.py")
  )
)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

abmap_embedding_df <- read_csv(
  file.path(base_dir, "abmap_all_fixed_embeddings.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

abmap_master_key_clean <- read_csv(
  file.path(base_dir, "abmap_master_key.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

abmap_embedding_annotated <- abmap_embedding_df %>%
  left_join(abmap_master_key_clean, by = "AbMap_ID")

abmap_feature_mat <- abmap_embedding_annotated %>%
  dplyr::select(matches("^AbMap_[0-9]+$")) %>%
  as.matrix()

storage.mode(abmap_feature_mat) <- "numeric"

abmap_pca <- prcomp(
  abmap_feature_mat,
  center = TRUE,
  scale. = TRUE
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

abmap_pca_variance_df <- data.frame(
  PC = seq_along(abmap_pca$sdev),
  Variance = abmap_pca$sdev^2
) %>%
  mutate(
    Percent_Variance = Variance / sum(Variance) * 100,
    Cumulative_Percent_Variance = cumsum(Percent_Variance)
  )

head(abmap_pca_variance_df, 20)

abmap_elbow_plot <- ggplot(
  abmap_pca_variance_df[1:50, ],
  aes(x = PC, y = Percent_Variance)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "AbMap PCA elbow plot",
    x = "Principal component",
    y = "Percent variance explained"
  )

abmap_elbow_plot

high_clone_names <- High_clones$Clone_ID

set.seed(123)

abmap_umap_result <- uwot::umap(
  abmap_pca$x[, 1:20],
  n_neighbors = 30,
  min_dist = 0.2,
  metric = "cosine"
)

abmap_umap_df <- as.data.frame(abmap_umap_result)
colnames(abmap_umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

abmap_umap_annotated <- abmap_embedding_annotated %>%
  bind_cols(abmap_umap_df) %>%
  left_join(Clone_Info, by = c("Original_ID" = "Sequence.ID")) %>%
  mutate(
    Cloning_ID = `Cloning ID`,
    Group = case_when(
      Dataset == "Vaccinee" ~ "Vaccinee",
      Dataset == "Convalescent" ~ "Convalescent",
      Cloning_ID %in% high_clone_names ~ "Polyreactive Clone",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    Label = ifelse(Group == "Polyreactive Clone", Cloning_ID, "")
  )

group_colors <- c(
  "Other" = "gray80",
  "Vaccinee" = "darkseagreen2",
  "Convalescent" = "wheat",
  "Polyreactive Clone" = "#CC0000"
)

abmap_umap_full_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = abmap_umap_annotated %>% filter(Group == "Other"),
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2),
    color = "gray80",
    alpha = 0.45,
    size = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = abmap_umap_annotated %>% filter(Group != "Other"),
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, fill = Group),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.35,
    alpha = 0.95,
    size = 2.1
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = abmap_umap_annotated %>% filter(Label != ""),
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, label = Label),
    size = 2.8,
    max.overlaps = 100,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "UMAP of AbMap BCR Embeddings",
    x = "UMAP 1",
    y = "UMAP 2",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )

library(ggrepel)
abmap_poly_labels <- abmap_umap_annotated %>%
  filter(Group == "Polyreactive Clone") %>%
  group_by(Cloning_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    UMAP1 = median(UMAP1),
    UMAP2 = median(UMAP2),
    Label = dplyr::first(Cloning_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

abmap_umap_full_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = abmap_umap_annotated %>% filter(Group == "Other"),
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2),
    color = "gray80",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = abmap_umap_annotated %>% filter(Group != "Other"),
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, fill = Group),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.35,
    alpha = 0.95,
    size = 2.2
  ) +
  geom_label_repel(
    data = abmap_poly_labels,
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, label = Label),
    size = 3.2,
    box.padding = 0.5,
    point.padding = 0.3,
    segment.color = "black",
    segment.size = 0.4,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    force = 2,
    family = "Arial"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "UMAP of AbMap BCR Embeddings",
    x = "UMAP 1",
    y = "UMAP 2",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

abmap_umap_full_plot
abmap_umap_full_plot <- abmap_umap_full_plot +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1)
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/UMAP_with_vaccs.convs.polys.png", 
       abmap_umap_full_plot, dpi = 600, width = 8.5, height = 6.5, bg = "white")
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/UMAP_with_vaccs.convs.polys.svg", 
       abmap_umap_full_plot, dpi = 600, width = 8.5, height = 6.5, bg = "white")
focus_groups <- abmap_umap_annotated %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group != "Other") %>%
  dplyr::distinct(Group) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Group)

abmap_others_replicated <- abmap_umap_annotated %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "Other") %>%
  dplyr::rename(OriginalGroup = Group) %>%
  tidyr::crossing(Group = focus_groups) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(PlotGroup = "Other")

abmap_focus_data <- abmap_umap_annotated %>%
  dplyr::filter(Group != "Other") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(PlotGroup = Group)

abmap_facet_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  abmap_others_replicated,
  abmap_focus_data
)

    fill = NULL
  ) +

    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),

  )

# ---- Quanitify the convergence ----
library(FNN)

compute_knn_similarity <- function(mat, k = 10) {
  nn <- get.knn(mat, k = k)
  return(nn$nn.index)
}

library(dplyr)

compute_nn_distance <- function(group_name) {
  
  ids <- abmap_group_df %>%
    filter(Group == group_name) %>%
    pull(AbMap_ID)
  
  sub_mat <- abmap_feature_mat[ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  dist_mat <- as.matrix(dist(sub_mat))
  
  diag(dist_mat) <- Inf  # remove self
  
  nn_dist <- apply(dist_mat, 1, min)
  
  data.frame(
    AbMap_ID = ids,
    Group = group_name,
    NN_Distance = nn_dist
  )
}

abmap_nn_df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(
    c("Convalescent", "Vaccinee", "Polyreactive Clone"),
    compute_nn_distance
  )
)
poly_vs_conv_nn <- wilcox.test(
  x = abmap_nn_df %>% filter(Group == "Polyreactive Clone") %>% pull(NN_Distance),
  y = abmap_nn_df %>% filter(Group == "Convalescent") %>% pull(NN_Distance),
  alternative = "greater"
)

poly_vs_vax_nn <- wilcox.test(
  x = abmap_nn_df %>% filter(Group == "Polyreactive Clone") %>% pull(NN_Distance),
  y = abmap_nn_df %>% filter(Group == "Vaccinee") %>% pull(NN_Distance),
  alternative = "greater"
)

poly_vs_conv_nn
poly_vs_vax_nn
conv_vs_vax_nn <- wilcox.test(
  x = abmap_nn_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == "Convalescent") %>%
    dplyr::pull(NN_Distance),
  y = abmap_nn_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == "Vaccinee") %>%
    dplyr::pull(NN_Distance),
  alternative = "two.sided"
)

conv_vs_vax_nn
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)
library(ggpubr)

abmap_nn_df <- abmap_nn_df %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(
      Group,
      levels = c("Convalescent", "Vaccinee", "Polyreactive Clone")
    )
  )

get_stars <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return("NA")
  if (p < 0.0001) return("****")
  if (p < 0.001) return("***")
  if (p < 0.01) return("**")
  if (p < 0.05) return("*")
  return("ns")
}

cliffs_delta <- function(x, y) {
  pairwise_diff <- outer(x, y, "-")
  delta <- (sum(pairwise_diff > 0) - sum(pairwise_diff < 0)) / length(pairwise_diff)
  return(delta)
}

run_nn_comparison <- function(group_x, group_y, alternative = "two.sided") {
  
  x_vals <- abmap_nn_df %>%
    filter(Group == group_x) %>%
    pull(NN_Distance)
  
  y_vals <- abmap_nn_df %>%
    filter(Group == group_y) %>%
    pull(NN_Distance)
  
  wilcox_res <- wilcox.test(
    x = x_vals,
    y = y_vals,
    alternative = alternative,
    exact = FALSE
  )
  
  data.frame(
    group1 = group_x,
    group2 = group_y,
    alternative = alternative,
    n_group1 = length(x_vals),
    n_group2 = length(y_vals),
    median_group1 = median(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_group2 = median(y_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_group1 = mean(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_group2 = mean(y_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_difference_group1_minus_group2 = median(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE) - median(y_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_difference_group1_minus_group2 = mean(x_vals, na.rm = TRUE) - mean(y_vals, na.rm = TRUE),
    cliffs_delta = cliffs_delta(x_vals, y_vals),
    W = unname(wilcox_res$statistic),
    p_value = wilcox_res$p.value
  )
}

abmap_nn_stats_df <- bind_rows(
  run_nn_comparison("Polyreactive Clone", "Convalescent", alternative = "greater"),
  run_nn_comparison("Polyreactive Clone", "Vaccinee", alternative = "greater"),
  run_nn_comparison("Convalescent", "Vaccinee", alternative = "two.sided")
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj_BH = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    stars = sapply(p_adj_BH, get_stars)
  )

abmap_nn_stats_df
abmap_nn_ymax <- max(abmap_nn_df$NN_Distance, na.rm = TRUE)
abmap_nn_ymin <- min(abmap_nn_df$NN_Distance, na.rm = TRUE)

abmap_nn_p_df <- abmap_nn_stats_df %>%
  mutate(
    y.position = c(
      abmap_nn_ymax + 0.01,
      abmap_nn_ymax + 0.03,
      abmap_nn_ymax + 0.05
    ),
    label = stars
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(group1, group2, y.position, label)

abmap_nn_plot <- ggplot(
  abmap_nn_df,
  aes(x = Group, y = NN_Distance, fill = Group)
) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    justification = -0.2,
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.08,
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.75
  ) +
  ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(
    abmap_nn_p_df,
    label = "label",
    xmin = "group1",
    xmax = "group2",
    y.position = "y.position",
    tip.length = 0.01,
    size = 6,
    family = "Arial"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(
    ylim = c(abmap_nn_ymin, abmap_nn_ymax + 0.07),
    clip = "off"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Nearest-neighbor distance in AbMap embedding space",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Distance to nearest neighbor"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),

library(dplyr)

abmap_feature_mat <- abmap_embedding_annotated %>%
  dplyr::select(matches("^AbMap_[0-9]+$")) %>%
  as.matrix()

rownames(abmap_feature_mat) <- abmap_embedding_annotated$AbMap_ID
abmap_embedding_annotated <- abmap_embedding_annotated %>%
  left_join(Clone_Info, by = c("Original_ID" = "Sequence.ID")) %>%
  mutate(
    Cloning_ID = `Cloning ID`,
    Group = case_when(
      Dataset == "Vaccinee" ~ "Vaccinee",
      Dataset == "Convalescent" ~ "Convalescent",
      Cloning_ID %in% high_clone_names ~ "Polyreactive Clone",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )
abmap_group_df <- abmap_embedding_annotated %>%
  dplyr::select(AbMap_ID, Group)

abmap_cosine_similarity <- function(mat) {
  mat_norm <- mat / sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))
  sim <- mat_norm %*% t(mat_norm)
  return(sim)
}
compute_within_similarity <- function(group_name) {
  
  ids <- abmap_group_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == group_name) %>%
    dplyr::pull(AbMap_ID)
  
  sub_mat <- abmap_feature_mat[ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  sim_mat <- abmap_cosine_similarity(sub_mat)
  
  # Take upper triangle only (no duplicates, no self)
  sim_vals <- sim_mat[upper.tri(sim_mat)]
  
  data.frame(
    Group = group_name,
    Similarity = sim_vals
  )
}

groups_to_compare <- c("Vaccinee", "Convalescent", "Polyreactive Clone")

abmap_similarity_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(groups_to_compare, compute_within_similarity)
)
abmap_similarity_df <- abmap_similarity_df %>%
  mutate(
    Percent_Similarity = (Similarity + 1) / 2 * 100
  )
library(ggplot2)

abmap_similarity_plot <- ggplot(
  abmap_similarity_df,
  aes(x = Group, y = Percent_Similarity, fill = Group)
) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    .width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
    justification = -0.2,
    point_colour = NA
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    size = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Within-group AbMap embedding similarity",
    y = "Percent similarity",
    x = NULL
  )

abmap_cosine_similarity <- function(mat) {
  mat_norm <- mat / sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))
  sim_mat <- mat_norm %*% t(mat_norm)
  return(sim_mat)
}

compute_sequence_mean_similarity <- function(group_name) {
  
  ids <- abmap_group_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == group_name) %>%
    dplyr::pull(AbMap_ID)
  
  sub_mat <- abmap_feature_mat[ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  sim_mat <- abmap_cosine_similarity(sub_mat)
  
  diag(sim_mat) <- NA
  
  sequence_mean_similarity <- rowMeans(sim_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    AbMap_ID = ids,
    Group = group_name,
    Mean_Similarity = sequence_mean_similarity
  )
}

abmap_sequence_similarity_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(
    c("Convalescent", "Vaccinee", "Polyreactive Clone"),
    compute_sequence_mean_similarity
  )
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Percent_Similarity = (Mean_Similarity + 1) / 2 * 100
  )

wilcox.test(
  Percent_Similarity ~ Group,
  data = abmap_sequence_similarity_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group %in% c("Polyreactive Clone", "Convalescent")),
  alternative = "less"
)

wilcox.test(
  Percent_Similarity ~ Group,
  data = abmap_sequence_similarity_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group %in% c("Polyreactive Clone", "Vaccinee")),

)

)

)

compute_centroid_distance <- function(group_name) {
  
  ids <- abmap_group_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == group_name) %>%
    dplyr::pull(AbMap_ID)
  
  sub_mat <- abmap_feature_mat[ids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # centroid of group
  centroid <- colMeans(sub_mat)
  
  # Euclidean distance to centroid
  dists <- sqrt(rowSums((sub_mat - centroid)^2))
  
  data.frame(
    AbMap_ID = ids,
    Group = group_name,
    Distance = dists
  )
}

abmap_centroid_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(
    c("Convalescent", "Vaccinee", "Polyreactive Clone"),
    compute_centroid_distance
  )
)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)

abmap_centroid_plot <- ggplot(
  abmap_centroid_df,
  aes(x = Group, y = Distance, fill = Group)
) +
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    justification = -0.2,
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.08,
    size = 1.8,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Distance to group centroid (AbMap embeddings)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Euclidean distance to centroid"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none"
  )
poly_vs_conv_centroid <- wilcox.test(
  x = abmap_centroid_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == "Polyreactive Clone") %>%
    dplyr::pull(Distance),
  y = abmap_centroid_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == "Convalescent") %>%
    dplyr::pull(Distance),
  alternative = "greater"
)

poly_vs_vaccine_centroid <- wilcox.test(
  x = abmap_centroid_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == "Polyreactive Clone") %>%
    dplyr::pull(Distance),
  y = abmap_centroid_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == "Vaccinee") %>%
    dplyr::pull(Distance),
  alternative = "greater"
)

conv_vs_vax_centroid <- wilcox.test(
  x = abmap_centroid_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == "Convalescent") %>%
    dplyr::pull(Distance),
  y = abmap_centroid_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Group == "Vaccinee") %>%
    dplyr::pull(Distance),
  alternative = "two.sided"
)
```
