```{r Monoclonal Information Assigment}

Clones_Set1 <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/First_Set.xlsx")
Clones_Set2 <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Second_Set.xlsx")

#remove leading 0s (\\b0 = find word boundry with leading 0 and  
#+(\\d) means digit  that follows 0s, \\ means add entire group back without 0)
Clones_Set1$'Cloning ID' <- gsub("\\b0+(\\d)", "\\1", Clones_Set1$'Cloning ID')
Clones_Set2$'Cloning ID' <- gsub("\\b0+(\\d)", "\\1", Clones_Set2$'Cloning ID')

# Select just the columns you want from each
Clones_Set1 <- Clones_Set1[, c("Cloning ID", "Cell.ID")]
Clones_Set2 <- Clones_Set2[, c("Cloning ID", "cell_id")]

Clones_Set2 <- Clones_Set2 %>%
  rename(Cell.ID = cell_id)

# Combine them into a new dataframe
Combined_ClSetds <- rbind(Clones_Set1, Clones_Set2)

LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc <- LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
  rename(Cell.ID = cell_id)

Combined_ClSetds <- Combined_ClSetds %>%
  left_join(LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>% select(Cell.ID, clone_id, junction_aa, junction_length, IGL_cdr3, c_call,
                                IGL_chain, IGH_cdr3_Y5orRKH, New_Clusters), by = "Cell.ID")

Combined_ClSetds <- Combined_ClSetds %>%
  left_join(
    Clones2 %>% select(clone_id, seq_count),  # Only bring needed columns
    by = "clone_id"
  ) %>%
  rename(`# of Cells in Clone Family` = seq_count)

Combined_ClSetds$Expanded_Clone <- Combined_ClSetds$`# of Cells in Clone Family`>2
Combined_ClSetds <- Combined_ClSetds %>%
  mutate(`CDR3 AA Length` = nchar(junction_aa))

write_xlsx(Combined_ClSetds, "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Monoclonal_Clone_Info.xlsx")


```

```{r Germlines Generation of Highly Reactive Clones }

library(alakazam)
library(shazam)
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(dowser)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(Biostrings)
Metadata <- COVID_Seu@meta.data

HC_Germs <- read_tsv("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/In_House_COVID_Analysis/COVID19__ChangeO_combined_all_corrected_clone-pass.tsv")
LC_Germs <- read.csv("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/In_House_COVID_Analysis/COVID19_combined_all_light_parse-select_mut-analysis.csv")
Clone_Info <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Monoclonal_Clone_Info.xlsx")
HC_filtered <- HC_Germs %>%
  filter(cell_id %in% Clone_Info$Cell.ID) %>%
  select(cell_id, sequence_alignment_HC = sequence_alignment,
         germline_alignment_HC = germline_alignment)  

LC_filtered <- LC_Germs %>%
  filter(cell_id %in% Clone_Info$Cell.ID) %>%
  select(cell_id, sequence_alignment_LC = sequence_alignment,
         germline_alignment_LC = germline_alignment)

# Join HC and LC info with Clone_Info using "Cloning ID"
Clone_Info_extended <- Clone_Info %>%
  left_join(HC_filtered, by = c("Cell.ID" = "cell_id")) %>%
  left_join(LC_filtered, by = c("Cell.ID" = "cell_id"))

# Load required package
library(Biostrings)

# Define a function to clean and translate
# Load required package
library(Biostrings)

# Define cleaning + translation function
clean_and_translate <- function(nuc_seq) {
  if (is.na(nuc_seq) || nuc_seq == "") return(NA_character_)

  # Remove dots, whitespace
  clean_seq <- gsub("\\.", "", nuc_seq)
  clean_seq <- gsub("\\s+", "", clean_seq)

  # Remove all non-ACGT characters
  clean_seq <- toupper(gsub("[^ACGT]", "", clean_seq))

  # Check length and trim to multiple of 3
  len <- nchar(clean_seq)
  if (len < 3) return(NA_character_)
  trim_len <- len %% 3
  if (trim_len != 0) {
    clean_seq <- substr(clean_seq, 1, len - trim_len)
  }

  # Translate
  dna <- Biostrings::DNAString(clean_seq)
  aa <- suppressWarnings(as.character(Biostrings::translate(dna)))

  return(aa)
}


Clone_Info_extended <- Clone_Info_extended %>%
  mutate(
    # Clean all nucleotide sequences (remove dots and whitespace)
    sequence_alignment_HC_clean = gsub("\\.|\\s", "", sequence_alignment_HC),
    germline_alignment_HC_clean = gsub("\\.|\\s", "", germline_alignment_HC),
    sequence_alignment_LC_clean = gsub("\\.|\\s", "", sequence_alignment_LC),
    germline_alignment_LC_clean = gsub("\\.|\\s", "", germline_alignment_LC),

    # Translate only HC and LC sequence alignments
    sequence_aa_HC = sapply(sequence_alignment_HC, clean_and_translate),
    sequence_aa_LC = sapply(sequence_alignment_LC, clean_and_translate)
  )

write_xlsx(Clone_Info_extended, "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Germline_Info_For_Clones.xlsx")

```

```{r Generating Features of HCDR3s of High Clones}

Clone_Cell_IDs <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Germline_Info_For_Clones.xlsx")
Metadata2 <- COVID_Seu_VDJ@meta.data

Metadata2$Cell.ID <- rownames(Metadata2)

CDR3_CloneSeqs <- Clone_Cell_IDs %>%
  inner_join(Metadata, by = "Cell.ID") %>%
  select(Cell.ID, IGH_junction_aa, `Cloning ID`)

# Load necessary libraries
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)

# Define charged amino acids
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)

# Define charges
aa_charge <- c(
  K = 1, R = 1, H = 1,
  D = -1, E = -1,
  A = 0, C = 0, G = 0, F = 0, I = 0, L = 0, M = 0, N = 0, P = 0,
  Q = 0, S = 0, T = 0, V = 0, W = 0, Y = 0,
  "-" = 0, X = 0, "*" = 0
)

# Subset CDR3_CloneSeqs to only include the high clones
cdr3_subset <- CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% High_clones$Clone_ID)

# Calculate net and normalized charge
cdr3_subset <- cdr3_subset %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    charge = sum(aa_charge[unlist(strsplit(toupper(IGH_junction_aa), ""))], na.rm = TRUE),
    length = nchar(IGH_junction_aa),
    charge_ratio = charge / length
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
# Function to color each amino acid
color_sequence <- function(seq) {
  aas <- unlist(strsplit(seq, ""))
  sapply(aas, function(aa) {
    if (aa %in% c("K", "R", "H")) {
      paste0("<span style='color:blue;'>", aa, "</span>")
    } else if (aa %in% c("D", "E")) {
      paste0("<span style='color:red;'>", aa, "</span>")
    } else {
      aa
    }
  }) %>%
  paste0(collapse = "")
}

# Apply to your sequences
cdr3_subset$colored_seq <- sapply(cdr3_subset$IGH_junction_aa, color_sequence)

expanded <- CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% High_clones$Clone_ID) %>%
  mutate(seq_len = nchar(IGH_junction_aa)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(AAs = strsplit(IGH_junction_aa, "")) %>%
  unnest_longer(AAs, indices_to = "Position") %>%
  mutate(
    Charge = aa_charge[AAs],
    Color = case_when(
      AAs %in% c("K", "R", "H") ~ "blue",
      AAs %in% c("D", "E") ~ "red",
      TRUE ~ "gray70"
    ),
    TextColor = case_when(
      AAs %in% c("K", "R", "H", "D", "E") ~ "white",
      TRUE ~ "black"
    )
  )
Labeled_ChargedAAs <- ggplot(expanded, aes(x = Position, y = `Cloning ID`)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Color), size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = AAs, color = TextColor), size = 2.5, family = "Arial", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_color_identity() +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Sequence Charge Layout by Clone ID",
    y = "Cloning ID"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      margin = margin(r = 15)
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black")
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HCDR3_Charged_AAs_labeled.png", 
       Labeled_ChargedAAs, dpi = 600, width = 6, height = 4, bg = "white")
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HCDR3_Charged_AAs_labeled.svg", 
       Labeled_ChargedAAs, dpi = 600, width = 6, height = 4, bg = "white")

library(dplyr)
library(ggtext)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

cdr3_data <- CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% High_clones$Clone_ID) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    charge = sum(aa_charge[unlist(strsplit(toupper(IGH_junction_aa), ""))], na.rm = TRUE),
    length = nchar(IGH_junction_aa),
    charge_ratio = charge / length
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

color_sequence <- function(seq) {
  sapply(strsplit(seq, "")[[1]], function(aa) {
    if (aa %in% c("K", "R", "H")) {
      paste0("<span style='color:blue;'>", aa, "</span>")
    } else if (aa %in% c("D", "E")) {
      paste0("<span style='color:red;'>", aa, "</span>")
    } else {
      aa
    }
  }) %>% paste0(collapse = "")
}

cdr3_data$colored_seq <- sapply(cdr3_data$IGH_junction_aa, color_sequence)
cdr3_data$full_label <- paste0("<b>", cdr3_data$Clone_ID, "</b>: ", cdr3_data$colored_seq)

# 1. Define charge ratio calculator
compute_charge_ratio <- function(seq) {
  seq_split <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  total <- length(seq_split)
  if (total == 0) return(NA)
  
  pos_count <- sum(seq_split %in% c("K", "R", "H"))
  neg_count <- sum(seq_split %in% c("D", "E"))
  net_charge <- pos_count - neg_count
  ratio <- net_charge / total
  return(ratio)
}

# 2. Apply to Metadata and add charge ratio column
Metadata$charge_ratio <- sapply(Metadata$IGH_junction_aa, compute_charge_ratio)

All_ChargeRatios <-ggplot(Metadata, aes(x = PEA, y = charge_ratio, fill = PEA)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5, size = 1, color = "black") +
  # Show mean as text
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "text",
    aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", ..y..)),
    vjust = -1.5,
    color = "black",
    size = 3.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # Centered Wilcoxon p-value
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    label.x.npc = "center",
    label.y.npc = "top"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Neg" = "navy", "Pos" = "firebrick"),
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = NA))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "CDR3 Charge Ratio by PEA Status",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Charge Ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    text = element_text(family = "Arial")
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Charge_Ratios_PEA.png", 
       All_ChargeRatios, dpi = 600, width = 10, height = 6, bg = "white")

RatioByClusters <-ggplot(Metadata, aes(x = PEA, y = charge_ratio, fill = PEA)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5, size = 0.8, color = "black") +
  # Add mean value labels
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "text",
    aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", ..y..)),
    vjust = -0.6,
    color = "black",
    size = 4,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # Center Wilcoxon test p-value
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    label.x.npc = "center",
    label.y.npc = "top"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Neg" = "navy", "Pos" = "firebrick"),
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = NA))
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ new_clusters, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge Ratio by PEA Status Within Clusters",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Charge Ratio"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Charge_Ratios_ByCluster&PEA.png", 
       RatioByClusters, dpi = 600, width = 12, height = 10, bg = "white")


# Ensure Clone_IDs are character for consistent matching
High_clones$Clone_ID <- as.character(High_clones$Clone_ID)
CDR3_CloneSeqs$Cloning_ID <- as.character(CDR3_CloneSeqs$`Cloning ID`)

# Add group column

  CDR3_CloneSeqs$`Cloning ID` %in% High_clones$Clone_ID,
  "Polyreactive Clones", "Other Clones"
)
CDR3_CloneSeqs$Group <- factor(CDR3_CloneSeqs$Group, levels = c("Other Clones", "Polyreactive Clones"))

compute_charge_ratio <- function(seq) {
  aa <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  total <- length(aa)
  if (total == 0) return(NA)
  pos <- sum(aa %in% c("K", "R", "H"))
  neg <- sum(aa %in% c("D", "E"))
  (pos - neg) / total
}

CDR3_CloneSeqs$charge_ratio <- sapply(CDR3_CloneSeqs$IGH_junction_aa, compute_charge_ratio)

)

compute_weighted_charge_ratio <- function(seq) {
  aa <- strsplit(toupper(seq), "")[[1]]
  total <- length(aa)
  if (total == 0) return(NA)
  
  weights <- c(K = 1, R = 1, H = 0.1, D = -1, E = -1)
  charge_vals <- weights[aa]
  
  sum(charge_vals, na.rm = TRUE) / total
}
CDR3_CloneSeqs$weighted_charge_ratio <- sapply(
  CDR3_CloneSeqs$IGH_junction_aa,
  compute_weighted_charge_ratio
)

) +

    aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", ..y..)),
    vjust = -0.6,
    color = "black",
    size = 3.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("Other Clones", "Polyreactive Clones")),
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    label.y = max(CDR3_CloneSeqs$weighted_charge_ratio, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.02,
    size = 8,
    bracket.size = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Other Clones" = "gray70", "Polyreactive Clones" = "firebrick"),
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = NA))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.12))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge of\n Polyreactive Antibodies",
    x = NULL,
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    text = element_text(family = "Arial")
  )

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Other Clones" = "gray70", "Polyreactive Clones" = "firebrick"),
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = NA))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.12))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge within RKH/Y5 Clones",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Charge Ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    text = element_text(family = "Arial")
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Charge_Ratios_RKH.Y5Clones.png", 
       RKH_PolyvsNot, dpi = 600, width = 10, height = 6, bg = "white")
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Charge_Ratios_RKH.Y5Clones.svg", 
       RKH_PolyvsNot, dpi = 600, width = 10, height = 6, bg = "white")

RKH_Clones <- Clone_Info %>%
  dplyr::filter(IGH_cdr3_Y5orRKH == "TRUE")

RKH_Clones$Group <- ifelse(
  RKH_Clones$`Cloning ID` %in% High_clones$Clone_ID,
  "Polyreactive Clones",
  "Other Clones"
)

RKH_Clones$weighted_charge_ratio <- sapply(
  RKH_Clones$junction_aa,
  compute_weighted_charge_ratio
)

RKH_PolyvsNot_WeightedCharge <- ggplot(
  RKH_Clones,
  aes(x = Group, y = weighted_charge_ratio, fill = Group)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5, color = "black") +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "text",
    aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", ..y..)),
    vjust = -0.6,
    color = "black",
    size = 3.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(c("Other Clones", "Polyreactive Clones")),
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    label.y = max(RKH_Clones$weighted_charge_ratio, na.rm = TRUE) - 0.02,
    size = 8,
    bracket.size = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Other Clones" = "gray70",
      "Polyreactive Clones" = "firebrick"
    ),
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = NA))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.12))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge \n within RKH/Y5 Clones",
    x = NULL,
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    text = element_text(family = "Arial")
  )

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Charge_Ratios_RKH.Y5Clones_new.png", 
       RKH_PolyvsNot_WeightedCharge, dpi = 600, width = 6, height = 6, bg = "white")
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Charge_Ratios_RKH.Y5Clones_new.svg", 
       RKH_PolyvsNot_WeightedCharge, dpi = 600, width = 6, height = 6, bg = "white")


#RKH/Y5 correlation: 
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)


data_dir <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/AUC_ELISA"
files <- list.files(data_dir, pattern = "Processed\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)


Clone_MeanAUC <- all_auc %>%
  group_by(Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_AUC = mean(AUC, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_antigens = sum(!is.na(AUC))
  )

Clone_MeanAUC
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)


# 1. Prepare merged dataset: RKH status + Mean AUC

PlotDF <- Clone_MeanAUC %>%
  dplyr::rename(`Cloning ID` = Clone) %>%   # <- explicitly dplyr rename
  left_join(Clone_Info, by = "Cloning ID") %>%
  mutate(
    RKH_status = ifelse(IGH_cdr3_Y5orRKH == "TRUE", "RKH+", "RKH-"),
    RKH_binary = ifelse(RKH_status == "RKH+", 1, 0)
  )


# 2. Compute point-biserial correlation

pb_test <- cor.test(PlotDF$RKH_binary, PlotDF$Mean_AUC, method = "pearson")
r_pb <- pb_test$estimate
p_val <- pb_test$p.value

r_label <- sprintf("italic(r)[pb] == %.2f", r_pb)
p_label <- sprintf("italic(p) == %.3f", p_val)


# 3. Make the plot



Scaled_ELISA <- scale(AUC_matrix)


Breadth_DF <- data.frame(
  Clone = rownames(Scaled_ELISA),
  Breadth = apply(Scaled_ELISA, 1, function(x) sum(x > 0.5, na.rm = TRUE))
)
Clone_Info <- Clone_Info %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Cloning ID")
Breadth_PlotDF <- Breadth_DF %>%
  dplyr::rename(`Cloning ID` = Clone) %>%
  left_join(Clone_Info, by = "Cloning ID") %>%
  mutate(
    RKH_status = ifelse(IGH_cdr3_Y5orRKH == "TRUE", "Yes", "No"),
    RKH_binary = ifelse(RKH_status == "Yes", 1, 0)
  )
Breadth_PlotDF$RKH_status <- factor(Breadth_PlotDF$RKH_status, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
Breadth_PlotDF$RKH_numeric <- ifelse(Breadth_PlotDF$RKH_status == "No", 1, 2)

pb_test <- cor.test(Breadth_PlotDF$RKH_binary, Breadth_PlotDF$Breadth)
r_pb <- pb_test$estimate
p_val <- pb_test$p.value
Breadth_PlotDF$RKH_numeric <- ifelse(Breadth_PlotDF$RKH_status == "RKH-", 1, 2)

Point_biserial_cor_polyvsrkh <-ggplot(Breadth_PlotDF, aes(x = RKH_status, y = Breadth)) +
  # boxplot
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.55, alpha = 0.7, fill = "grey85", color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  
  # jittered points
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12, size = 2.4, alpha = 0.7,
    aes(color = RKH_status)
  ) +
  
  # regression line
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    aes(x = RKH_numeric, y = Breadth),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    se = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  
  # Annotate statistics
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 1.3,
    y = max(Breadth_PlotDF$Breadth) * 1.02,
    label = sprintf("italic(r)[pb] == %.2f", r_pb),
    parse = TRUE,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 5,
    family = "Arial"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 1.3,
    y = max(Breadth_PlotDF$Breadth) * 0.92,
    label = sprintf("italic(p) == %.3f", p_val),
    parse = TRUE,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 5,
    family = "Arial"
  ) +
  
  # Labels
  labs(
    title = "Polyreactivity Breadth by RKH/Y5 Motif",
    x = "RKH/Y5 Motif",
    y = "Polyreactive Antigen Count"
  ) +
  
  # Clean color palette
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("No" = "gray70", "Yes" = "firebrick"),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  
  # Theme styling
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16
    ),
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      face = "bold", size = 14
    ),
    axis.title.y = element_text(
      face = "bold", size = 14
    ),
    axis.text = element_text(
      size = 12, color = "black"
    ),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Point_biserial_cor_polyvsrkh.png", 
       Point_biserial_cor_polyvsrkh, dpi = 600, width = 5, height = 4, bg = "white")
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
Clone_Info$`Cloning ID`[Clone_Info$`Cloning ID` == "17_18"] <- "79_18"
rkh_auto_AUC <- AUC_matrix[, c("dsDNA", "ssDNA", "PF.hep")] %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Cloning ID") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("dsDNA", "ssDNA", "PF.hep"),
               names_to = "Antigen", values_to = "AUC") %>%
  left_join(Clone_Info, by = "Cloning ID") %>%
  mutate(RKH_status = ifelse(`RKH or Y5` == "Yes", "RKH+", "RKH-"),
       RKH_binary = ifelse(RKH_status == "RKH+", 1, 0),
       RKH_numeric = ifelse(RKH_status == "RKH+", 2, 1))

rkh_auto_AUC$RKH_status <- factor(rkh_auto_AUC$RKH_status, levels = c("RKH-", "RKH+"))

# Wilcoxon test per antigen
rkh_stats <- rkh_auto_AUC %>%
  group_by(Antigen) %>%
  summarise(
    p_val = wilcox.test(AUC ~ RKH_status)$p.value,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      p_val < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_val < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_val < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    ),
    y_pos = max(rkh_auto_AUC$AUC, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05
  )
rkh_auto_AUC$Antigen <- factor(rkh_auto_AUC$Antigen, levels = c("ssDNA", "dsDNA", "PF.hep"))
rkh_AUC_plot <- ggplot(rkh_auto_AUC, aes(x = RKH_status, y = AUC)) +
  
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.55, alpha = 0.75, fill = "grey88",
               color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  
  geom_jitter(aes(color = RKH_status), width = 0.13, size = 2.4, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_signif(
    comparisons = list(c("RKH-", "RKH+")),
    map_signif_level = c("***" = 0.001, "**" = 0.01, "*" = 0.05, "ns" = 1),
    test = "wilcox.test",
    textsize = 5,
    fontface = "bold",
    tip_length = 0.02
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Antigen, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.2)))+
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("RKH-" = "gray50", "RKH+" = "firebrick"), guide = "none") +
  
  labs(title = "AUC by RKH/Y5 Motif", x = "RKH/Y5 Motif", y = "AUC") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 1),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/rkh_AUC_autoantigen.png",
       rkh_AUC_plot, dpi = 600, width = 3.5, height = 8, bg = "white")
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/rkh_AUC_autoantigen.svg",
       rkh_AUC_plot, dpi = 600, width = 3.5, height = 8, bg = "white")


#Compute similarity index of HCDR3s
library(Biostrings)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
auc_clones <- rownames(AUC_matrix)
Charge_DF <- CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Cloning ID` %in% auc_clones) %>%  # only clones in ELISA panel
  dplyr::group_by(`Cloning ID`) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    charge_ratio = mean(charge_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),  # or first(charge_ratio)
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Clone = `Cloning ID`)
Clone_CDR3 <- CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Cloning ID` %in% Charge_DF$Clone) %>%   # <-- filter to desired clones
  dplyr::group_by(`Cloning ID`) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    CDR3 = dplyr::first(IGH_junction_aa),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
seqs <- Clone_CDR3$CDR3
clone_ids <- Clone_CDR3$`Cloning ID`
seqSet <- AAStringSet(seqs)
names(seqSet) <- clone_ids


# Extract vectors
clone_ids <- Clone_CDR3$`Cloning ID`
seqs <- Clone_CDR3$CDR3

compute_identity <- function(seq1, seq2) {
  aln <- pairwiseAlignment(seq1, seq2, substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
                           gapOpening = -10, gapExtension = -1,
                           scoreOnly = FALSE)
  
  # percent identity = matches / alignment length
  pid <- pid(aln, type = "PID1")  # or "local"
  return(pid)
}
n <- length(seqSet)
Similarity_Matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = n, ncol = n,
                            dimnames = list(clone_ids, clone_ids))

for (i in 1:n) {
  for (j in i:n) {
    pid_val <- compute_identity(seqSet[i], seqSet[j])
    Similarity_Matrix[i, j] <- pid_val
    Similarity_Matrix[j, i] <- pid_val
  }
}
library(pheatmap)

pheatmap(
  Similarity_Matrix,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#FFF5F0", "#CB181D"))(100),
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  border_color = "white",
  cellwidth = 12,
  cellheight = 12,
  fontsize = 9,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 8,
  
  # ⭐ ADD THIS:
  display_numbers = round(Similarity_Matrix, 0),   # or 0 decimals, or 2
  
  number_color = "black",      # color of text
  number_size = 4,             # text size inside cells
  
  legend = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = TRUE,
  main = "HCDR3 Similarity Index",
  treeheight_row = 30,
  treeheight_col = 30,
  
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HCDR3_Simindex.pdf"
)

library(dplyr)
library(Biostrings)
library(pheatmap)

HighClone_Charge_DF <- CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Cloning ID` %in% high_clone_names) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(`Cloning ID`) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    high_charge_ratio = mean(charge_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Clone = `Cloning ID`)

HighClone_HC_CDR3 <- CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Cloning ID` %in% HighClone_Charge_DF$Clone) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(`Cloning ID`) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    High_HC_CDR3 = dplyr::first(IGH_junction_aa),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

hc_high_seqs <- HighClone_HC_CDR3$High_HC_CDR3
hc_high_ids  <- HighClone_HC_CDR3$`Cloning ID`

hc_high_seqSet <- AAStringSet(hc_high_seqs)
names(hc_high_seqSet) <- hc_high_ids

compute_identity_hc_high <- function(seq1, seq2) {
  aln <- pairwiseAlignment(
    seq1,
    seq2,
    substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
    gapOpening = -10,
    gapExtension = -1,
    scoreOnly = FALSE
  )
  
  pid(aln, type = "PID1")
}

hc_high_n <- length(hc_high_seqSet)

HC_high_similarity_matrix <- matrix(
  0,
  nrow = hc_high_n,
  ncol = hc_high_n,
  dimnames = list(hc_high_ids, hc_high_ids)
)

for (i in 1:hc_high_n) {
  for (j in i:hc_high_n) {
    hc_high_pid_val <- compute_identity_hc_high(hc_high_seqSet[i], hc_high_seqSet[j])
    HC_high_similarity_matrix[i, j] <- hc_high_pid_val
    HC_high_similarity_matrix[j, i] <- hc_high_pid_val
  }
}

pheatmap(
  HC_high_similarity_matrix,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#FFF5F0", "#CB181D"))(100),
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  border_color = "white",
  cellwidth = 12,
  cellheight = 12,
  fontsize = 9,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 8,
  
  display_numbers = round(HC_high_similarity_matrix, 0),
  number_color = "black",
  number_size = 4,
  
  legend = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = TRUE,
  main = "HCDR3 Similarity Index (High Clones)",
  treeheight_row = 30,
  treeheight_col = 30,
  
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HCDR3_Simindex_highClones.pdf"
)






dist_mat <- as.dist(100 - Similarity_Matrix)  # convert similarity to distance
hc <- hclust(dist_mat, method = "average")

dist_mat <- as.dist(100 - Similarity_Matrix)
hc <- hclust(dist_mat, method = "complete")

library(dendextend)

dend <- as.dendrogram(hc)
dend <- hang.dendrogram(dend, hang = 0.1)    # tidy leaves

dend <- dend %>%
  set("branches_lwd", 2) %>%
  set("labels_cex", 0.7)

pdf("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HCDR3_Dendro.pdf", width = 5, height = 4)
plot(dend, 
     main = "HCDR3 Dendrogram",

dev.off()

           width = 5, height = 4, horizontal = FALSE, paper = "special")

# ggplot dendrogram

  geom_segment(data = dend_data$segments,
               aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
               linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_text(data = dend_data$labels,
            aes(x = x, y = y - 0.02 * max(dist_mat), label = label),

    title = "HCDR3 Similarity Dendrogram",

  ) +

    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

HCDR3_Dendro
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdendro)
library(dendextend)

librlibrary(dendextend)
library(ggdendro)
library(ggplot2)

# 1. Rebuild dendrogram from hclust
dend <- as.dendrogram(hc)

# 2. Style dendrogram
dend <- dend %>%
  set("branches_lwd", 1.2) %>%   # thicker lines
  set("labels_cex", 0.9) %>%     # label size
  set("labels_col", "black")     # label color

# 3. Extract TRUE coordinates (use ggdendro!)
dd <- ggdendro::dendro_data(dend, type = "rectangle")

# 4. Add spacing under labels
offset <- max(dd$segments$y) * 0.08

# 5. Build final ggplot dendrogram
HCDR3_Dendro <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = dd$segments,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    linewidth = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = dd$labels,
    aes(x = x, y = y - offset, label = label),
    fontface = "bold",
    family = "Arial",
    size = 3.4
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Similarity Dendrogram",
    y = "Distance (1 - similarity)",
    x = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, family = "Arial", face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "Arial")
  )

HCDR3_Dendro

LC_CDR3_CloneSeqs <- Clone_Cell_IDs %>%
  inner_join(Metadata, by = "Cell.ID") %>%
  select(Cell.ID, IGL_cdr3, `Cloning ID`)
library(Biostrings)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(pheatmap)


# 1. Extract LC CDR3 sequences for the filtered clones

LC_Clone_CDR3 <- LC_CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Cloning ID` %in% auc_clones) %>%     # same filtering rule
  dplyr::group_by(`Cloning ID`) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    LC_CDR3 = dplyr::first(IGL_cdr3),                      # <-- use LC CDR3
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Pull sequences + IDs
lc_seqs <- LC_Clone_CDR3$LC_CDR3
lc_ids  <- LC_Clone_CDR3$`Cloning ID`

# Convert to AAStringSet
lc_seqSet <- AAStringSet(lc_seqs)
names(lc_seqSet) <- lc_ids


# 2. Identity function (same scoring matrix + params)

compute_identity <- function(seq1, seq2) {
  aln <- pairwiseAlignment(seq1, seq2,
                           substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
                           gapOpening = -10,
                           gapExtension = -1,
                           scoreOnly = FALSE)
  pid(aln, type = "PID1")
}


# 3. Build similarity matrix

n <- length(lc_seqSet)
LC_Similarity_Matrix <- matrix(0,
                               nrow = n,
                               ncol = n,
                               dimnames = list(lc_ids, lc_ids))

for (i in 1:n) {
  for (j in i:n) {
    pid_val <- compute_identity(lc_seqSet[i], lc_seqSet[j])
    LC_Similarity_Matrix[i, j] <- pid_val
    LC_Similarity_Matrix[j, i] <- pid_val
  }
}


pheatmap(
  LC_Similarity_Matrix,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#FFF5F0", "#00796B"))(100),
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  border_color = "white",
  cellwidth = 12,
  cellheight = 12,
  fontsize = 9,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 8,
  
  display_numbers = round(LC_Similarity_Matrix, 0),
  number_color = "black",
  number_size = 4,
  
  legend = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = TRUE,
  main = "LCDR3 Similarity Index",
  treeheight_row = 30,
  treeheight_col = 30,
  
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/LCDR3_Simindex_withNumbers.pdf"
)

library(dplyr)
library(Biostrings)
library(pheatmap)

# 1. Build LC clone CDR3 table using high_clone_names
LC_highClone_CDR3 <- LC_CDR3_CloneSeqs %>%
  dplyr::filter(`Cloning ID` %in% high_clone_names) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(`Cloning ID`) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    LC_high_CDR3 = dplyr::first(IGL_cdr3),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Pull sequences + IDs
lc_high_seqs <- LC_highClone_CDR3$LC_high_CDR3
lc_high_ids  <- LC_highClone_CDR3$`Cloning ID`

# Convert to AAStringSet
lc_high_seqSet <- AAStringSet(lc_high_seqs)
names(lc_high_seqSet) <- lc_high_ids


# 2. Identity function (renamed)
compute_identity_lc_high <- function(seq1, seq2) {
  aln <- pairwiseAlignment(
    seq1, seq2,
    substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
    gapOpening = -10,
    gapExtension = -1,
    scoreOnly = FALSE
  )
  pid(aln, type = "PID1")
}


# 3. Build similarity matrix
n_high <- length(lc_high_seqSet)

LC_high_similarity_matrix <- matrix(
  0,
  nrow = n_high,
  ncol = n_high,
  dimnames = list(lc_high_ids, lc_high_ids)
)

for (i in 1:n_high) {
  for (j in i:n_high) {
    pid_val <- compute_identity_lc_high(lc_high_seqSet[i], lc_high_seqSet[j])
    LC_high_similarity_matrix[i, j] <- pid_val
    LC_high_similarity_matrix[j, i] <- pid_val
  }
}


# 4. Heatmap
pheatmap(
  LC_high_similarity_matrix,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("#FFF5F0", "#00796B"))(100),
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  border_color = "white",
  cellwidth = 12,
  cellheight = 12,
  fontsize = 9,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  fontsize_col = 8,
  
  display_numbers = round(LC_high_similarity_matrix, 0),
  number_color = "black",
  number_size = 4,
  
  legend = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  show_colnames = TRUE,
  main = "LCDR3 Similarity Index (High Clones)",
  treeheight_row = 30,
  treeheight_col = 30,
  
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/LCDR3_Simindex_highClones.pdf"
)
#---- Mutation comparisons between poly and other clones ----
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggdist)

Muts_CloneSeqs <- Clone_Cell_IDs %>%
  inner_join(Metadata, by = "Cell.ID") %>%
  transmute(
    Clone_ID = as.character(`Cloning ID`),
    IGH_mu_freq = as.numeric(IGH_mu_freq),
    IGL_mu_freq = as.numeric(IGL_mu_freq)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = if_else(
      Clone_ID %in% as.character(High_clones$Clone_ID),
      "Polyreactive clones",
      "Other clones"
    )
  )

mutation_clone_summary <- Muts_CloneSeqs %>%
  group_by(Clone_ID, Group) %>%
  summarise(
    IGH_mu_freq = mean(IGH_mu_freq, na.rm = TRUE),
    IGL_mu_freq = mean(IGL_mu_freq, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

mutation_long_df <- mutation_clone_summary %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(IGH_mu_freq, IGL_mu_freq),
    names_to = "Chain",
    values_to = "Mutation_Frequency"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Chain = recode(
      Chain,
      IGH_mu_freq = "Heavy chain",
      IGL_mu_freq = "Light chain"
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Other clones", "Polyreactive clones"))
  )

mutation_stats_df <- mutation_long_df %>%
  group_by(Chain) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = wilcox.test(
      Mutation_Frequency ~ Group,
      exact = FALSE
    )$p.value,
    y_pos = max(Mutation_Frequency, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.12,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )

mutation_frequency_plot <- ggplot(
  mutation_long_df,
  aes(x = Group, y = Mutation_Frequency, fill = Group)
) +
  stat_halfeye(
  adjust = 0.7,
  width = 0.65,
  justification = -0.25,
  point_colour = NA,
  alpha = 0.85,
  color = NA
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.18,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    alpha = 0.9,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.08,
    size = 1.8,
    alpha = 0.55,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = mutation_stats_df,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mutation_stats_df,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = y_pos * 1.03, label = p_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Chain, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Other clones" = "grey75",
      "Polyreactive clones" = "firebrick"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mutation frequency",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

mutation_frequency_plot
ggsave(
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Polyreactive_vs_Other_Clone_Mutation_Frequency.png",
  plot = mutation_frequency_plot,
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  units = "in", 
  dpi = 600
)
ggsave(
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Polyreactive_vs_Other_Clone_Mutation_Frequency.svg",
  plot = mutation_frequency_plot,
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  units = "in", 
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r Generating Structural Figures}
library(Biostrings)

# Create FASTA lines with headers and sequences

# Write to file
writeLines(fasta_lines, "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/HL_Spike_sequences3.fasta")
pf4_monomer <- "EAEEDGDLQCLCVKTTSQVRPRHITSLEVIKAGPHCPTAQLIATLKNGRKICLDLQAPLYKKIIKKLLES"
fasta_lines <- unlist(lapply(seq_len(nrow(Filtered_HCLCSeqs)), function(i) {
  hc <- Filtered_HCLCSeqs$`HC AA Sequence`[i]
  lc <- Filtered_HCLCSeqs$`LC AA Sequence`[i]
  clone_id <- gsub("\\s+", "_", Filtered_HCLCSeqs$`Clone ID`[i])

  # 1. Spike trimer: HC:LC:Spike:Spike:Spike
  spike_seq_group <- paste(rep(spike_seq, 3), collapse = ":")
  spike_entry <- paste(hc, lc, spike_seq_group, sep = ":")
  spike_header <- paste0(">Spike_", clone_id)

  # 2. PF4 tetramer: HC:LC:PF4:PF4:PF4:PF4
  pf4_seq_group <- paste(rep(pf4_monomer, 4), collapse = ":")
  pf4_entry <- paste(hc, lc, pf4_seq_group, sep = ":")
  pf4_header <- paste0(">PF4_", clone_id)

  # Return as FASTA blocks
  c(spike_header, spike_entry, pf4_header, pf4_entry)
}))

# Write to FASTA

  "#!/usr/bin/env python",
  "# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-",

#Generation of CDR3 Locations for Pymol

merged_df <- Clone_Info %>%
  inner_join(Filtered_HCLCSeqs, by = c("Cloning ID" = "Clone ID"))
get_cdr3_pos <- function(full_seq, cdr3_seq) {
  start <- str_locate(full_seq, cdr3_seq)[, 1]
  end <- str_locate(full_seq, cdr3_seq)[, 2]
  return(list(start = start, end = end))
}
merged_df <- merged_df %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    HC_CDR3_start = get_cdr3_pos(`HC AA Sequence`, junction_aa)$start,
    HC_CDR3_end   = get_cdr3_pos(`HC AA Sequence`, junction_aa)$end,
    LC_CDR3_start = get_cdr3_pos(`LC AA Sequence`, IGL_cdr3)$start,
    LC_CDR3_end   = get_cdr3_pos(`LC AA Sequence`, IGL_cdr3)$end
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Filtered_HCLCSeqs <- HC_LC_CloneSeqs %>%

Selected_clones <- Selected_clones %>%

library(tidyverse)

# --- 1. Create output directory ---
output_dir <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/igfold_fastas"
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# --- 2. Split H and L sequences ---
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

Selected_clones_split <- Selected_clones %>%
  separate(`H:L`, into = c("Heavy", "Light"), sep = ":", remove = FALSE)

# --- 3. Write each antibody to its own FASTA file (IgFold format) ---
for (i in seq_len(nrow(Selected_clones_split))) {
  clone_name <- if ("Clone_ID" %in% colnames(Selected_clones_split)) {
    Selected_clones_split$Clone_ID[i]
  } else {
    paste0("Clone_", i)
  }
  
  heavy_seq <- Selected_clones_split$Heavy[i]
  light_seq <- Selected_clones_split$Light[i]
  
  # IgFold expects headers to be just ">H" and ">L"
  fasta_content <- paste0(
    ">H\n", heavy_seq, "\n",
    ">L\n", light_seq, "\n"
  )
  
  writeLines(fasta_content, file.path(output_dir, paste0(clone_name, ".fasta")))
}

cat("✅ IgFold-compatible FASTA files written to:", output_dir, "\n")

GermlinevsPatient_Seqs <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Germline_diffs_polyreactiveclones.xlsx")

library(dplyr)

# --- 1. Create output directory ---
output_dir <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/igfold_fastas_germline"
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# --- 2. Extract sequences from GermlinevsPatient_Seqs ---
df <- GermlinevsPatient_Seqs

# Columns assumed:
#   Sequence ID
#   LC_AA_Sequence
#   HC_AA_Sequence

# --- 3. Loop and write IgFold-format FASTA files ---
for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
  
  seq_id <- df$`Sequence ID`[i]
  file_name <- paste0("Germ_", seq_id, ".fasta")
  
  lc_seq <- df$LC_AA_Sequence[i]
  hc_seq <- df$HC_AA_Sequence[i]
  
  # Format for IgFold (Heavy first, Light second)
  fasta_text <- paste0(
    ">H\n", hc_seq, "\n",
    ">L\n", lc_seq, "\n"
  )
  
  writeLines(fasta_text, file.path(output_dir, file_name))
}

cat("✅ Germline FASTA files written to:", output_dir, "\n")


library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

cdr_map_df <- LC_ChangeO %>%
  select(cell_id, junction_aa) %>%
  left_join(LC_for_scoper_filtered %>% select(cell_id, Name),
            by = "cell_id")

cdr_map_df <- LC_ChangeO %>%
  select(cell_id, junction_aa) %>%
  left_join(LC_for_scoper_filtered %>% select(cell_id, Name), by = "cell_id") %>%
  # <- add HC AA Sequence from Selected_clones using its 13th column
  left_join(
    Selected_clones %>%
      select(Clone_ID, HC_AA_Sequence = 11),   # 13th column grabbed by position
    by = c("Name" = "Clone_ID")
  )
cdr_numbered <- cdr_map_df %>%
  mutate(
    junction_aa = str_replace_all(junction_aa, "\\s+", ""),
    HC_AA_Sequence = str_replace_all(HC_AA_Sequence, "\\s+", "")
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    match_info = list(str_locate_all(HC_AA_Sequence, junction_aa)[[1]]),
    start_pos  = ifelse(length(match_info) > 0 && nrow(match_info) > 0,
                        match_info[1, 1], NA_integer_),
    end_pos    = ifelse(length(match_info) > 0 && nrow(match_info) > 0,
                        match_info[1, 2], NA_integer_),
    found      = !is.na(start_pos)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(match_status = if_else(found, "Matched", "Not Found"))

# Preview numbering results
cdr_numbered %>%
  select(cell_id, Name, junction_aa, start_pos, end_pos, match_status) %>%
  head()
```

```{r Calculating Interface Charge}

# Install if needed:
# install.packages("bio3d")
# install.packages("fields")

library(bio3d)
library(fields)


pdb_file   <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Spike_and_PF4_Results/Spike_1_unrelaxed_rank_001_alphafold2_multimer_v3_model_4_seed_000.pdb"
ab_chains  <- c("A", "B")   # antibody heavy = A, light = B
cutoff_Ang <- 4.0           # interface distance cutoff (Å)
his_charge <- 0             # set to 0 (neutral) or 1 (positive) depending on pH


# Helper to assign charges
formal_charge <- function(resid, his=0) {
  resid <- toupper(resid)
  if (resid %in% c("ARG","LYS")) return(1)
  if (resid %in% c("ASP","GLU")) return(-1)
  if (resid %in% c("HIS","HSE","HSD","HSP")) return(his)
  return(0)
}

unique_res_df <- function(atom_df) {
  unique(atom_df[, c("chain","resno","resid")])
}

pdb <- read.pdb(pdb_file)

# Keep only protein atoms
prot_sel <- atom.select(pdb, "protein")
pdb_prot <- trim.pdb(pdb, prot_sel)
atoms <- pdb_prot$atom

is_ab   <- atoms$chain %in% ab_chains
ab_atoms <- atoms[is_ab, ]
ag_atoms <- atoms[!is_ab, ]

if (nrow(ab_atoms) == 0 || nrow(ag_atoms) == 0) {
  stop("Check chain IDs: could not split antibody (chains A,B) from antigen (other chains).")
}

ab_xyz <- as.matrix(ab_atoms[, c("x","y","z")])
ag_xyz <- as.matrix(ag_atoms[, c("x","y","z")])

chunk_size <- 5000
near_pairs <- list()

for (i in seq(1, nrow(ab_xyz), by=chunk_size)) {
  i_end <- min(i + chunk_size - 1, nrow(ab_xyz))
  d_block <- rdist(ab_xyz[i:i_end, ], ag_xyz)  # distance matrix
  idx <- which(d_block <= cutoff_Ang, arr.ind = TRUE)
  if (nrow(idx) > 0) {
    idx[,1] <- idx[,1] + i - 1
    near_pairs[[length(near_pairs)+1]] <- idx
  }
}
near_pairs <- if (length(near_pairs)) do.call(rbind, near_pairs) else matrix(numeric(0), ncol=2)

if (nrow(near_pairs) == 0) {
  stop("No interface atoms found at cutoff = ", cutoff_Ang, " Å. Try a larger cutoff (e.g. 5.0).")
}

ab_iface_atoms <- ab_atoms[unique(near_pairs[,1]), ]
ag_iface_atoms <- ag_atoms[unique(near_pairs[,2]), ]

ab_iface_res <- unique_res_df(ab_iface_atoms)
ag_iface_res <- unique_res_df(ag_iface_atoms)

ab_iface_res$charge <- vapply(ab_iface_res$resid, formal_charge, numeric(1), his=his_charge)
ag_iface_res$charge <- vapply(ag_iface_res$resid, formal_charge, numeric(1), his=his_charge)

ab_total_charge <- sum(ab_iface_res$charge)
ag_total_charge <- sum(ag_iface_res$charge)

# ---- Summaries ----
cat("Interface distance cutoff:", cutoff_Ang, "Å\n")
cat("Antibody interface residues:", nrow(ab_iface_res), " | Net formal charge:", ab_total_charge, "\n")
cat("Antigen  interface residues:", nrow(ag_iface_res), " | Net formal charge:", ag_total_charge, "\n\n")

# Per-chain breakdown for antibody
ab_iface_by_chain <- aggregate(charge ~ chain, data=ab_iface_res, sum)
cat("Antibody chain breakdown (net formal charge):\n")
print(ab_iface_by_chain)

# ---- Save to CSV ----
out_dir <- dirname(pdb_file)
write.csv(ab_iface_res, file=file.path(out_dir, "interface_residues_antibody.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
write.csv(ag_iface_res, file=file.path(out_dir, "interface_residues_antigen.csv"), row.names=FALSE)

cat("\nResults written to:\n",
    file.path(out_dir, "interface_residues_antibody.csv"), "\n",
    file.path(out_dir, "interface_residues_antigen.csv"), "\n")

















```


```{r Antibody mutants analysis}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)

seq_df <- tribble(
  ~Clone, ~Type, ~Sequence,
  "14_10", "Patient-derived", "CARRARSRLGFYDTSGYYSHNAIDIW",
  "14_10", "Mutant",   "CARRARSRLGFYNTSGYYSHNAIDIW",
  
  "15_16", "Patient-derived", "CARDFLYSSAHYYYYGMDVW",
  "15_16", "Mutant",   "CARNFLYSSAHYYYYGMDVW",
  
  "14_13", "Patient-derived", "CTRGARSRAQVRYNNYFAPW",
  "14_13", "Mutant",   "CTRGAASAAQVAYNNYFAPW",
  
  "14_22", "Patient-derived", "CARGRTTRTLSGYDWKSYHSYYMDVW",
  "14_22", "Mutant",   "CARGRTTATLSGYDWASYASYYMDVW"
)

get_charge <- function(aa) {
  case_when(
    aa %in% c("K", "R", "H") ~ "Positive",
    aa %in% c("D", "E") ~ "Negative",
    TRUE ~ "Neutral"
  )
}

seq_long <- seq_df %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    AA = list(str_split(Sequence, "")[[1]]),
    Position = list(seq_along(AA))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  unnest(c(Position, AA))

seq_check <- seq_long %>%
  dplyr::count(Clone, Type, name = "Length") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Type, values_from = Length)

if (any(seq_check$`Patient-derived` != seq_check$Mutant)) {
  stop("At least one clone has Original and Mutant HCDR3s of different lengths. Alignment-by-position needs to be adjusted first.")
}

seq_plot_df <- seq_long %>%
  select(Clone, Type, Position, AA) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Type, values_from = AA) %>%
  mutate(Mutated = `Patient-derived` != Mutant) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(`Patient-derived`, Mutant),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "AA"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Type = factor(Type, levels = c("Mutant", "Patient-derived")),
    Clone = factor(Clone, levels = c("14_10", "15_16", "14_13", "14_22")),
    Charge = get_charge(AA),
    Display_Charge = ifelse(Mutated, Charge, "Unchanged"),
    Label = ifelse(Mutated, AA, NA_character_),
    TextColor = case_when(
      Mutated & Charge %in% c("Positive", "Negative") ~ "white",
      Mutated & Charge == "Neutral" ~ "black",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

label_df <- seq_plot_df %>%
  filter(Mutated)

if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  windowsFonts(Arial = windowsFont("Arial"))
  base_family <- "Arial"
} else {
  base_family <- "sans"
}

Mutations_Plot <- ggplot(seq_plot_df, aes(x = Position, y = Type)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = Display_Charge),
    shape = 21,
    size = 6,
    stroke = 0.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(label = Label, color = TextColor),
    family = base_family,
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.5,
    hjust = 0.5,
    vjust = 0.4
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Clone, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Positive" = "blue",
      "Negative" = "red",
      "Neutral" = "grey80",
      "Unchanged" = "white"
    ),
    breaks = c("Positive", "Negative", "Neutral"),
    name = "Residue\n charge"
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  labs(
    x = "HCDR3 position",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = base_family),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  )

ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Mutations_Locationinclones.png",
  Mutations_Plot,
  bg = "white",
  width = 14,
  height = 2.5,
  dpi = 600
)
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Mutations_Locationinclones.svg",
  Mutations_Plot,
  bg = "white",
  width = 14,
  height = 2.5,
  dpi = 600
)

  mutate(Antigen = "ssDNA")

dsDNA <- read_excel("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Mutants/dsDNA Mutant AUC.xlsx") %>%

omicron <- read_excel("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Mutants/Omicron-His Mutant AUC.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(Antigen = "Omicron")

df_all <- bind_rows(ssDNA, dsDNA, omicron, spike)
df_clean <- df_all %>%
  mutate(
    Mean_OD = (OD1 + OD2) / 2,
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Patient-derived", "Mutant")),
    Clone = as.factor(Clone),
    Antigen = as.factor(Antigen)
  )
expected_direction <- c(
  "14_22" = -1,
  "14_10" = +1,
  "15_16" = -1,
  "14_13" = +1
)
df_delta <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(Clone, Antigen, Concentration) %>%
  summarise(
    Patient = mean(Mean_OD[Group == "Patient-derived"]),
    Mutant = mean(Mean_OD[Group == "Mutant"]),
    Delta = Mutant - Patient,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Expected = expected_direction[Clone],
    Aligned_Delta = Delta * Expected
  )

df_delta <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(Clone, Antigen, Concentration) %>%
  summarise(
    Patient = mean(Mean_OD[Group == "Patient-derived"]),
    Mutant = mean(Mean_OD[Group == "Mutant"]),
    Delta = Mutant - Patient,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Expected = case_when(
      Clone %in% c("14_22", "14_13") ~ "Loss",
      Clone %in% c("14_10", "15_16") ~ "Gain"
    )
  )
loss_data <- df_delta %>%
  filter(Expected == "Loss")

wilcox.test(
  loss_data$Delta,
  mu = 0,
  alternative = "less"
)
gain_data <- df_delta %>%
  filter(Expected == "Gain")

wilcox.test(
  gain_data$Delta,
  mu = 0,
  alternative = "greater"
)
binom.test(
  sum(loss_data$Delta < 0),
  nrow(loss_data),
  p = 0.5,
  alternative = "greater"
)
binom.test(
  sum(gain_data$Delta > 0),
  nrow(gain_data),
  p = 0.5,
  alternative = "greater"
)
stat_labels <- data.frame(
  Expected = c("Loss", "Gain"),
  x = c(2.5, 2.5),
  y = c(
    max(df_delta$Delta[df_delta$Expected == "Loss"]) * 0.95,
    max(df_delta$Delta[df_delta$Expected == "Gain"]) * 0.95
  ),
  label = c("****", "****")
)

  mutate(
    Antigen = recode(
      Antigen,

    )

df_delta <- df_delta %>%

      Antigen,
      levels = c("dsDNA", "ssDNA", "Omicron Spike", "Wuhan Spike")
    )
  )
df_delta <- df_delta %>%

    )

Mutant_analysis_deltaeachconcentration <- ggplot(df_delta, aes(x = Antigen, y = Delta, color = Clone, shape = Expected)) +

p_to_stars <- function(p) {
  case_when(
    p < 0.0001 ~ "****",
    p < 0.001 ~ "***",
    p < 0.01 ~ "**",
    p < 0.05 ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ "ns"
  )
}

  Expected = c("Loss", "Gain"),
  Antigen = c("Omicron Spike", "Omicron Spike"),

    p_to_stars(gain_p)
  )
)

)

) +
```

```{r Germline vs Patient derived analysis}
#---- Observed Mutations between Pat and Germ ----
LC_CDR_INFO_GERM <- read_excel("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/Cloning/Generating Germlines of Clones/Kappa IMGT.xls", sheet = "AA-sequences")
HC_CDR_INFO_GERM <- read_excel("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/Cloning/Generating Germlines of Clones/Heavy IMGT.xls", sheet = "AA-sequences")


LC_CDR_INFO_PAT <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/Cloning/Excel Files for Second 100 clones/Cloning_3 IgK IMGT info.xlsx", sheet = "AA-sequences")
HC_CDR_INFO_PAT <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/Cloning/Excel Files for Second 100 clones/Cloning_3 IgH IMGT Info.xlsx", sheet = "AA-sequences")

aa_charge <- c(
  K = +1, R = +1, H = +1,
  D = -1, E = -1,
  A = 0, C = 0, F = 0, G = 0, I = 0,
  L = 0, M = 0, N = 0, P = 0, Q = 0,
  S = 0, T = 0, V = 0, W = 0, Y = 0,
  "." = 0  # IMGT gap
)
extract_cdrs <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::select(Sequence_ID = `Sequence ID`,
                  CDR1 = `CDR1-IMGT`,
                  CDR2 = `CDR2-IMGT`,
                  CDR3 = `CDR3-IMGT`)
}
compute_charge <- function(seq) {
  # seq <- gsub("\\.", "", seq)  # uncomment if you want to REMOVE IMGT gaps
  chars <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  sum(aa_charge[chars], na.rm = TRUE)
}
merge_cdr_charge <- function(germ_df, pat_df) {
  
  germ_clean <- extract_cdrs(germ_df)
  pat_clean  <- extract_cdrs(pat_df)
  
  # Filter patient data to only those Sequence_IDs present in germline
  pat_clean <- pat_clean %>%
    dplyr::filter(Sequence_ID %in% germ_clean$Sequence_ID)
  
  merged <- dplyr::left_join(
    pat_clean,
    germ_clean,
    by = "Sequence_ID",
    suffix = c("_PAT", "_GERM")
  )
  
  merged <- merged %>%
    mutate(
      Charge_CDR1_PAT  = sapply(CDR1_PAT, compute_charge),
      Charge_CDR2_PAT  = sapply(CDR2_PAT, compute_charge),
      Charge_CDR3_PAT  = sapply(CDR3_PAT, compute_charge),
      
      Charge_CDR1_GERM = sapply(CDR1_GERM, compute_charge),
      Charge_CDR2_GERM = sapply(CDR2_GERM, compute_charge),
      Charge_CDR3_GERM = sapply(CDR3_GERM, compute_charge),
      
      Delta_CDR1 = Charge_CDR1_PAT - Charge_CDR1_GERM,
      Delta_CDR2 = Charge_CDR2_PAT - Charge_CDR2_GERM,
      Delta_CDR3 = Charge_CDR3_PAT - Charge_CDR3_GERM,
      
      Delta_Total = Delta_CDR1 + Delta_CDR2 + Delta_CDR3
    )
  
  return(merged)
}

LC_merged <- merge_cdr_charge(LC_CDR_INFO_GERM, LC_CDR_INFO_PAT)
HC_merged <- merge_cdr_charge(HC_CDR_INFO_GERM, HC_CDR_INFO_PAT)


plot_charge <- function(df, column_name, title_text) {
  ggplot(df, aes_string(x = "Sequence_ID", y = column_name)) +
    geom_col(fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid = element_blank()
    ) +
    ylab("Net Charge Change") +
    ggtitle(title_text)
}

make_long_df <- function(df, chain_name) {
  df %>%
    select(Sequence_ID,
           Delta_CDR1, Delta_CDR2, Delta_CDR3, Delta_Total) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = starts_with("Delta"),
      names_to = "CDR",
      values_to = "Charge_Change"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      CDR = recode(CDR,
                   Delta_CDR1 = "CDR1",
                   Delta_CDR2 = "CDR2",
                   Delta_CDR3 = "CDR3",
                   Delta_Total = "Total"),
      Chain = chain_name,
      Direction = if_else(Charge_Change > 0, "Gain", 
                          if_else(Charge_Change < 0, "Loss", "No Change"))
    )
}

LC_long <- make_long_df(LC_merged, "Light Chain")
HC_long <- make_long_df(HC_merged, "Heavy Chain")

Combined_long <- bind_rows(LC_long, HC_long)

library(ggplot2)

CDRs_HC_LC_GainvsLoss <- ggplot(Combined_long, aes(x = Sequence_ID, y = Charge_Change, fill = Direction)) +
  geom_col(color = "black") +
  
  facet_grid(Chain ~ CDR, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  
  # Updated colors to match your amino acid figure
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Gain" = "blue",        # gain = blue
    "Loss" = "red",         # loss = red
    "No Change" = "gray70"  # neutral
  )) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  ylab("Net Charge Change") +
  xlab("Sequence ID") +
  
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    
    # Make bottom x axis labels bold
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12)
  )


ggsave(
  "C:/Users/Nwitman/Box/Polyreactive Images/CDRs_HC_LC_GainvsLoss.png",
  CDRs_HC_LC_GainvsLoss,
  dpi = 600,
  width = 10,
  height = 4,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/CDRs_HC_LC_GainvsLoss.svg",
  CDRs_HC_LC_GainvsLoss,
  dpi = 600,
  width = 10,
  height = 4,
  bg = "white"
)

# ---- AUC Germline Analysis ---- 


Spike_df <- read_excel("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/Spike Germline AUC 4.2.26.xlsx")  # <-- update filename if different

Spike_df <- Spike_df %>%
  mutate(OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE))

trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}

auc_by_clone_Spike <- Spike_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, scale = "log10"),
            .groups = "drop")

auc_summary_Spike <- auc_by_clone_Spike %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_AUC = mean(AUC, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_AUC   = sd(AUC, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_clones = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

auc_test_Spike <- wilcox.test(AUC ~ Group, data = auc_by_clone_Spike, exact = FALSE)
auc_test_Spike
stats_spike <- data.frame(
  group1 = "Germline",
  group2 = "Patient-derived",
  p = auc_test_Spike$p.value,
  p.adj = auc_test_Spike$p.value,  # same, since only one test
  p.adj.signif = ifelse(auc_test_Spike$p.value < 0.001, "***",
                        ifelse(auc_test_Spike$p.value < 0.01, "**",
                               ifelse(auc_test_Spike$p.value < 0.05, "*", "ns"))),
  y.position = max(auc_by_clone_Spike$AUC) * 1.05  # place annotation 5% above max
)

Spike_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",    # tan
                  "Patient-derived" = "#800000")   # maroon

spike_germvspatientggplot <- ggplot(auc_by_clone_Spike, aes(x = Group, y = AUC, fill = Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.6,
    color = "black",
    size = 1.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = Spike_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Spike",
    x = NULL,
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/spike_germvspatientggplot.png",
       spike_germvspatientggplot,
       dpi = 600,
       width = 3.25,
       height = 4,
       bg = "white")

#Generation with stats

pval <- auc_test_Spike$p.value
label_text <- ifelse(pval < 0.001, "***",
                     ifelse(pval < 0.01, "**",
                            ifelse(pval < 0.05, "*", "ns")))

# Position parameters
y_bracket <- max(auc_by_clone_Spike$AUC) * 1.05
x_start <- 1
x_end <- 2
x_mid <- mean(c(x_start, x_end))

Spike_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C", "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

spike_germvspatientggplot <- ggplot(auc_by_clone_Spike, aes(x = Group, y = AUC, fill = Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, color = "black", size = 1.3, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, size = 3, alpha = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_start, xend = x_end, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket), size = 1) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_start, xend = x_start, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.02*y_bracket), size = 1) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_end, xend = x_end, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.02*y_bracket), size = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = x_mid, y = y_bracket * 1.02, label = label_text, size = 6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = Spike_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Spike",
    x = NULL,
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/spike_germvspatientggplot.png",
       spike_germvspatientggplot,
       dpi = 600,
       width = 3.25,
       height = 4,
       bg = "white")

Combined_AUC_GermvsPat <- dsDNA_germvspatient | pf4hep_germvspatientggplot | spike_germvspatientggplot


ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/Combined_AUC_GermvsPat.png",

auc_by_clone_Spike <- Spike_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, scale = "log10"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    Group = trimws(Group),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )
paired_df <- auc_by_clone_Spike %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()    # only keep clones that have both versions
paired_test <- wilcox.test(
  paired_df$Germline,
  paired_df$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

paired_test
paired_p <- paired_test$p.value
p_label <- ifelse(paired_p < 0.001, "***",
                  ifelse(paired_p < 0.01,  "**",
                         ifelse(paired_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))
library(ggplot2)

# define x positions to bring groups closer
x_germ  <- 1
x_pat   <- 1.4      # closer together
x_mid   <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

# define colors
Spike_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C", "Patient-derived" = "#800000")
y_max <- max(paired_df$Germline, paired_df$`Patient-derived`)
y_bracket <- y_max * 1.08


Spike_plot <- ggplot(paired_df) +
  
  # paired connection lines
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_germ,  xend = x_pat,
                   y = Germline,
                   yend = `Patient-derived`),
               color = "gray40", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # group points
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = Spike_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = Spike_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  

annotate("segment",
         x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
         y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket,
         size = 1) +
  
annotate("segment",
         x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
         y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.015*y_bracket,
         size = 1) +
  

annotate("segment",
         x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
         y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.015*y_bracket,
         size = 1) +
  

annotate("text",
         x = x_mid,
         y = y_bracket * 1.03,
         label = 0.0537,
         size = 7, fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Spike",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Spike_germAUC.png",
  Spike_plot,
  width = 4.67,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Spike_germAUC.svg",
  Spike_plot,
  width = 4.67,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
paired_df <- paired_df %>%
  mutate(
    Germline_Lower = if_else(Germline < `Patient-derived`, "Yes", "No")
  )

paired_df_spike <- auc_by_clone_Spike %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(
    Germline_Lower = if_else(Germline < `Patient-derived`, "Yes", "No")
  )

Spike_yes_clones <- paired_df_spike %>%
  filter(Germline_Lower == "Yes") %>%
  pull(Clone) %>%
  unique()
# Add a Difference column, then extract increases for "Yes" clones
paired_df_spike_diff <- auc_by_clone_Spike %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(
    Germline_Lower = if_else(Germline < `Patient-derived`, "Yes", "No"),
    Increase = `Patient-derived` - Germline
  )

# Extract only the antibodies that increased, along with how much they increased
Spike_yes_increases <- paired_df_spike_diff %>%
  filter(Germline_Lower == "Yes") %>%
  select(Clone, Germline, `Patient-derived`, Increase)

Spike_yes_increases

Spike_increased_clones <- ggplot(Spike_yes_increases, aes(x = reorder(Clone, Increase), y = Increase)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4DA6FF") +   # greenish blue
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Clone ID",
    y = "OD increase from germline",
    title = "Antibody Increase in Spike Reactivity"
  )
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Spike_gainers.png",
  Spike_increased_clones,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Spike_gainers.svg",
  Spike_increased_clones,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)


S1_df <- read_excel("/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/S1 Domain Germline AUC .xlsx") %>%   # <-- update filename
  mutate(
    Group = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}


S1_auc <- S1_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived")))


S1_paired <- S1_auc %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()


S1_paired_test <- wilcox.test(
  S1_paired$Germline,
  S1_paired$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

S1_p <- S1_paired_test$p.value
S1_star <- ifelse(S1_p < 0.001, "***",
                  ifelse(S1_p < 0.01,  "**",
                         ifelse(S1_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))



# x-axis spacing
x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

# y-position for bracket
S1_ymax <- max(S1_paired$Germline, S1_paired$`Patient-derived`)
S1_ybracket <- S1_ymax * 1.08

# colors
S1_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C", "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

S1_paired_plot <- ggplot(S1_paired) +
  
  # gray paired lines
  geom_segment(aes(
    x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
    y = Germline,
    yend = `Patient-derived`
  ),
  color = "gray40", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # germline points
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = S1_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  # patient-derived points
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = S1_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  # bracket
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = S1_ybracket, yend = S1_ybracket,
           size = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = S1_ybracket, yend = S1_ybracket - 0.015*S1_ybracket,
           size = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = S1_ybracket, yend = S1_ybracket - 0.015*S1_ybracket,
           size = 1) +
  
  # star-only significance label
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = S1_ybracket * 1.03,
           label = S1_star,
           size = 7,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  # x-axis labels
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "S1 Domain",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# show plot
S1_paired_plot
ggsave(
  "/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Polyreactive Images/S1_paired_plot.png",
  S1_paired_plot,
  width = 4.67,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

S1_auc <- S1_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )

S1_paired <- S1_auc %>%
  filter(Clone %in% Spike_yes_clones) %>%   # <---- KEY FILTER
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()   # keeps only clones with both Germline and Patient-derived

S1_paired_test <- wilcox.test(
  S1_paired$Germline,
  S1_paired$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

S1_p <- S1_paired_test$p.value
S1_star <- ifelse(S1_p < 0.001, "***",
                  ifelse(S1_p < 0.01,  "**",
                         ifelse(S1_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))



x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

S1_ymax     <- max(S1_paired$Germline, S1_paired$`Patient-derived`)
S1_ybracket <- S1_ymax * 1.08

S1_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
               "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

S1_paired_plot <- ggplot(S1_paired) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(
    x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
    y = Germline,
    yend = `Patient-derived`
  ),
  color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = S1_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = S1_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = S1_ybracket, yend = S1_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = S1_ybracket, yend = S1_ybracket - 0.015*S1_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = S1_ybracket, yend = S1_ybracket - 0.015*S1_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = S1_ybracket * 1.03,
           label = S1_star,
           size = 7,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "S1 Domain",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

S1_paired_plot

# save plot
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/S1_paired_AUC_plot.png",
       S1_paired_plot,
       dpi = 600,
       width = 4.5,

S2_df <- read_excel("/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/S2 Domain Germline AUC 4.1.26.xlsx")  # <-- update filename if needed

S2_df <- S2_df %>%
  mutate(OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE))

trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}

auc_by_clone_S2 <- S2_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

auc_summary_S2 <- auc_by_clone_S2 %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_AUC = mean(AUC, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_AUC   = sd(AUC, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_clones = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

auc_summary_S2

auc_test_S2 <- wilcox.test(AUC ~ Group, data = auc_by_clone_S2, exact = FALSE)
auc_test_S2

S2_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",      # tan
               "Patient-derived" = "#800000")  # maroon

S2_germvspatient_plot <- ggplot(auc_by_clone_S2, aes(x = Group, y = AUC, fill = Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.6,
    color = "black",
    size = 1.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = S2_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "S2 Domain",
    x = NULL,
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

S2_germvspatient_plot
S2_germvspatient_plot_broken <- S2_germvspatient_plot +
  scale_y_break(c(0.12, 1.45), scales = 0.3) +   # <-- adjust break region
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

p_base <- ggplot(auc_by_clone_S2, aes(x = Group, y = AUC, fill = Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, color = "black", size = 1.3, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, size = 3, alpha = 0.9, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = S2_colors) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  labs(
    title = "S2 Domain",
    x = NULL,
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")
  )

p_low <- p_base +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.12)) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  )

p_high <- p_base +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.4, 1.8)) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank()
  )

S2_ybreak_plot <- p_high / p_low +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 2))  # adjust ratio as desired

S2_ybreak_plot

       S2_germvspatient_plot,

       height = 4,
```
