library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

S2_df <- read_excel(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/S2 Domain Germline AUC 4.1.26.xlsx"
) %>%
  mutate(
    Group   = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )


trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}


S2_auc <- S2_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )

S2_paired <- S2_auc %>%
  filter(Clone %in% Spike_yes_clones) %>%     # <---- KEY FILTER
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()   # keep only clones present in both Germline and Patient-derived


S2_paired_test <- wilcox.test(
  S2_paired$Germline,
  S2_paired$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

S2_p <- S2_paired_test$p.value
S2_star <- ifelse(S2_p < 0.001, "***",
                  ifelse(S2_p < 0.01,  "**",
                         ifelse(S2_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))



x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

S2_ymax     <- max(S2_paired$Germline, S2_paired$`Patient-derived`)
S2_ybracket <- S2_ymax * 1.08

S2_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
               "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

S2_paired_plot <- ggplot(S2_paired) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(
    x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
    y = Germline,
    yend = `Patient-derived`
  ),
  color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = S2_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = S2_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = S2_ybracket, yend = S2_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = S2_ybracket, yend = S2_ybracket - 0.015*S2_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = S2_ybracket, yend = S2_ybracket - 0.015*S2_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = S2_ybracket * 1.03,
           label = S2_star,
           size = 7,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "S2 Domain",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

S2_paired_plot

ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/S2_paired_plot.png",
  S2_paired_plot,
  width = 4.67,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/S2_paired_plot.svg",
  S2_paired_plot,
  width = 4.67,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)


S2_new_df <- read_excel(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/S2 Domain Germline AUC 4.1.26.xlsx"
) %>%
  mutate(
    Group   = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )


trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}


S2_new_auc <- S2_new_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )

S2_new_paired <- S2_new_auc %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()

S2_new_test <- wilcox.test(
  S2_new_paired$Germline,
  S2_new_paired$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

S2_new_p <- S2_new_test$p.value
S2_new_star <- ifelse(S2_new_p < 0.001, "***",
                      ifelse(S2_new_p < 0.01,  "**",
                             ifelse(S2_new_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))


x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

S2_new_ymax     <- max(S2_new_paired$Germline, S2_new_paired$`Patient-derived`)
S2_new_ybracket <- S2_new_ymax * 1.08

S2_new_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
                   "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

S2_new_plot <- ggplot(S2_new_paired) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(
    x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
    y = Germline,
    yend = `Patient-derived`
  ),
  color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = S2_new_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = S2_new_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = S2_new_ybracket, yend = S2_new_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = S2_new_ybracket, yend = S2_new_ybracket - 0.015*S2_new_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = S2_new_ybracket, yend = S2_new_ybracket - 0.015*S2_new_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = S2_new_ybracket * 1.03,
           label = S2_new_star,
           size = 7,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "S2 Domain",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

S2_new_plot

ggsave(
  "/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Polyreactive Images/S2_new_paired_plot.png",
  S2_new_plot,
  width = 4.67,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

paired_df_S2 <- S2_new_auc %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(
    Germline_Lower = if_else(Germline < `Patient-derived`, "Yes", "No")
  )

S2_yes_clones <- paired_df_S2 %>%
  filter(Germline_Lower == "Yes") %>%
  pull(Clone) %>%
  unique()


paired_df_S2_diff <- S2_new_auc %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(
    Germline_Lower = if_else(Germline < `Patient-derived`, "Yes", "No"),
    Increase = `Patient-derived` - Germline
  )

S2_yes_increases <- paired_df_S2_diff %>%
  filter(Germline_Lower == "Yes") %>%
  select(Clone, Germline, `Patient-derived`, Increase)

S2_yes_increases

S2_increased_clones <- ggplot(S2_yes_increases, aes(x = reorder(Clone, Increase), y = Increase)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4DA6FF") +   # greenish blue
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Clone ID",
    y = "OD increase from germline",
    title = "Antibody Increase in Spike Reactivity"
  )
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/S2_gainers.png",
  S2_increased_clones,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/S2_gainers.svg",
  S2_increased_clones,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

) %>%

    Group   = trimws(Group),

# (trapz_auc already defined earlier)

  ) %>%

x_germ <- 1

x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

NTD_ymax     <- max(NTD_paired$Germline, NTD_paired$`Patient-derived`)
NTD_ybracket <- NTD_ymax * 1.08

NTD_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
                "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

NTD_paired_plot <- ggplot(NTD_paired) +
  
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
        y = Germline, yend = `Patient-derived`),

  ) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = NTD_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +

             color = NTD_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = NTD_ybracket, yend = NTD_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = NTD_ybracket, yend = NTD_ybracket - 0.015 * NTD_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = NTD_ybracket, yend = NTD_ybracket - 0.015 * NTD_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = NTD_ybracket * 1.03,

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),

    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "NTD",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border  = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),

# Load libraries
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

dsDNA_df <- read_excel("//home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/dsDNA Germline AUC 4.3.26.xlsx")


trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE))

auc_by_clone <- df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, scale = "log10"),
            .groups = "drop")

auc_test <- wilcox.test(AUC ~ Group, data = auc_by_clone, exact = FALSE)
auc_test

auc_summary <- auc_by_clone %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_AUC = mean(AUC, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_AUC   = sd(AUC, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_clones = n()
  )

print(auc_summary)


auc_summary <- auc_by_clone %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_AUC = mean(AUC, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_AUC   = sd(AUC, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Custom colors
auc_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",   # tan
                "Patient-derived"  = "#800000")   # maroon

dsDNA_germvspatient <- ggplot(auc_by_clone, aes(x = Group, y = AUC, fill = Group)) +
  # Boxplot with bold outlines and no mean dot
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.6,
    color = "black",
    size = 1.3,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  # Jitter points for individual clones
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  # Custom manual colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = auc_colors) +
  # Labels and theme
  labs(
    title = "dsDNA",
    x = NULL,
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
ggsave("/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/dsDNA_germvspatient.png", dsDNA_germvspatient, dpi = 600, width = 3.25, height = 4, bg = "white" )

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)


dsDNA_df <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/dsDNA Germline AUC 4.3.26.xlsx") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )


trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}


dsDNA_auc <- dsDNA_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )


dsDNA_paired <- dsDNA_auc %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()   # Keep only clones with both versions

dsDNA_paired_test <- wilcox.test(
  dsDNA_paired$Germline,
  dsDNA_paired$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

# significance star
dsDNA_p <- dsDNA_paired_test$p.value
dsDNA_star <- ifelse(dsDNA_p < 0.001, "***",
                     ifelse(dsDNA_p < 0.01,  "**",
                            ifelse(dsDNA_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))
dsDNA_paired_test@results
dsDNA_paired_test$p.value



# move groups closer together
x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

# y-position for bracket
dsDNA_ymax <- max(dsDNA_paired$Germline, dsDNA_paired$`Patient-derived`)
dsDNA_ybracket <- dsDNA_ymax * 1.08

# Colors
dsDNA_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
                  "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

dsDNA_paired_plot <- ggplot(dsDNA_paired) +
  
  # gray connector lines
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
                   y = Germline,
                   yend = `Patient-derived`),
               color = "gray40", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  # tan points (Germline)
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = dsDNA_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  # maroon points (Patient-derived)
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = dsDNA_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  

annotate("segment",
         x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
         y = dsDNA_ybracket, yend = dsDNA_ybracket,
         size = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = dsDNA_ybracket, yend = dsDNA_ybracket - 0.015*dsDNA_ybracket,
           size = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = dsDNA_ybracket, yend = dsDNA_ybracket - 0.015*dsDNA_ybracket,
           size = 1) +

annotate("text",
         x = x_mid,
         y = dsDNA_ybracket * 1.03,
         label = dsDNA_star,
         size = 7, fontface = "bold") +
  
  # x-axis labels moved closer
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "dsDNA",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

# show it
dsDNA_paired_plot

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

dsDNA_df<- read_xlsx("/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/dsDNA Germline AUC 4.3.26.xlsx") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Group = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )


trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}


dsDNA_auc <- dsDNA_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived")))

dsDNA_paired <- dsDNA_auc %>%
  filter(Clone %in% S2_yes_increases$Clone) %>%     # <---- KEY FILTER
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()   # keep only clones with both Germline and Patient-derived


dsDNA_paired_test <- wilcox.test(
  dsDNA_paired$Germline,
  dsDNA_paired$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

dsDNA_p <- dsDNA_paired_test$p.value
dsDNA_star <- ifelse(dsDNA_p < 0.001, "***",
                     ifelse(dsDNA_p < 0.01,  "**",
                            ifelse(dsDNA_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))



# closer x spacing
x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

# y position
dsDNA_ymax     <- max(dsDNA_paired$Germline, dsDNA_paired$`Patient-derived`)
dsDNA_ybracket <- dsDNA_ymax * 1.08

# colors
dsDNA_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
                  "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

dsDNA_paired_plot_onS2 <- ggplot(dsDNA_paired) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(
    x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
    y = Germline,
    yend = `Patient-derived`
  ),
  color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = dsDNA_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = dsDNA_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = dsDNA_ybracket, yend = dsDNA_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = dsDNA_ybracket, yend = dsDNA_ybracket - 0.015*dsDNA_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = dsDNA_ybracket, yend = dsDNA_ybracket - 0.015*dsDNA_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = dsDNA_ybracket * 1.03,
           label = dsDNA_star,
           size = 7,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "dsDNA",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

  annotate("segment",

  annotate(

    x = x_pat,
    xend = x_pat,

  annotate(

    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),

    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "RBD in Spike-gaining clones",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"

  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),

RBD_paired <- RBD_paired %>%
  mutate(
    Germline_Lower = if_else(Germline < `Patient-derived`, "Yes", "No")
  )

RBD_yes_clones <- RBD_paired %>%
  filter(Germline_Lower == "Yes") %>%
  pull(Clone) %>%
  unique()
RBD_increase_df <- RBD_auc %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  mutate(
    Increase = `Patient-derived` - Germline
  )
RBD_yes_increases <- RBD_increase_df %>%
  filter(Clone %in% RBD_yes_clones)

RBD_increased_clones_plot <- ggplot(
  RBD_yes_increases,
  aes(x = reorder(Clone, Increase), y = Increase)
) +
  geom_col(fill = "#4DA6FF") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Clone ID",
    y = "OD increase from germline",
    title = "Antibody Increase in RBD Reactivity"
  )

ssDNA_paired_rbd <- ssDNA_auc %>%
  filter(Clone %in% RBD_yes_clones) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()

ssDNA_paired_test_rbd <- wilcox.test(
  ssDNA_paired_rbd$Germline,
  ssDNA_paired_rbd$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

ssDNA_p_rbd <- ssDNA_paired_test_rbd$p.value

ssDNA_star_rbd <- ifelse(ssDNA_p_rbd < 0.001, "***",
                         ifelse(ssDNA_p_rbd < 0.01,  "**",
                                ifelse(ssDNA_p_rbd < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))


x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

ssDNA_ymax_rbd <- max(
  ssDNA_paired_rbd$Germline,
  ssDNA_paired_rbd$`Patient-derived`,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

ssDNA_ybracket_rbd <- ssDNA_ymax_rbd * 1.08

ssDNA_colors <- c(
  "Germline" = "#D2B48C",
  "Patient-derived" = "#800000"
)

ssDNA_paired_plot_rbd <- ggplot(ssDNA_paired_rbd) +
  
  geom_segment(
    aes(
      x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
      y = Germline,
      yend = `Patient-derived`
    ),
    color = "gray40",
    linewidth = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
    color = ssDNA_colors["Germline"],
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  
  geom_point(
    aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
    color = ssDNA_colors["Patient-derived"],
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
    y = ssDNA_ybracket_rbd, yend = ssDNA_ybracket_rbd,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
    y = ssDNA_ybracket_rbd,
    yend = ssDNA_ybracket_rbd - 0.015 * ssDNA_ybracket_rbd,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
    y = ssDNA_ybracket_rbd,
    yend = ssDNA_ybracket_rbd - 0.015 * ssDNA_ybracket_rbd,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_mid,
    y = ssDNA_ybracket_rbd * 1.06,
    label = ssDNA_star_rbd,
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold",
    family = "Arial"
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "ssDNA in RBD-binding clones",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border  = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line     = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks    = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),

  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/LPS Germline AUC 4.29.26.xlsx"
) %>%
  mutate(

    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# (trapz_auc already defined above — same as S2/S1/etc)


LPS_auc <- LPS_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )


LPS_paired <- LPS_auc %>%
  filter(Clone %in% S2_yes_clones) %>%   # <---- same filter as all others
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()

LPS_paired_test <- wilcox.test(
  LPS_paired$Germline,
  LPS_paired$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

LPS_p <- LPS_paired_test$p.value
LPS_star <- ifelse(LPS_p < 0.001, "***",
                   ifelse(LPS_p < 0.01,  "**",
                          ifelse(LPS_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))



x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

LPS_ymax     <- max(LPS_paired$Germline, LPS_paired$`Patient-derived`)
LPS_ybracket <- LPS_ymax * 1.08

LPS_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
                "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

LPS_paired_plot <- ggplot(LPS_paired) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(
    x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
    y = Germline,
    yend = `Patient-derived`
  ),
  color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = LPS_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = LPS_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = LPS_ybracket, yend = LPS_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = LPS_ybracket, yend = LPS_ybracket - 0.015 * LPS_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = LPS_ybracket, yend = LPS_ybracket - 0.015 * LPS_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = LPS_ybracket * 1.03,
           label = LPS_star,
           size = 7,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "LPS",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),

PF4_df <- read_excel("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/PF.hep Germline AUC 4.29.26.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(
    Group   = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )


trapz_auc <- function(x, y, scale = c("log10", "linear")) {
  scale <- match.arg(scale)
  o <- order(x)
  x <- x[o]; y <- y[o]
  if (scale == "log10") x <- log10(x)
  sum(diff(x) * (head(y, -1) + tail(y, -1)) / 2, na.rm = TRUE)
}


PF4_auc <- PF4_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived")))


PF4_paired <- PF4_auc %>%
  # keep only clones that were "Yes" for Spike
  filter(Clone %in% S2_yes_clones) %>%      # <---- SPIKE FILTER
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()    # keep only clones with both Germline and Patient-derived

# (optional) if you S2_yes_clones# (optional) if you ALSO want to compute PF4-specific Yes/No:
# PF4_paired <- PF4_paired %>%
#   mutate(
#     PF4_Germline_Lower = if_else(Germline < `Patient-derived`, "Yes", "No")
#   )


PF4_paired_test <- wilcox.test(
  PF4_paired$Germline,
  PF4_paired$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

PF4_p <- PF4_paired_test$p.value
PF4_star <- ifelse(PF4_p < 0.001, "***",
                   ifelse(PF4_p < 0.01,  "**",
                          ifelse(PF4_p < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))
PF4_star <- ifelse(PF4_p < 0.05,
                   PF4_star,                                    # show stars if significant
                   paste0("p = ", signif(PF4_p, 2)))  


x_germ <- 1
x_pat  <- 1.4
x_mid  <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

PF4_ymax     <- max(PF4_paired$Germline, PF4_paired$`Patient-derived`)
PF4_ybracket <- PF4_ymax * 1.08

PF4_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
                "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

PF4_paired_plot <- ggplot(PF4_paired) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(
    x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
    y = Germline,
    yend = `Patient-derived`
  ),
  color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = PF4_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = PF4_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = PF4_ybracket, yend = PF4_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = PF4_ybracket, yend = PF4_ybracket - 0.015*PF4_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = PF4_ybracket, yend = PF4_ybracket - 0.015*PF4_ybracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = PF4_ybracket * 1.06,
           label = PF4_star,
           size = 6,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "PF4/Heparin",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

    xend = x_pat,
    y = PF4_ybracket_rbd,
    yend = PF4_ybracket_rbd - 0.015 * PF4_ybracket_rbd,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_mid,
    y = PF4_ybracket_rbd * 1.06,
    label = PF4_star_rbd,
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold",
    family = "Arial"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "PF4/Heparin in RBD-binding clones",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

Omicron_ELISA_data <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/Omicron-His Germline AUC 4.2.26.xlsx")

df_long_Omicron <- Omicron_ELISA_data %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("OD"),
    names_to = "Replicate",
    values_to = "OD"
  )
df_summary_Omicron <- df_long_Omicron %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone, Concentration) %>%   # <-- includes Group here
  summarise(
    mean_OD = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(mean_OD = if_else(mean_OD < 0, 0, mean_OD))
auc_by_clone_Omicron <- df_summary_Omicron %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, mean_OD, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = trimws(Group),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )

paired_df_Omicron <- auc_by_clone_Omicron %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  na.omit()     # only retain clones with both Germline & Patient-derived
paired_test_Omicron <- wilcox.test(
  paired_df_Omicron$Germline,
  paired_df_Omicron$`Patient-derived`,
  paired = TRUE
)

paired_p_Omicron <- paired_test_Omicron$p.value

p_label_Omicron <- ifelse(paired_p_Omicron < 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(paired_p_Omicron < 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(paired_p_Omicron < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
# x positions
x_germ  <- 1
x_pat   <- 1.4
x_mid   <- mean(c(x_germ, x_pat))

# colors (same as your Spike plot)
Omicron_colors <- c("Germline" = "#D2B48C",
                    "Patient-derived" = "#800000")

# bracket height
y_max_Omicron <- max(paired_df_Omicron$Germline, paired_df_Omicron$`Patient-derived`)
y_bracket_Omicron <- y_max_Omicron * 1.08

Omicron_paired_plot <- ggplot(paired_df_Omicron) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
                   y = Germline,
                   yend = `Patient-derived`),
               color = "gray40", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_germ, y = Germline),
             color = Omicron_colors["Germline"], size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_pat, y = `Patient-derived`),
             color = Omicron_colors["Patient-derived"], size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_pat,
           y = y_bracket_Omicron, yend = y_bracket_Omicron,
           size = 1) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_germ, xend = x_germ,
           y = y_bracket_Omicron, yend = y_bracket_Omicron - 0.015*y_bracket_Omicron,
           size = 1) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_pat, xend = x_pat,
           y = y_bracket_Omicron, yend = y_bracket_Omicron - 0.015*y_bracket_Omicron,
           size = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = y_bracket_Omicron * 1.03,
           label = p_label_Omicron,
           size = 7, fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_germ, x_pat),
    labels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Omicron (B.1.1.529)",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )


Omicron_paired_plot

)

Spike_proc <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_DATA_new/Spike-his Processed 3.31.26.xlsx")

Omicron_proc <- read_xlsx("//home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_DATA_new/Omicron-his Processed 4.2.26.xlsx")

df_long_Spike_proc <- Spike_proc %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("OD"),
    names_to = "Replicate",
    values_to = "OD"
  )

df_summary_Spike_proc <- df_long_Spike_proc %>%
  group_by(Clone, Concentration) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_OD = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(mean_OD = if_else(mean_OD < 0, 0, mean_OD))

auc_Spike_proc <- df_summary_Spike_proc %>%
  group_by(Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    Spike_His = trapz_auc(Concentration, mean_OD, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
df_long_Omicron_proc <- Omicron_proc %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("OD"),
    names_to = "Replicate",
    values_to = "OD"
  )

df_summary_Omicron_proc <- df_long_Omicron_proc %>%
  group_by(Clone, Concentration) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_OD = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(mean_OD = if_else(mean_OD < 0, 0, mean_OD))

auc_Omicron_proc <- df_summary_Omicron_proc %>%
  group_by(Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    Omicron = trapz_auc(Concentration, mean_OD, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
paired_proc_df <- inner_join(
  auc_Spike_proc,
  auc_Omicron_proc,
  by = "Clone"
)

wilcox.test(
  paired_proc_df$Omicron,
  paired_proc_df$Spike_His,
  paired = TRUE
)
p_val <- wilcox.test(
  paired_proc_df$Omicron,
  paired_proc_df$Spike_His,
  paired = TRUE
)$p.value

p_label <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
                  ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                         ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
x_spike <- 1
x_omicron <- 1.4
x_mid <- mean(c(x_omicron, x_spike))

y_max <- max(paired_proc_df$Omicron, paired_proc_df$Spike_His)
y_bracket <- y_max * 1.08

His_omicronvsSpike <- ggplot(paired_proc_df) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_omicron, xend = x_spike,
                   y = Omicron,
                   yend = Spike_His),
               color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_omicron, y = Omicron),
             color = "forestgreen", size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_spike, y = Spike_His),
             color = "firebrick", size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_omicron, xend = x_spike,
           y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_omicron, xend = x_omicron,
           y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.015*y_bracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_spike, xend = x_spike,
           y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.015*y_bracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = y_bracket * 1.03,
           label = p_label,
           size = 7, fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_spike, x_omicron),
    labels = c("Wuhan", "Omicron–His"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "B.1.1.529 (Omicron) vs Wuhan",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

pairwise_plot
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Omicron-his vs Spike-His.png",
  His_omicronvsSpike,
  width = 4.67,

  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

Spike_proc_untagged <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_DATA_new/Spike Processed 4.2.26.xlsx")


df_long_Spike_untagged <- Spike_proc_untagged %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("OD"),
    names_to = "Replicate",
    values_to = "OD"
  )

df_summary_Spike_untagged <- df_long_Spike_untagged %>%
  group_by(Clone, Concentration) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_OD = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(mean_OD = if_else(mean_OD < 0, 0, mean_OD))

auc_Spike_untagged <- df_summary_Spike_untagged %>%
  group_by(Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    Spike = trapz_auc(Concentration, mean_OD, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


paired_spike_vs_omicronHis <- inner_join(
  auc_Spike_untagged,
  auc_Omicron_proc,
  by = "Clone"
)

wilcox.test(
  paired_spike_vs_omicronHis$Omicron,
  paired_spike_vs_omicronHis$Spike,
  paired = TRUE
)

paired_spike_vs_omicronHis %>%
  mutate(diff = Omicron - Spike) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_diff = mean(diff),
    median_diff = median(diff)
  )
x_omicron <- 1
x_spike <- 1.4
x_mid <- mean(c(x_omicron, x_spike))

y_max <- max(paired_spike_vs_omicronHis$Omicron, paired_spike_vs_omicronHis$Spike)
y_bracket <- y_max * 1.08

p_val <- wilcox.test(
  paired_spike_vs_omicronHis$Omicron,
  paired_spike_vs_omicronHis$Spike,
  paired = TRUE
)$p.value

p_label <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "***",
                  ifelse(p_val < 0.01, "**",
                         ifelse(p_val < 0.05, "*", "ns")))

SpikevsOmicron_allclones <- ggplot(paired_spike_vs_omicronHis) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = x_omicron, xend = x_spike,
                   y = Omicron,
                   yend = Spike),
               color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_omicron, y = Omicron),
             color = "forestgreen", size = 3.5) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = x_spike, y = Spike),
             color = "firebrick", size = 3.5) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_omicron, xend = x_spike,
           y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_omicron, xend = x_omicron,
           y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.015*y_bracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("segment",
           x = x_spike, xend = x_spike,
           y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.015*y_bracket,
           linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = x_mid,
           y = y_bracket * 1.03,
           label = p_label,
           size = 7, fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_omicron, x_spike),
    labels = c("Omicron–His", "Wuhan"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "B.1.1.529 (Omicron) vs Wuhan",

    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"

  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),

paired_spike_tag_df <- inner_join(
  auc_Spike_untagged,
  auc_Spike_proc,
  by = "Clone"
)

spike_tag_test <- wilcox.test(
  paired_spike_tag_df$Spike,
  paired_spike_tag_df$Spike_His,
  paired = TRUE
)

spike_tag_p <- spike_tag_test$p.value

spike_tag_label <- ifelse(spike_tag_p < 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(spike_tag_p < 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(spike_tag_p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))

paired_spike_tag_df %>%
  mutate(
    diff = Spike - Spike_His,
    direction = case_when(
      Spike > Spike_His ~ "Spike higher",
      Spike < Spike_His ~ "Spike–His higher",
      TRUE ~ "Equal"
    )
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    mean_Spike = mean(Spike, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Spike_His = mean(Spike_His, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_diff = mean(diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_diff = median(diff, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

paired_spike_tag_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    direction = case_when(
      Spike > Spike_His ~ "Spike higher",
      Spike < Spike_His ~ "Spike–His higher",
      TRUE ~ "Equal"
    )
  ) %>%
  count(direction)

x_spike <- 1
x_spike_his <- 1.4
x_mid <- mean(c(x_spike, x_spike_his))

y_max <- max(paired_spike_tag_df$Spike, paired_spike_tag_df$Spike_His, na.rm = TRUE)
y_bracket <- y_max * 1.08

Spike_tag_plot <- ggplot(paired_spike_tag_df) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(
      x = x_spike,
      xend = x_spike_his,
      y = Spike,
      yend = Spike_His
    ),
    color = "gray40",
    linewidth = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = x_spike, y = Spike),
    color = "#E31A1C",
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = x_spike_his, y = Spike_His),
    color = "#FB9A99",
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = x_spike, xend = x_spike_his,
    y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = x_spike, xend = x_spike,
    y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.015 * y_bracket,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = x_spike_his, xend = x_spike_his,
    y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.015 * y_bracket,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = x_mid,
    y = y_bracket * 1.03,
    label = spike_tag_label,
    size = 7,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(x_spike, x_spike_his),
    labels = c("Spike", "Spike–His"),
    limits = c(0.8, 1.6)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Spike vs Spike-His",
    x = "",
    y = "AUC (OD vs log10[Concentration])"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

Omicron_processed <- df_long_Omicron %>%
  mutate(
    OD = if_else(OD < 0, 0, OD),  # optional floor at zero
    Group = trimws(Group)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone, Concentration) %>%
  summarise(
    OD_mean = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop_last"
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )
Omicron_delta <- Omicron_processed %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Delta_Omicron = `Patient-derived` - Germline
  ) %>%
  select(Clone, Delta_Omicron)

Spike_delta <- Spike_df %>%
  mutate(
    Group = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Delta_Spike = `Patient-derived` - Germline
  ) %>%
  select(Clone, Delta_Spike)

Spike_Omicron_delta <- Spike_delta %>%
  left_join(Omicron_delta, by = "Clone")


Spike_Omicron_long <- Spike_Omicron_delta %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Delta_Spike, Delta_Omicron),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Delta"
  )
Charge_total <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(CDR == "Total") %>%
  select(Clone = Sequence_ID,
         Chain,
         Charge_Change)
Charge_HC <- Charge_total %>%
  filter(Chain == "Heavy Chain") %>%
  rename(HC_Charge = Charge_Change)

Charge_LC <- Charge_total %>%
  filter(Chain == "Light Chain") %>%
  rename(LC_Charge = Charge_Change)
Charge_combined <- full_join(Charge_HC, Charge_LC, by = "Clone") %>%
  mutate(Net_Charge = HC_Charge - LC_Charge)
Charge_gain_clones <- Charge_combined %>%
  filter(Net_Charge > 0) %>%
  pull(Clone)
Charge_gain_clones <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(CDR == "Total", Charge_Change > 0) %>% 
  pull(Sequence_ID)
Spike_Omicron_delta_gain <- Spike_Omicron_delta %>%
  filter(Clone %in% Charge_gain_clones)
Spike_Omicron_long_gain <- Spike_Omicron_delta_gain %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Delta_Spike, Delta_Omicron),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Delta"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Antigen = factor(Antigen,
                     levels = c("Delta_Spike", "Delta_Omicron"),
                     labels = c("Wuhan", "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)"))
  )
pval <- wilcox.test(
  Spike_Omicron_delta_gain$Delta_Spike,
  Spike_Omicron_delta_gain$Delta_Omicron,
  paired = TRUE
)$p.value

p_label <- paste0("p = ", signif(pval, 3))
colors <- c("Wuhan" = "firebrick",
            "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)" = "forestgreen")

# y positions
ymax <- max(Spike_Omicron_long_gain$Delta, na.rm = TRUE)
yrange <- diff(range(Spike_Omicron_long_gain$Delta, na.rm = TRUE))
ybracket <- ymax + 0.12 * yrange
ypval <- ymax + 0.18 * yrange

x1 <- 1
x2 <- 2
xm <- mean(c(x1, x2))
p_label1 <- ifelse(pval < 0.05,
                  ifelse(pval < 0.001, "***",
                         ifelse(pval < 0.01, "**", "*")),
                  paste0("p = ", signif(pval, 2)))

Spike_Omicron_gain_plot <- ggplot(Spike_Omicron_long_gain,
                                  aes(x = Antigen, y = Delta, fill = Antigen)) +
  
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.55) +
  
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, size = 3.5, alpha = 0.9,
              aes(color = Antigen)) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  
  annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x2,
           y = ybracket, yend = ybracket, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x1,
           y = ybracket, yend = ybracket - 0.02*yrange, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment", x = x2, xend = x2,
           y = ybracket, yend = ybracket - 0.02*yrange, linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = xm,
           y = ypval,
           label = p_label1,
           size = 7,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Wuhan vs B.1.1.529 ΔAUC\n(Charge-Gaining Clones Only)",
    x = "",
    y = "ΔAUC (Patient-derived − Germline)"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
ggsave(
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Spike_Omicron_gain_plot.png",
  plot = Spike_Omicron_gain_plot,
  width = 4.67,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
ggsave(
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Spike_Omicron_gain_plot.svg",
  plot = Spike_Omicron_gain_plot,
  width = 4.67,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
charge_gain_clone_ids_any_chain <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(CDR == "Total", Charge_Change > 0) %>%
  distinct(Sequence_ID) %>%
  pull(Sequence_ID)
Spike_Omicron_delta_gain_any <- Spike_Omicron_delta %>%
  filter(Clone %in% charge_gain_clone_ids_any_chain)
pval_any <- wilcox.test(
  Spike_Omicron_delta_gain_any$Delta_Spike,
  Spike_Omicron_delta_gain_any$Delta_Omicron,
  paired = TRUE
)$p.value
Spike_Omicron_long_gain_any <- Spike_Omicron_delta_gain_any %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Delta_Spike, Delta_Omicron),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Delta"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Antigen = factor(
      Antigen,
      levels = c("Delta_Spike", "Delta_Omicron"),
      labels = c("Wuhan", "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)")
    )
  )
colors <- c(
  "Wuhan" = "firebrick",
  "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)" = "forestgreen"
)

ymax <- max(Spike_Omicron_long_gain_any$Delta, na.rm = TRUE)
yrange <- diff(range(Spike_Omicron_long_gain_any$Delta, na.rm = TRUE))
ybracket <- ymax + 0.12 * yrange
ypval <- ymax + 0.18 * yrange

p_label <- ifelse(
  pval_any < 0.05,
  ifelse(pval_any < 0.001, "***",
         ifelse(pval_any < 0.01, "**", "*")),
  paste0("p = ", signif(pval_any, 2))
)

Spike_Omicron_gain_plot_any <- ggplot(
  Spike_Omicron_long_gain_any,
  aes(x = Antigen, y = Delta, fill = Antigen)
) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.55) +
  
  geom_line(
    aes(group = Clone),
    color = "grey60",
    alpha = 0.6,
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = Antigen),
    width = 0.06,
    size = 3.5,

  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) +
  
  annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 2,
           y = ybracket, yend = ybracket, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 1,
           y = ybracket, yend = ybracket - 0.02 * yrange, linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("segment", x = 2, xend = 2,
           y = ybracket, yend = ybracket - 0.02 * yrange, linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text",
           x = 1.5,
           y = ypval,
           label = p_label,
           size = 7,
           fontface = "bold") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Wuhan vs B.1.1.529 ΔAUC\n(Any Chain Charge Gain)",
    x = "",
    y = "ΔAUC (Patient-derived − Germline)"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),

total_charge_change_by_clone <- Charge_combined %>%
  mutate(
    total_charge_change = HC_Charge + LC_Charge
  ) %>%
  select(Clone, total_charge_change)
variant_charge_corr_df <- Spike_Omicron_delta %>%
  left_join(total_charge_change_by_clone, by = "Clone") %>%
  mutate(
    variant_delta = Delta_Omicron - Delta_Spike
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(total_charge_change))
variant_charge_corr <- cor.test(
  variant_charge_corr_df$total_charge_change,
  variant_charge_corr_df$variant_delta,
  method = "spearman"
)

variant_charge_corr

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

hc_cdr_delta_charge_df <- HC_merged %>%
  select(
    Clone = Sequence_ID,
    Delta_CDR1,
    Delta_CDR2,
    Delta_CDR3
  )
variant_cdr_delta_df <- wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
  mutate(
    variant_delta_auc = Wuhan_delta_auc - Omicron_delta_auc
  ) %>%
  left_join(hc_cdr_delta_charge_df, by = "Clone") %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Delta_CDR1),
    !is.na(Delta_CDR2),
    !is.na(Delta_CDR3)
  )
variant_cdr_delta_long <- variant_cdr_delta_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Delta_CDR1, Delta_CDR2, Delta_CDR3),
    names_to = "CDR",
    values_to = "Delta_Charge"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CDR = recode(
      CDR,
      Delta_CDR1 = "CDR1",
      Delta_CDR2 = "CDR2",
      Delta_CDR3 = "CDR3"
    ),
    CDR = factor(CDR, levels = c("CDR1", "CDR2", "CDR3"))
  )
cdr1_corr <- cor.test(
  variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR1,
  variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
  method = "spearman"
)

cdr2_corr <- cor.test(
  variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR2,
  variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
  method = "spearman"
)

cdr3_corr <- cor.test(
  variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR3,
  variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
  method = "spearman"
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

cdr_charge_stats <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    CDR = "CDR1",
    rho = cor.test(
      variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR1,
      variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
      method = "spearman"
    )$estimate,
    p_value = cor.test(
      variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR1,
      variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
      method = "spearman"
    )$p.value
  ),
  tibble(
    CDR = "CDR2",
    rho = cor.test(
      variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR2,
      variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
      method = "spearman"
    )$estimate,
    p_value = cor.test(
      variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR2,
      variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
      method = "spearman"
    )$p.value
  ),
  tibble(
    CDR = "CDR3",
    rho = cor.test(
      variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR3,
      variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
      method = "spearman"
    )$estimate,
    p_value = cor.test(
      variant_cdr_delta_df$Delta_CDR3,
      variant_cdr_delta_df$variant_delta_auc,
      method = "spearman"
    )$p.value
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    CDR = factor(CDR, levels = c("CDR1", "CDR2", "CDR3")),
    rho = unname(rho),
    p_label = ifelse(
      p_value < 0.001,
      "p < 0.001",
      paste0("p = ", signif(p_value, 2))
    ),
    stat_label = paste0(
      "rho = ", round(rho, 2),
      "\n", p_label
    )
  )
cdr_charge_stats <- cdr_charge_stats %>%
  mutate(
    stat_label = paste0(
      "r = ", round(rho, 2),
      "\np = ", signif(p_value, 2)
    )
  )
cdr_charge_label_positions <- variant_cdr_delta_long %>%
  group_by(CDR) %>%
  summarise(
    x_pos = min(Delta_Charge, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_pos = max(variant_delta_auc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    x_pos = x_pos + 0.03 * (max(variant_cdr_delta_long$Delta_Charge, na.rm = TRUE) -
                              min(variant_cdr_delta_long$Delta_Charge, na.rm = TRUE)),
    y_pos = y_pos - 0.05 * (max(variant_cdr_delta_long$variant_delta_auc, na.rm = TRUE) -
                              min(variant_cdr_delta_long$variant_delta_auc, na.rm = TRUE))
  )

cdr_charge_stats_annotated <- cdr_charge_stats %>%
  left_join(cdr_charge_label_positions, by = "CDR")

variant_cdr_delta_plot <- ggplot(
  variant_cdr_delta_long,
  aes(x = Delta_Charge, y = variant_delta_auc)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9, color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    color = "firebrick",
    fill = "#F2B6A0",
    linewidth = 1,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_text(
  data = cdr_charge_stats,
  aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = stat_label),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  hjust = -0.5,
  vjust = 1.4,
  family = "Arial",
  fontface = "bold",
  size = 4.2
) +
  facet_wrap(~ CDR, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = "CDR Charge Change vs Variant AUC Binding ",
    x = "Charge change from germline",
    y = "ΔAUC (Wuhan - Omicron)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

variant_cdr_delta_plot

  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/OmicronvsWuhanChargechangescorr.png",
  plot = variant_cdr_delta_plot,

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)

omicron_patient_auc_by_clone <- df_long_Omicron %>%
  mutate(
    OD = if_else(OD < 0, 0, OD),
    Group = trimws(Group)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone, Concentration) %>%
  summarise(
    OD_mean = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop_last"
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(Group == "Patient-derived") %>%
  select(Clone, Omicron_patient_auc = AUC)

wuhan_patient_auc_by_clone <- Spike_df %>%
  mutate(
    Group = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(Group == "Patient-derived") %>%
  select(Clone, Wuhan_patient_auc = AUC)

hc_patient_charge_by_clone <- HC_merged %>%
  mutate(
    HC_total_charge_PAT = Charge_CDR1_PAT + Charge_CDR2_PAT + Charge_CDR3_PAT
  ) %>%
  select(
    Clone = Sequence_ID,
    HC_total_charge_PAT,
    Charge_CDR1_PAT,
    Charge_CDR2_PAT,
    Charge_CDR3_PAT
  )

patient_binding_charge_df <- wuhan_patient_auc_by_clone %>%
  full_join(omicron_patient_auc_by_clone, by = "Clone") %>%
  left_join(hc_patient_charge_by_clone, by = "Clone")

patient_binding_charge_long <- patient_binding_charge_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Wuhan_patient_auc, Omicron_patient_auc),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Patient_AUC"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(HC_total_charge_PAT, Charge_CDR1_PAT, Charge_CDR2_PAT, Charge_CDR3_PAT),
    names_to = "Charge_Feature",
    values_to = "Patient_Charge"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Antigen = factor(
      Antigen,
      levels = c("Wuhan_patient_auc", "Omicron_patient_auc"),
      labels = c("Wuhan", "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)")
    ),
    Charge_Feature = factor(
      Charge_Feature,
      levels = c(
        "HC_total_charge_PAT",
        "Charge_CDR1_PAT",
        "Charge_CDR2_PAT",
        "Charge_CDR3_PAT"
      ),
      labels = c(
        "Heavy chain total",
        "CDR1",
        "CDR2",
        "CDR3"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Patient_AUC),
    !is.na(Patient_Charge)
  )

patient_binding_charge_stats <- patient_binding_charge_long %>%
  group_by(Antigen, Charge_Feature) %>%
  summarise(
    cor_test = list(cor.test(Patient_Charge, Patient_AUC, method = "spearman")),
    n = sum(complete.cases(Patient_Charge, Patient_AUC)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    r = map_dbl(cor_test, ~ unname(.x$estimate)),
    p_value = map_dbl(cor_test, ~ .x$p.value),
    stat_label = paste0(
      "r = ", round(r, 2),
      "\np = ", signif(p_value, 2),
      "\nn = ", n
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-cor_test)

patient_binding_charge_plot <- ggplot(
  patient_binding_charge_long,
  aes(x = Patient_Charge, y = Patient_AUC)
) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    color = "firebrick",
    fill = "#F2B6A0",
    linewidth = 1,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = patient_binding_charge_stats,
    aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = stat_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = -0.2,
    vjust = 1.3,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4
  ) +
  facet_grid(Antigen ~ Charge_Feature, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = "Patient-derived Binding vs Patient-derived Heavy Chain Charge",
    x = "Patient-derived charge",
    y = "Patient-derived AUC"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

patient_binding_charge_plot
total_charge_gain_df <- Charge_combined %>%
  mutate(
    total_charge_gain = HC_Charge + LC_Charge
  ) %>%
  select(Clone, total_charge_gain)

variant_total_charge_df <- Spike_Omicron_delta %>%
  left_join(total_charge_gain_df, by = "Clone") %>%
  mutate(
    variant_delta = Delta_Spike - Delta_Omicron   # Wuhan − Omicron (your flipped version)
  )
variant_total_charge_corr <- cor.test(
  variant_total_charge_df$total_charge_gain,
  variant_total_charge_df$variant_delta,
  method = "spearman"
)

variant_total_charge_corr

library(ggplot2)

variant_cdr_delta_plot <- ggplot(
  variant_cdr_delta_long,
  aes(x = Delta_Charge, y = variant_delta_auc)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9, color = "black") +
  
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    color = "firebrick",
    fill = "#F2B6A0",
    linewidth = 1,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ CDR, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    title = "CDR Charge Change vs Variant Binding Shift",
    x = "Δ Charge (Patient-derived − Germline)",

  ) +

  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),

    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),

  )
