```{r Germline vs Patient derived analysis}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

wuhan_omicron_auc_by_clone <- df_long_Omicron %>%
  mutate(
    OD = if_else(OD < 0, 0, OD),
    Group = trimws(Group)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone, Concentration) %>%
  summarise(
    OD_mean = mean(OD, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop_last"
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )

omicron_delta_auc_by_clone <- wuhan_omicron_auc_by_clone %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Omicron_delta_auc = `Patient-derived` - Germline
  ) %>%
  select(Clone, Omicron_delta_auc)

wuhan_delta_auc_by_clone <- Spike_df %>%
  mutate(
    Group = trimws(Group),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, scale = "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Wuhan_delta_auc = `Patient-derived` - Germline
  ) %>%
  select(Clone, Wuhan_delta_auc)

wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone <- wuhan_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
  left_join(omicron_delta_auc_by_clone, by = "Clone")
wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone <- wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
  mutate(
    Clone = ifelse(Clone == "17_18", "79_18", Clone)
  )
total_chain_charge_by_clone <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(CDR == "Total") %>%
  select(
    Clone = Sequence_ID,
    Chain,
    Charge_Change
  )

heavy_chain_charge_by_clone <- total_chain_charge_by_clone %>%
  filter(Chain == "Heavy Chain") %>%
  rename(heavy_chain_charge_change = Charge_Change)

light_chain_charge_by_clone <- total_chain_charge_by_clone %>%
  filter(Chain == "Light Chain") %>%
  rename(light_chain_charge_change = Charge_Change)

net_charge_change_by_clone <- full_join(
  heavy_chain_charge_by_clone,
  light_chain_charge_by_clone,
  by = "Clone"
) %>%
  mutate(
    net_charge_change = heavy_chain_charge_change - light_chain_charge_change
  )

charge_gaining_clone_ids <- net_charge_change_by_clone %>%
  filter(net_charge_change > 0) %>%
  pull(Clone)

wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_charge_gain <- wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
  filter(Clone %in% charge_gaining_clone_ids)

wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_charge_gain_long <- wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_charge_gain %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Wuhan_delta_auc, Omicron_delta_auc),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Delta_auc"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Antigen = factor(
      Antigen,
      levels = c("Wuhan_delta_auc", "Omicron_delta_auc"),
      labels = c("Wuhan", "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)")
    )
  )

wuhan_omicron_paired_wilcox <- wilcox.test(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_charge_gain$Wuhan_delta_auc,
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_charge_gain$Omicron_delta_auc,
  paired = TRUE
)

wuhan_omicron_p_value <- wuhan_omicron_paired_wilcox$p.value

wuhan_omicron_p_label <- ifelse(
  wuhan_omicron_p_value < 0.05,
  ifelse(
    wuhan_omicron_p_value < 0.001,
    "***",
    ifelse(wuhan_omicron_p_value < 0.01, "**", "*")
  ),
  paste0("p = ", signif(wuhan_omicron_p_value, 2))
)

wuhan_omicron_plot_colors <- c(
  "Wuhan" = "firebrick",
  "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)" = "forestgreen"
)

wuhan_omicron_ymax <- max(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_charge_gain_long$Delta_auc,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

wuhan_omicron_yrange <- diff(
  range(wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_charge_gain_long$Delta_auc, na.rm = TRUE)
)

wuhan_omicron_ybracket <- wuhan_omicron_ymax + 0.12 * wuhan_omicron_yrange
wuhan_omicron_ypval <- wuhan_omicron_ymax + 0.18 * wuhan_omicron_yrange

wuhan_omicron_charge_gain_plot <- ggplot(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_charge_gain_long,
  aes(x = Antigen, y = Delta_auc, fill = Antigen)
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    alpha = 0.6,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(group = Clone),
    color = "grey60",
    alpha = 0.6,
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(color = Antigen),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.06, height = 0),
    size = 3.5,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wuhan_omicron_plot_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wuhan_omicron_plot_colors) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 1, xend = 2,
    y = wuhan_omicron_ybracket,
    yend = wuhan_omicron_ybracket,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 1, xend = 1,
    y = wuhan_omicron_ybracket,
    yend = wuhan_omicron_ybracket - 0.02 * wuhan_omicron_yrange,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "segment",
    x = 2, xend = 2,
    y = wuhan_omicron_ybracket,
    yend = wuhan_omicron_ybracket - 0.02 * wuhan_omicron_yrange,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 1.5,
    y = wuhan_omicron_ypval,
    label = wuhan_omicron_p_label,
    size = 7,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Wuhan vs B.1.1.529 ΔAUC in Charge-Gaining Clones",
    x = "",
    y = "ΔAUC (Patient-derived − Germline)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

wuhan_omicron_charge_gain_plot
net_vs_heavy_group_df <- net_charge_change_by_clone %>%
  mutate(
    charge_group = case_when(
      heavy_chain_charge_change > 0 & light_chain_charge_change <= 0 ~ "Heavy-only gain",
      net_charge_change > 0 & light_chain_charge_change > 0 ~ "Combined (Heavy + Light)",
      TRUE ~ "No gain"
    )
  )
net_vs_heavy_variant_df <- wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
  left_join(net_vs_heavy_group_df, by = "Clone") %>%
  mutate(
    variant_delta_auc = Omicron_delta_auc - Wuhan_delta_auc
  )
kruskal.test(variant_delta_auc ~ charge_group, data = net_vs_heavy_variant_df)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

heavy_cdr_gain_clone_sets <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(
    Chain == "Heavy Chain",
    CDR %in% c("CDR1", "CDR2", "CDR3"),
    Charge_Change > 0
  ) %>%
  select(Clone = Sequence_ID, CDR)

wuhan_omicron_heavy_cdr_delta_long <- heavy_cdr_gain_clone_sets %>%
  left_join(wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone, by = "Clone") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Wuhan_delta_auc, Omicron_delta_auc),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Delta_auc"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Antigen = factor(
      Antigen,
      levels = c("Wuhan_delta_auc", "Omicron_delta_auc"),
      labels = c("Wuhan", "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)")
    ),
    CDR = factor(CDR, levels = c("CDR1", "CDR2", "CDR3"))
  )

heavy_cdr_stats <- wuhan_omicron_heavy_cdr_delta_long %>%
  group_by(CDR) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = wilcox.test(
      Delta_auc[Antigen == "Wuhan"],
      Delta_auc[Antigen == "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)"]
    )$p.value,
    ymax = max(Delta_auc, na.rm = TRUE),
    ymin = min(Delta_auc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    yrange = ifelse(ymax > ymin, ymax - ymin, 1),
    y_bracket = ymax + 0.12 * yrange,
    y_label = ymax + 0.18 * yrange,
    p_label = ifelse(
      p_value < 0.05,
      ifelse(
        p_value < 0.001,
        "***",
        ifelse(p_value < 0.01, "**", "*")
      ),
      paste0("p = ", signif(p_value, 2))
    )
  )
heavy_cdr_plot_colors <- c(
  "Wuhan" = "firebrick",
  "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)" = "forestgreen"
)

wuhan_omicron_heavy_cdr_plot <- ggplot(
  wuhan_omicron_heavy_cdr_delta_long,
  aes(x = Antigen, y = Delta_auc, fill = Antigen)
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    alpha = 0.6,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = Antigen),
    width = 0.12,
    size = 3.5,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ CDR, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = heavy_cdr_plot_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = heavy_cdr_plot_colors) +
  geom_segment(
    data = heavy_cdr_stats,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = heavy_cdr_stats,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.02 * yrange),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = heavy_cdr_stats,
    aes(x = 2, xend = 2, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.02 * yrange),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = heavy_cdr_stats,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = y_label, label = p_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Wuhan vs B.1.1.529 ΔAUC by Heavy Chain CDR Charge Gain",
    x = "",
    y = "ΔAUC (Patient-derived − Germline)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

wuhan_omicron_heavy_cdr_plot


library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

heavy_chain_charge_by_clone <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(
    CDR == "Total",
    Chain == "Heavy Chain"
  ) %>%
  select(
    Clone = Sequence_ID,
    heavy_chain_charge_change = Charge_Change
  )

light_chain_charge_by_clone <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(
    CDR == "Total",
    Chain == "Light Chain"
  ) %>%
  select(
    Clone = Sequence_ID,
    light_chain_charge_change = Charge_Change
  )

net_charge_change_by_clone <- full_join(
  heavy_chain_charge_by_clone,
  light_chain_charge_by_clone,
  by = "Clone"
) %>%
  mutate(
    heavy_chain_charge_change = coalesce(heavy_chain_charge_change, 0),
    light_chain_charge_change = coalesce(light_chain_charge_change, 0),
    net_charge_change = heavy_chain_charge_change + light_chain_charge_change
  )

heavy_gain_clone_ids <- heavy_chain_charge_by_clone %>%
  filter(heavy_chain_charge_change > 0) %>%
  pull(Clone)

light_gain_clone_ids <- light_chain_charge_by_clone %>%
  filter(light_chain_charge_change > 0) %>%
  pull(Clone)

net_gain_clone_ids <- net_charge_change_by_clone %>%
  filter(net_charge_change > 0) %>%
  pull(Clone)

wuhan_omicron_charge_group_delta_long <- bind_rows(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
    filter(Clone %in% heavy_gain_clone_ids) %>%
    mutate(Charge_Group = "Heavy chain gain"),
  
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
    filter(Clone %in% light_gain_clone_ids) %>%
    mutate(Charge_Group = "Light chain gain"),
  
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
    filter(Clone %in% net_gain_clone_ids) %>%
    mutate(Charge_Group = "Net charge gain")
) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Wuhan_delta_auc, Omicron_delta_auc),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Delta_auc"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Antigen = factor(
      Antigen,
      levels = c("Wuhan_delta_auc", "Omicron_delta_auc"),
      labels = c("Wuhan", "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)")
    ),
    Charge_Group = factor(
      Charge_Group,
      levels = c("Heavy chain gain", "Light chain gain", "Net charge gain")
    )
  )

wuhan_omicron_charge_group_stats <- bind_rows(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
    filter(Clone %in% heavy_gain_clone_ids) %>%
    summarise(
      Charge_Group = "Heavy chain gain",
      p_value = wilcox.test(
        Wuhan_delta_auc,
        Omicron_delta_auc,
        paired = TRUE
      )$p.value
    ),
  
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
    filter(Clone %in% light_gain_clone_ids) %>%
    summarise(
      Charge_Group = "Light chain gain",
      p_value = wilcox.test(
        Wuhan_delta_auc,
        Omicron_delta_auc,
        paired = TRUE
      )$p.value
    ),
  
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
    filter(Clone %in% net_gain_clone_ids) %>%
    summarise(
      Charge_Group = "Net charge gain",
      p_value = wilcox.test(
        Wuhan_delta_auc,
        Omicron_delta_auc,
        paired = TRUE
      )$p.value
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = ifelse(
      p_value < 0.05,
      ifelse(
        p_value < 0.001,
        "***",
        ifelse(p_value < 0.01, "**", "*")
      ),
      paste0("p = ", signif(p_value, 2))
    )
  )

wuhan_omicron_charge_group_positions <- wuhan_omicron_charge_group_delta_long %>%
  group_by(Charge_Group) %>%
  summarise(
    ymax = max(Delta_auc, na.rm = TRUE),
    ymin = min(Delta_auc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    yrange = ifelse(ymax > ymin, ymax - ymin, 1),
    y_bracket = ymax + 0.12 * yrange,
    y_label = ymax + 0.18 * yrange
  )

wuhan_omicron_charge_group_annotations <- wuhan_omicron_charge_group_stats %>%
  left_join(wuhan_omicron_charge_group_positions, by = "Charge_Group")

wuhan_omicron_charge_group_colors <- c(
  "Wuhan" = "firebrick",
  "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)" = "forestgreen"
)

wuhan_omicron_charge_group_plot <- ggplot(
  wuhan_omicron_charge_group_delta_long,
  aes(x = Antigen, y = Delta_auc, fill = Antigen)
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    alpha = 0.6,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width = 0.55
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(group = Clone),
    color = "grey60",
    alpha = 0.6,
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(color = Antigen),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.06, height = 0),
    size = 3.2,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Charge_Group, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wuhan_omicron_charge_group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wuhan_omicron_charge_group_colors) +
  geom_segment(
    data = wuhan_omicron_charge_group_annotations,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = wuhan_omicron_charge_group_annotations,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.02 * yrange),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = wuhan_omicron_charge_group_annotations,
    aes(x = 2, xend = 2, y = y_bracket, yend = y_bracket - 0.02 * yrange),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = wuhan_omicron_charge_group_annotations,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = y_label, label = p_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Wuhan vs Omicron ΔAUC Across Charge Gain Categories",
    x = "",
    y = "ΔAUC (Patient-derived − Germline)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.1),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

wuhan_omicron_charge_group_plot

heavy_gain_clone_ids <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(CDR == "Total", Chain == "Heavy Chain", Charge_Change > 0) %>%
  pull(Sequence_ID)

light_gain_clone_ids <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(CDR == "Total", Chain == "Light Chain", Charge_Change > 0) %>%
  pull(Sequence_ID)

net_gain_clone_ids <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(CDR == "Total") %>%
  group_by(Sequence_ID) %>%
  summarise(net_charge_change = sum(Charge_Change), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(net_charge_change > 0) %>%
  pull(Sequence_ID)

heavy_gain_test <- wilcox.test(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Wuhan_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% heavy_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Omicron_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% heavy_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  paired = TRUE
)

light_gain_test <- wilcox.test(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Wuhan_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% light_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Omicron_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% light_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  paired = TRUE
)

net_gain_test <- wilcox.test(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Wuhan_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% net_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Omicron_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% net_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  paired = TRUE
)
charge_gain_stats <- data.frame(
  Group = c("Heavy chain gain", "Light chain gain", "Net charge gain"),
  p_value = c(
    heavy_gain_test$p.value,
    light_gain_test$p.value,
    net_gain_test$p.value
  )
)

library(dplyr)

heavy_cdr1_gain_clone_ids <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(
    Chain == "Heavy Chain",
    CDR == "CDR1",
    Charge_Change > 0
  ) %>%
  pull(Sequence_ID)

heavy_cdr2_gain_clone_ids <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(
    Chain == "Heavy Chain",
    CDR == "CDR2",
    Charge_Change > 0
  ) %>%
  pull(Sequence_ID)

heavy_cdr3_gain_clone_ids <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(
    Chain == "Heavy Chain",
    CDR == "CDR3",
    Charge_Change > 0
  ) %>%
  pull(Sequence_ID)
cdr1_test <- wilcox.test(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Wuhan_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% heavy_cdr1_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Omicron_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% heavy_cdr1_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  paired = TRUE
)

cdr2_test <- wilcox.test(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Wuhan_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% heavy_cdr2_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Omicron_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% heavy_cdr2_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  paired = TRUE
)

cdr3_test <- wilcox.test(
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Wuhan_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% heavy_cdr3_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Omicron_delta_auc[
    wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone$Clone %in% heavy_cdr3_gain_clone_ids
  ],
  paired = TRUE
)

heavy_cdr_stats <- data.frame(
  CDR = c("CDR1", "CDR2", "CDR3"),
  p_value = c(
    cdr1_test$p.value,
    cdr2_test$p.value,
    cdr3_test$p.value
  )
)
library(dplyr)

heavy_chain_charge_total_by_clone <- Combined_long %>%
  filter(
    CDR == "Total",
    Chain == "Heavy Chain"
  ) %>%
  select(
    Clone = Sequence_ID,
    heavy_chain_charge_change = Charge_Change
  )

wuhan_omicron_charge_correlation_df <- wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
  mutate(
    variant_delta_auc = Omicron_delta_auc - Wuhan_delta_auc
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    heavy_chain_charge_total_by_clone,
    by = "Clone"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(heavy_chain_charge_change))

charge_binding_correlation_test <- cor.test(
  wuhan_omicron_charge_correlation_df$heavy_chain_charge_change,
  wuhan_omicron_charge_correlation_df$variant_delta_auc,
  method = "spearman"
)

rho_val <- charge_binding_correlation_test$estimate
p_val <- charge_binding_correlation_test$p.value

library(ggplot2)

charge_binding_correlation_plot <- ggplot(
  wuhan_omicron_charge_correlation_df,
  aes(
    x = heavy_chain_charge_change,
    y = variant_delta_auc
  )
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(
    color = "black",
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.85
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    color = "firebrick",
    fill = "#F2B6A0",
    linewidth = 0.9,
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf,
    y = Inf,
    hjust = 1.1,
    vjust = 1.3,
    label = paste0(
      "rho = ", round(rho_val, 2),
      "\np = ", signif(p_val, 2),
      "\nn = ", nrow(wuhan_omicron_charge_correlation_df)
    ),
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Heavy Chain Charge Change vs Variant Binding Shift",
    x = "Heavy Chain Charge Change",
    y = "ΔAUC Difference (Omicron − Wuhan)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black")
  )

charge_binding_correlation_plot

  wuhan_omicron_charge_vs_binding_df$Wuhan_delta_auc,

)
omicron_charge_corr <- cor.test(

)
variant_shift_charge_corr <- cor.test(
  wuhan_omicron_charge_vs_binding_df$HC_total_charge_PAT,
  wuhan_omicron_charge_vs_binding_df$variant_delta_auc,
  method = "spearman"
)

  filter(
    !is.na(Charge_CDR1_PAT),

  )
cdr1_corr <- cor.test(
  wuhan_omicron_cdr_charge_df$Charge_CDR1_PAT,
  wuhan_omicron_cdr_charge_df$variant_delta_auc,
  method = "spearman"
)

cdr2_corr <- cor.test(
  wuhan_omicron_cdr_charge_df$Charge_CDR2_PAT,

)

cdr3_corr <- cor.test(

)


library(tidyr)

wuhan_omicron_cdr_charge_long <- wuhan_omicron_cdr_charge_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Charge_CDR"),
    names_to = "CDR",
    values_to = "Charge"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CDR = recode(
      CDR,
      Charge_CDR1_PAT = "CDR1",
      Charge_CDR2_PAT = "CDR2",
      Charge_CDR3_PAT = "CDR3"
    ),
    CDR = factor(CDR, levels = c("CDR1", "CDR2", "CDR3"))
  )

cdr_stats_df <- data.frame(
  CDR = c("CDR1", "CDR2", "CDR3"),
  rho = c(

    cdr2_corr$estimate,
    cdr3_corr$estimate

    cdr2_corr$p.value,
    cdr3_corr$p.value
  )
)

  left_join(net_charge_change_by_clone, by = "Clone") %>%

)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

variant_dsdna_correlation_df <- wuhan_omicron_delta_auc_by_clone %>%
  mutate(
    variant_binding_difference = Omicron_delta_auc - Wuhan_delta_auc
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    dsDNA_paired %>%
      mutate(
        dsdna_binding_difference = `Patient-derived` - Germline
      ) %>%
      select(Clone, dsdna_binding_difference),
    by = "Clone"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(variant_binding_difference),
    !is.na(dsdna_binding_difference)
  )

variant_dsdna_correlation_test <- cor.test(
  variant_dsdna_correlation_df$variant_binding_difference,
  variant_dsdna_correlation_df$dsdna_binding_difference,
  method = "spearman"
)

variant_dsdna_rho <- unname(variant_dsdna_correlation_test$estimate)
variant_dsdna_p <- variant_dsdna_correlation_test$p.value

variant_dsdna_correlation_plot <- ggplot(
  variant_dsdna_correlation_df,
  aes(
    x = variant_binding_difference,
    y = dsdna_binding_difference
  )
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8, color = "grey50") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8, color = "grey50") +
  geom_point(
    size = 3.2,
    alpha = 0.9,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    linewidth = 0.9,
    color = "firebrick",
    fill = "#F2B6A0",
    alpha = 0.4
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf,
    y = Inf,
    hjust = 1.1,
    vjust = 1.3,
    label = paste0(
      "rho = ", round(variant_dsdna_rho, 2),
      "\np = ", signif(variant_dsdna_p, 2),
      "\nn = ", nrow(variant_dsdna_correlation_df)
    ),
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Variant Binding Difference vs dsDNA Binding Difference",
    x = "Binding Difference (Omicron ΔAUC - Wuhan ΔAUC)",
    y = "dsDNA Binding Difference (Patient-derived - Germline)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  )

variant_dsdna_correlation_plot
variant_dsdna_correlation_test

dsDNA_df <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Wen Lab Stuff/ELISAs/Monoclonal Analysis/AUC_Germ_DATA_new/dsDNA Germline AUC 4.3.26.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(
    Clone = trimws(as.character(Clone)),
    Group = trimws(as.character(Group)),
    OD_mean = rowMeans(cbind(OD1, OD2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

dsDNA_auc <- dsDNA_df %>%
  group_by(Group, Clone) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz_auc(Concentration, OD_mean, "log10"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Germline", "Patient-derived"))
  )

dsDNA_patient_only <- dsDNA_auc %>%
  filter(Group == "Patient-derived") %>%
  select(Clone, dsdna_patient_auc = AUC)

  )

  "B.1.1.529 (Omicron)" = "forestgreen"
)

  mutate(ssDNA_delta = `Patient-derived` - Germline) %>%
  dplyr::select(Clone, ssDNA_delta)

s2_dna_delta_df <- s2_delta_df %>%
  left_join(dsDNA_delta_df, by = "Clone") %>%
  left_join(ssDNA_delta_df, by = "Clone") %>%
  na.omit()
cor.test(s2_dna_delta_df$S2_delta, s2_dna_delta_df$dsDNA_delta, method = "spearman")
cor.test(s2_dna_delta_df$S2_delta, s2_dna_delta_df$ssDNA_delta, method = "spearman")

s2_dna_binary_df <- s2_dna_delta_df %>%
  mutate(
    S2_gain    = S2_delta > 0,
    dsDNA_gain = dsDNA_delta > 0,
    ssDNA_gain = ssDNA_delta > 0
  )
fisher.test(table(s2_dna_binary_df$S2_gain, s2_dna_binary_df$dsDNA_gain))
fisher.test(table(s2_dna_binary_df$S2_gain, s2_dna_binary_df$ssDNA_gain))

ggplot(s2_dna_delta_df, aes(x = S2_delta, y = dsDNA_delta)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "firebrick", fill = "#F2B6A0") +
  labs(
    x = "ΔAUC S2 (Patient-derived − Germline)",
    y = "ΔAUC dsDNA",
    title = "S2 Gain vs dsDNA Gain"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial")
ggplot(s2_dna_binary_df, aes(x = S2_delta, y = dsDNA_delta)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  geom_point(
    aes(color = S2_gain),
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "gray50", "TRUE" = "firebrick"),
    labels = c("No S2 gain", "S2 gain")
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "ΔAUC S2",
    y = "ΔAUC dsDNA",
    color = "",
    title = "S2 Gain Tracks with dsDNA Reactivity Gain"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
dna_binary_long <- s2_dna_binary_df %>%
  dplyr::select(Clone, S2_gain, dsDNA_gain, ssDNA_gain) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(dsDNA_gain, ssDNA_gain),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "DNA_gain"
  )
dna_binary_counts <- dna_binary_long %>%
  dplyr::count(S2_gain, DNA_gain, Antigen)
ggplot(dna_binary_counts, aes(x = S2_gain, y = DNA_gain, fill = n)) +
  geom_tile(color = "black") +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Antigen) +
  
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "firebrick") +
  
  labs(
    x = "S2 Gain",
    y = "DNA Gain",
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

PF4_delta_df <- PF4_auc %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Group,
    values_from = AUC
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    PF4_delta = `Patient-derived` - Germline
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Clone, PF4_delta)

s2_autoantigen_delta_df <- s2_delta_df %>%
  left_join(dsDNA_delta_df, by = "Clone") %>%
  left_join(ssDNA_delta_df, by = "Clone") %>%
  left_join(PF4_delta_df, by = "Clone") %>%
  na.omit()

s2_autoantigen_binary_df <- s2_autoantigen_delta_df %>%
  mutate(
    S2_gain = S2_delta > 0,
    dsDNA_gain = dsDNA_delta > 0,
    ssDNA_gain = ssDNA_delta > 0,
    PF4_Heparin_gain = PF4_delta > 0
  )


fisher.test(table(s2_autoantigen_binary_df$S2_gain, s2_autoantigen_binary_df$dsDNA_gain))
fisher.test(table(s2_autoantigen_binary_df$S2_gain, s2_autoantigen_binary_df$ssDNA_gain))
fisher.test(table(s2_autoantigen_binary_df$S2_gain, s2_autoantigen_binary_df$PF4_Heparin_gain))

autoantigen_binary_long <- s2_autoantigen_binary_df %>%
  dplyr::select(Clone, S2_gain, dsDNA_gain, ssDNA_gain, PF4_Heparin_gain) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(dsDNA_gain, ssDNA_gain, PF4_Heparin_gain),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Autoantigen_gain"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Antigen = recode(
      Antigen,
      dsDNA_gain = "dsDNA",
      ssDNA_gain = "ssDNA",
      PF4_Heparin_gain = "PF4/Heparin"
    ),
    Antigen = factor(Antigen, levels = c("dsDNA", "ssDNA", "PF4/Heparin"))
  )

autoantigen_binary_counts <- autoantigen_binary_long %>%
  dplyr::count(S2_gain, Autoantigen_gain, Antigen)

autoantigen_binary_heatmap <- ggplot(
  autoantigen_binary_counts,
  aes(x = S2_gain, y = Autoantigen_gain, fill = n)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "black") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Antigen) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "firebrick") +
  labs(
    x = "S2 Gain",
    y = "Autoantigen Gain",
    fill = "n"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

autoantigen_binary_heatmap
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/autoantigen_binary_heatmap.png",
  autoantigen_binary_heatmap,
  dpi = 600, width = 10, height = 4, bg = "white"
)
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/autoantigen_binary_heatmap.svg",
  autoantigen_binary_heatmap,
  dpi = 600, width = 10, height = 4, bg = "white"
)
```

```{r Reverting Germline Clones from Other Sources}
  )
)

# Quick sanity check (first few columns)

# --- Paths (update only if yours differ) ---
seq_fasta    <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Convalescent_nt.fasta"
igblast_root <- "/home/wen-lab/software/ncbi-igblast-1.20.0"
igblast_bin  <- file.path(igblast_root, "bin")
out_airr     <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Convalescent_igblast.tsv"

# BLAST DB *basenames* (no .nin/.nsq extension)
v_db <- path.expand("~/share/igblast/database/imgt_human_ig_v")
d_db <- path.expand("~/share/igblast/database/imgt_human_ig_d")
j_db <- path.expand("~/share/igblast/database/imgt_human_ig_j")
c_db <- file.path(igblast_root, "database", "imgt_human_ig_c")  # optional; ok if missing
c_src_imgt <- path.expand("~/share/imgt/human/constant/imgt_human_IGHC.fasta")   # from your IMGT download
c_clean_fa <- path.expand("~/share/igblast/fasta/imgt_human_ig_c.fasta")
c_db       <- path.expand("~/share/igblast/database/imgt_human_ig_c")
# --- Sanity checks ---

# helpers
ck_db <- function(base) all(file.exists(paste0(base, c(".nin",".nsq",".nhr"))))
sh   <- function(cmd) system(cmd, intern = FALSE, ignore.stdout = FALSE, ignore.stderr = FALSE)

# env
Sys.setenv(PATH   = paste(igblast_bin, Sys.getenv("PATH"), sep=":"),
           IGDATA = file.path(igblast_root, "internal_data"))

# 1) Clean C-region fasta (only if needed)
if (!file.exists(c_clean_fa)) {
  stopifnot(file.exists(c_src_imgt))
  cleaner <- path.expand("~/bin/imgt_clean.py")
  stopifnot(file.exists(cleaner))
  sh(sprintf("python3 %s %s %s", shQuote(cleaner), shQuote(c_src_imgt), shQuote(c_clean_fa)))
}

# 2) Build BLAST DB for C (only if needed)
if (!ck_db(c_db)) {
  sh(sprintf("%s/makeblastdb -parse_seqids -dbtype nucl -in %s -out %s",
             igblast_bin, shQuote(c_clean_fa), shQuote(c_db)))
  stopifnot(ck_db(c_db))
}

# 3) Sanity checks for everything
stopifnot(file.exists(seq_fasta),
          dir.exists(file.path(igblast_root, "internal_data")),
          ck_db(v_db), ck_db(d_db), ck_db(j_db), ck_db(c_db))

# 4) Run AssignGenes.py with explicit DB basenames (including C)
args <- c(
  "igblast",
  "-s", seq_fasta,
  "-b", igblast_root,
  "--exec", file.path(igblast_bin, "igblastn"),
  "--organism", "human",
  "--loci", "ig",
  "--format", "airr",
  "--vdb", v_db,
  "--ddb", d_db,
  "--jdb", j_db,
  "--cdb", c_db,
  "-o", out_airr
)

# quick peek

germ_db <- airr::read_rearrangement("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Convalescent_germ_germ-pass.tsv")

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(Biostrings)

germ_db <- read_tsv("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Convalescent_germline2.tsv")

clean_germline <- function(seq_align, germ_align) {
  # Sanity checks
  if (is.na(seq_align) || is.na(germ_align)) return(NA_character_)
  seq_chars  <- strsplit(seq_align, "")[[1]]
  germ_chars <- strsplit(germ_align, "")[[1]]
  if (length(seq_chars) != length(germ_chars)) return(NA_character_)
  
  # Replace Ns in germline with corresponding sequence base
  filled <- mapply(function(g, s) ifelse(g == "N", s, g), germ_chars, seq_chars)
  # Remove IMGT gap characters "."
  cleaned <- filled[filled != "."]
  paste0(cleaned, collapse = "")
}

germ_db <- germ_db %>%
  mutate(germline_filled = mapply(clean_germline, sequence_alignment, germline_alignment))

writeXStringSet(
  DNAStringSet(germ_db$germline_filled),
  filepath = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Convalescent_germline_cleaned.fasta",
  format = "fasta",
  width = 80,
  names = germ_db$sequence_id
)

message("✅ Cleaned germline FASTA written to Convalescent_germline_cleaned.fasta")

sum(grepl("N", germ_db$germline_filled, fixed = TRUE))
germ_db <- germ_db %>%
  mutate(
    germline_filled = mapply(clean_germline, sequence_alignment, germline_alignment),
    len_seq = nchar(sequence_alignment),
    len_germ_filled = nchar(germline_filled),
    len_match = len_seq == len_germ_filled
  )
table(germ_db$len_match) 
library(Biostrings)
library(dplyr)

# Assuming 'germ_db' (or 'cleaned_df') exists from before
cleaned_df <- germ_db %>% filter(len_match)

batch_size <- 50
num_batches <- ceiling(nrow(cleaned_df) / batch_size)

for (i in seq_len(num_batches)) {
  start <- ((i - 1) * batch_size) + 1
  end   <- min(i * batch_size, nrow(cleaned_df))
  batch_subset <- cleaned_df[start:end, ]

  # Create the DNAStringSet and assign names directly
  fasta_seqs <- DNAStringSet(batch_subset$germline_filled)
  names(fasta_seqs) <- batch_subset$sequence_id

  out_fasta <- sprintf(
    "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Convalescent_germline_cleaned_batch_%02d.fasta",
    i
  )

  writeXStringSet(
    fasta_seqs,
    filepath = out_fasta,
    format = "fasta",
    width = 80
  )

  message("✅ Wrote batch ", i, " (", nrow(batch_subset), " sequences) → ", out_fasta)
}

message("🎉 All batches written successfully (", num_batches, " total). Ready for IMGT upload.")


library(dplyr)
library(Biostrings)

# Make sure germline_alignment is uppercase DNA
germ_db <- germ_db %>%
  mutate(germline_alignment = toupper(germline_alignment))

germ_db <- germ_db %>%
  mutate(
    CDR3_germ_nt = ifelse(
      !is.na(cdr3_start) & !is.na(cdr3_end) &
        cdr3_start > 0 & cdr3_end <= nchar(germline_alignment),
      substr(germline_alignment, cdr3_start, cdr3_end),
      NA
    )
  )

germ_db <- germ_db %>%
  mutate(
    CDR3_germ_aa = ifelse(
      !is.na(CDR3_germ_nt),
      as.character(translate(DNAStringSet(CDR3_germ_nt), if.fuzzy.codon = "X")),
      NA
    ),
    CDR3_patient = cdr3_aa
  )

germ_db %>%
  select(sequence_id, cdr3_start, cdr3_end, CDR3_patient, CDR3_germ_aa) %>%
  head(10)

cov_abdab <- read_csv("/home/wen-lab/Downloads/CoV-AbDab_080224.csv")

cov_abdab <- cov_abdab %>%
  filter(cov_abdab$`Binds to` == "SARS-CoV2_WT")

library(rentrez)     # For accessing NCBI GenBank
library(Biostrings)  # For handling FASTA sequences
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

# Generate accession numbers from MW457639 to MW458926
accessions <- sprintf("MW%d", 457639:458926)

# Helper to fetch a block of accessions safely
fetch_batch <- function(accs) {
  fasta_data <- entrez_fetch(db = "nucleotide", id = accs,
                             rettype = "fasta", retmode = "text")
  fasta_data
}

# Split into chunks of ~100 to avoid rate limits
chunks <- split(accessions, ceiling(seq_along(accessions)/100))
seqs_raw <- sapply(chunks, fetch_batch)

# Combine into one FASTA string
fasta_all <- paste(seqs_raw, collapse = "\n")

temp_fasta <- tempfile(fileext = ".fasta")
writeLines(fasta_all, temp_fasta)
seqs <- readDNAStringSet(temp_fasta)

names_cleaned <- names(seqs) %>%
  str_extract("ADI-[0-9]+")  # Extract the ADI ID only
names(seqs) <- names_cleaned

seqs <- seqs[!is.na(names(seqs))]

writeXStringSet(seqs, filepath = "CovAbDab_HC_Wuhan_ADI_sequences.fasta")

seqs[1:5]

library(readxl)

# Define file path
CovAbDab_Kd <- read_excel("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/CovAbDab_Analysis/CovAbDab_Kds.xlsx")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)

CovAbDab_filtered <- CovAbDab_Kd %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Antigenic Site`),
         !str_detect(`Antigenic Site`, regex("Undefined", ignore_case = TRUE)))

SARS2_cols <- grep("^SARS-CoV-2.*KD \\(M\\)", names(CovAbDab_filtered), value = TRUE)

kd_long <- CovAbDab_filtered %>%
  select(`Clone Name`, `Antigenic Site`, all_of(SARS2_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(SARS2_cols),
    names_to = "Antigen",
    values_to = "Kd_M"
  )

kd_long <- kd_long %>%
  mutate(
    Kd_M_clean = str_replace_all(Kd_M, "[^0-9eE.-]", ""),  # remove <, >, ND, etc.
    Kd_M_clean = as.numeric(Kd_M_clean)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Kd_M_clean))  # remove NA or missing numeric conversions

# thresholds:
# High (sub-nM): <1e-9 M
# High: 1e-9–1e-8 M
# Moderate: 1e-8–1e-7 M
# Low: >1e-7 M
# thresholds:
# Very High: <1e-9 M
# High: 1e-9–1e-8 M
# Moderate: 1e-8–1e-7 M
# Low: >1e-7 M

kd_long <- kd_long %>%
  mutate(
    Affinity_Class = case_when(
      Kd_M_clean < 1e-9 ~ "Very High (<1e-9 M)",
      Kd_M_clean < 1e-8 ~ "High",
      Kd_M_clean < 1e-7 ~ "Moderate",
      TRUE              ~ "Low"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Affinity_Class = factor(
      Affinity_Class,
      levels = c("Low", "Moderate", "High", "Very High (<1e-9 M)"),
      labels = c(
        "Low (>1e-7 M)",
        "Moderate (1e-8–1e-7 M)",
        "High (1e-9–1e-8 M)",
        "Very High (<1e-9 M)"
      )
    )
  )


affinity_summary <- kd_long %>%
  count(Affinity_Class, sort = TRUE)

print(affinity_summary)
affinity_plot_antigens<- ggplot(kd_long, aes(x = `Antigenic Site`, fill = Affinity_Class)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Low (>1e-7 M)"          = "#BEBEBE",
      "Moderate (1e-8–1e-7 M)" = "#DAA520",
      "High (1e-9–1e-8 M)"     = "#B22222",
      "Very High (<1e-9 M)"    = "#8B0000"
    ),
    name = "Affinity Classification (Kd, M)"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +   # <<<< add this
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Fraction of Antibodies",
    title = "Affinity Distribution Across SARS-CoV-2 Antigenic Sites"
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 20),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = "black"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.0),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

# save high-resolution output
ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Affinity_Distribution_by_Antigenic_Site.png",
  affinity_plot_antigens,
  dpi = 600, width = 14, height = 6, bg = "white"
)

```

```{r Generating GermvsPat Charge Ratios}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)

aa_charge <- c(
  K = 1, R = 1, H = 1,          # positive
  D = -1, E = -1,               # negative
  A = 0, C = 0, G = 0, F = 0, I = 0, L = 0, M = 0, N = 0, P = 0,
  Q = 0, S = 0, T = 0, V = 0, W = 0, Y = 0,
  "-" = 0, X = 0, "*" = 0
)

compute_matched_charge_ratio <- function(patient_seq, germ_seq) {
  if (is.na(patient_seq) || is.na(germ_seq)) 
    return(c(patient = NA_real_, germline = NA_real_))
  
  # Split and align
  pat_split <- unlist(strsplit(toupper(patient_seq), ""))
  germ_split <- unlist(strsplit(toupper(germ_seq), ""))
  min_len <- min(length(pat_split), length(germ_split))
  if (min_len == 0) 
    return(c(patient = NA_real_, germline = NA_real_))
  
  pat_split <- pat_split[1:min_len]
  germ_split <- germ_split[1:min_len]
  
  # Filter out 'X' positions in germline
  keep_idx <- which(germ_split != "X")
  if (length(keep_idx) == 0)
    return(c(patient = NA_real_, germline = NA_real_))
  
  pat_filtered <- pat_split[keep_idx]
  germ_filtered <- germ_split[keep_idx]
  
  # Compute ratios
  pat_charge <- sum(aa_charge[pat_filtered], na.rm = TRUE) / length(pat_filtered)
  germ_charge <- sum(aa_charge[germ_filtered], na.rm = TRUE) / length(germ_filtered)
  
  return(c(patient = pat_charge, germline = germ_charge))
}

germ_db_processed <- germ_db %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    tmp = list(compute_matched_charge_ratio(CDR3_patient, CDR3_germ_aa)),
    patient_charge_ratio = tmp["patient"],
    germline_charge_ratio = tmp["germline"],
    delta_charge_ratio = patient_charge_ratio - germline_charge_ratio
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-tmp)

germ_db_filtered <- germ_db_processed %>%
  filter(!is.na(patient_charge_ratio),
         !is.na(germline_charge_ratio),
         patient_charge_ratio != germline_charge_ratio)



germ_long <- germ_db_filtered %>%
  select(CDR3_patient, patient_charge_ratio, germline_charge_ratio) %>%
  mutate(ID = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(patient_charge_ratio, germline_charge_ratio),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "Charge_Ratio"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Type = factor(Type,
                       levels = c("germline_charge_ratio", "patient_charge_ratio"),
                       labels = c("Germline CDR3", "Patient CDR3")))


wilcox_res <- wilcox.test(
  germ_db_filtered$patient_charge_ratio,
  germ_db_filtered$germline_charge_ratio,
  paired = TRUE,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

pval <- wilcox_res$p.value

cdr3_colors <- c("#D2B48C", "#800000")  # tan (germline), maroon (patient)

cdr3_pair_plot <- ggpaired(
  germ_long,
  x = "Type",
  y = "Charge_Ratio",
  id = "ID",
  line.color = "gray70",
  line.size = 0.7,
  palette = c("#D2B48C", "#800000")  # tan & maroon
) +
  stat_compare_means(
    paired = TRUE,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    size = 6,
    label.y = max(germ_long$Charge_Ratio, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.03,  # middle of Y range
    label.x = 1.5,   # halfway between Germline (1) and Patient (2)
    hjust = 0.5      # center align
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("CDR3 Charge Ratio Comparison (Filtered for Shared Positions)\n",
                   "Wilcoxon paired test"),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Normalized Charge Ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/CDR3_Charge_Matched_Positions.png",
       cdr3_pair_plot, dpi = 600, width = 9, height = 5, bg = "white")

cdr3_summary <- germ_db_processed %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Germline = mean(germline_charge_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_Patient = mean(patient_charge_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_Delta = mean(delta_charge_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_Delta = median(delta_charge_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    Wilcoxon_p = pval
  )

cdr3_summary

#CovAbDab
names(CovAbDab_merged)[82] <- "Patient_CDR3"

compute_matched_charge_ratio <- function(patient_seq, germ_seq) {
  if (is.na(patient_seq) || is.na(germ_seq)) 
    return(c(patient = NA_real_, germline = NA_real_))
  
  pat_split <- unlist(strsplit(toupper(patient_seq), ""))
  germ_split <- unlist(strsplit(toupper(germ_seq), ""))
  min_len <- min(length(pat_split), length(germ_split))
  if (min_len == 0) 
    return(c(patient = NA_real_, germline = NA_real_))
  
  pat_split <- pat_split[1:min_len]
  germ_split <- germ_split[1:min_len]
  
  keep_idx <- which(germ_split != "X")
  if (length(keep_idx) == 0)
    return(c(patient = NA_real_, germline = NA_real_))
  
  pat_filtered <- pat_split[keep_idx]
  germ_filtered <- germ_split[keep_idx]
  
  aa_charge <- c(
    K = 1, R = 1, H = 1,
    D = -1, E = -1,
    A = 0, C = 0, G = 0, F = 0, I = 0, L = 0, M = 0, N = 0, P = 0,
    Q = 0, S = 0, T = 0, V = 0, W = 0, Y = 0,
    "-" = 0, X = 0, "*" = 0
  )
  
  pat_charge <- sum(aa_charge[pat_filtered], na.rm = TRUE) / length(pat_filtered)
  germ_charge <- sum(aa_charge[germ_filtered], na.rm = TRUE) / length(germ_filtered)
  
  return(c(patient = pat_charge, germline = germ_charge))
}

CovAbDab_processed <- CovAbDab_merged %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    tmp = list(compute_matched_charge_ratio(Patient_CDR3, Germline_CDR3)),
    patient_charge_ratio = tmp["patient"],
    germline_charge_ratio = tmp["germline"],
    delta_charge_ratio = patient_charge_ratio - germline_charge_ratio
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-tmp)

CovAbDab_filtered <- CovAbDab_processed %>%
  filter(!is.na(patient_charge_ratio),
         !is.na(germline_charge_ratio),
         patient_charge_ratio != germline_charge_ratio)
CovAbDab_long <- CovAbDab_filtered %>%
  mutate(ID = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(patient_charge_ratio, germline_charge_ratio),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "Charge_Ratio"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Type = factor(Type,
                       levels = c("germline_charge_ratio", "patient_charge_ratio"),
                       labels = c("Germline CDR3", "Patient CDR3")))
library(ggpubr)

wilcox_res <- wilcox.test(
  CovAbDab_filtered$patient_charge_ratio,
  CovAbDab_filtered$germline_charge_ratio,
  paired = TRUE,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE
)

) +

#affinity comparison 
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
# merge kd_long (from previous code) into your CovAbDab_merged or CovAbDab_processed
CovAbDab_merged_affinity <- CovAbDab_processed %>%
  left_join(
    kd_long %>%
      select(`Clone Name`, Affinity_Class) %>%
      rename(Name = `Clone Name`),    # rename for consistent join
    by = "Name"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Affinity_Class)) 
# --- 2️⃣ Pivot to long format for plotting (same structure as before) ---
CovAbDab_long_affinity <- CovAbDab_merged_affinity %>%
  mutate(ID = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(patient_charge_ratio, germline_charge_ratio),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "Charge_Ratio"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Type = factor(Type,
                  levels = c("germline_charge_ratio", "patient_charge_ratio"),
                  labels = c("Germline CDR3", "Patient CDR3"))
  )
library(rstatix)
# --- 3️⃣ Paired Wilcoxon tests per affinity class ---
wilcox_affinity <- CovAbDab_long_affinity %>%
  group_by(Affinity_Class) %>%
  wilcox_test(Charge_Ratio ~ Type, paired = TRUE) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance("p.adj")

print(wilcox_affinity)

# --- 4️⃣ Plot paired charge ratios by affinity class ---
cdr3_affinity_plot <- ggpaired(
  CovAbDab_long_affinity,
  x = "Type",
  y = "Charge_Ratio",
  id = "ID",
  line.color = "gray70",
  line.size = 0.6,
  palette = c("#D2B48C", "#800000")
) +
  stat_compare_means(
    paired = TRUE,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    size = 5,
    label.x = 1.5,
    label.y = max(CovAbDab_long_affinity$Charge_Ratio, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.03
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Affinity_Class, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "CDR3 Charge Ratio Evolution by Antibody Affinity Class",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Normalized Charge Ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 18),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.0),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/CDR3_Charge_vs_Affinity_Class.png",
       cdr3_affinity_plot, dpi = 600, width = 12, height = 7, bg = "white")
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)

# --- 1️⃣ Merge affinity data using your 'Name' column ---
CovAbDab_merged_affinity <- CovAbDab_processed %>%
  left_join(
    kd_long %>%
      select(`Clone Name`, Affinity_Class) %>%
      rename(Name = `Clone Name`),
    by = "Name"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Affinity_Class),
         !is.na(`Protein + Epitope`))  # optional cleanup

# --- 2️⃣ Prepare data for plotting ---
CovAbDab_long_affinity <- CovAbDab_merged_affinity %>%
  mutate(ID = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(patient_charge_ratio, germline_charge_ratio),
    names_to = "Type",
    values_to = "Charge_Ratio"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Type = factor(Type,
                  levels = c("germline_charge_ratio", "patient_charge_ratio"),
                  labels = c("Germline CDR3", "Patient CDR3"))
  )

# --- 3️⃣ Paired Wilcoxon tests per Affinity_Class & Epitope ---
wilcox_affinity_epitope <- CovAbDab_long_affinity %>%
  group_by(`Protein + Epitope`, Affinity_Class) %>%
  rstatix::wilcox_test(Charge_Ratio ~ Type, paired = TRUE) %>%
  rstatix::adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  rstatix::add_significance("p.adj")

print(wilcox_affinity_epitope)

# --- 4️⃣ Plot: Facet by Epitope, color by Affinity class ---
cdr3_affinity_epitope_plot <- ggpaired(
  CovAbDab_long_affinity,
  x = "Type",
  y = "Charge_Ratio",
  id = "ID",
  line.color = "gray70",
  line.size = 0.6,
  palette = c("#D2B48C", "#800000")
) +
  stat_compare_means(
    paired = TRUE,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif",
    size = 4,
    label.x = 1.5,
    label.y = max(CovAbDab_long_affinity$Charge_Ratio, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.03
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(Affinity_Class),
    cols = vars(`Protein + Epitope`),
    scales = "free_y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge Ratio Evolution by Epitope and Affinity Class",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Normalized Charge Ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 18),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/CDR3_Charge_vs_Affinity_by_Epitope.png",
  cdr3_affinity_epitope_plot, dpi = 600, width = 20, height = 12, bg = "white"
)
```

```{r Identifying High Clones in }
library(dplyr)

  select(cell_id,
         v_call,

          germline_alignment_d_mask, sequence_alignment, locus)

LC_for_scoper <- LC_selected %>%
  left_join(Clone_Info %>% select(Sequence.ID, `Cloning ID`),
            by = c("cell_id" = "Sequence.ID"))

LC_for_scoper_filtered <- LC_for_scoper %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% High_clones$Clone_ID)

Combined_AbSeqs_Scoper %>%

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

Combined_AbSeqs_Scoper_clean <- Combined_AbSeqs_Scoper %>%
  mutate(
    Name = as.character(Name),
    junction = as.character(junction),
    v_call = as.character(v_call),
    j_call = as.character(j_call),
    sequence_alignment = as.character(sequence_alignment),
    germline_alignment_d_mask = as.character(germline_alignment_d_mask)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    junction = toupper(junction),
    junction = str_replace_all(junction, "\\s+", ""),  # remove spaces/tabs/newlines
    junction = str_trim(junction)                      # trim any stray whitespace
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(junction), junction != "")             # drop empty entries

Encoding(Combined_AbSeqs_Scoper_clean$junction) <- "UTF-8"

all_chars <- Combined_AbSeqs_Scoper_clean$junction %>%
  paste(collapse = "") %>%
  str_split("") %>%
  unlist() %>%
  unique()

setdiff(all_chars, unlist(strsplit("ACGTMRWSYKVHDBN-.?", "")))
Clone_Assignments <- identicalClones(
  Combined_AbSeqs_Scoper_clean,
  method = "nt",
  cell_id = "Name"
)

Results_df <- as.data.frame(Clone_Assignments)

sum(duplicated(Results_df$clone_id))
Repeats_df <- Results_df %>%
  filter(duplicated(clone_id) | duplicated(clone_id, fromLast = TRUE))
library(dplyr)

High_clone_VJ <- Combined_AbSeqs_Scoper %>%
  filter(Name %in% High_clones$Clone_ID) %>%
  distinct(v_call, j_call)

Matched_VJ_df <- Combined_AbSeqs_Scoper %>%
  semi_join(High_clone_VJ, by = c("v_call", "j_call"))

ADI_names <- Matched_VJ_df %>%
  filter(str_starts(Name, "ADI")) %>%
  pull(Name) %>%
  unique()

CovAbDab_ADI_subset <- CovAbDab_merged_affinity %>%
  filter(Name %in% ADI_names)

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# --- 1. Pair ADI ↔ Patient by VJ ---
Pairs <- CovAbDab_ADI_subset %>%
  select(Name_ADI = Name, v_call, j_call, ADI_seq = junction_aa) %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_for_scoper_filtered %>%
      select(Name_Patient = Name, v_call, j_call, Patient_seq = junction_aa),
    by = c("v_call", "j_call")
  )

# --- 2. Expand to residue-level comparison (no alignment) ---
expand_diffs <- function(adi, pat) {
  adi <- strsplit(adi, "")[[1]]
  pat <- strsplit(pat, "")[[1]]
  len <- min(length(adi), length(pat))
  tibble(
    pos = seq_len(len),
    ADI = adi[1:len],
    Patient = pat[1:len],
    Diff = adi[1:len] != pat[1:len]
  )
}

Expanded <- Pairs %>%
  mutate(Residues = map2(ADI_seq, Patient_seq, expand_diffs)) %>%
  unnest(Residues)

# --- 3. Pretty plot (Arial, bold, gray/red squares) ---
ggplot(Expanded, aes(x = pos, y = Name_Patient)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Diff), width = 0.95, height = 0.95, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Patient), family = "Arial", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Mismatch",
    values = c("FALSE" = "gray70", "TRUE" = "firebrick"),
    labels = c("Match", "Mismatch")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Name_ADI, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "CDR3 Amino Acid Position",
    y = "Patient Antibody",
    title = "ADI vs Patient CDR3 Comparison (Red = Mismatch)"
  )
library(dplyr)
library(pwalign)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

align_with_gaps <- function(s1, s2) {
  aln <- pwalign::pairwiseAlignment(s1, s2,
                                    substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
                                    gapOpening = -10,
                                    gapExtension = -1)
  tibble(
    pos = seq_len(nchar(pwalign::pattern(aln))),
    ADI = strsplit(as.character(pwalign::pattern(aln)), "")[[1]],
    Patient = strsplit(as.character(pwalign::subject(aln)), "")[[1]]
  ) %>%
    mutate(Diff = ADI != Patient)
}

# --- 2. Build aligned residue table for all VJ-matched pairs ---
Aligned_df <- CovAbDab_ADI_subset %>%
  select(Name_ADI = Name, v_call, j_call, ADI_seq = junction_aa) %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_for_scoper_filtered %>%
      select(Name_Patient = Name, v_call, j_call, Patient_seq = junction_aa),
    by = c("v_call", "j_call")
  ) %>%
  mutate(Residues = map2(ADI_seq, Patient_seq, align_with_gaps)) %>%
  unnest(Residues)

# --- 3. Pretty publication-style plot ---
ggplot(Aligned_df, aes(x = pos, y = Name_Patient)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Diff), width = 0.95, height = 0.95, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Patient),
            family = "Arial", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Residue Match",
    values = c("FALSE" = "gray70", "TRUE" = "firebrick"),
    labels = c("Match", "Mismatch")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Name_ADI, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Aligned CDR3 Position",
    y = "Patient Antibody",
    title = "ADI vs Patient CDR3 Alignments (Gaps as '-')"
  )

library(dplyr)
library(pwalign)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

library(dplyr)
library(pwalign)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# --- 1. Alignment with gaps ---
align_with_gaps <- function(s1, s2) {
  aln <- pwalign::pairwiseAlignment(s1, s2,
                                    substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
                                    gapOpening = -10,
                                    gapExtension = -1)
  tibble(
    pos = seq_len(nchar(pwalign::pattern(aln))),
    ADI_res = strsplit(as.character(pwalign::pattern(aln)), "")[[1]],
    Patient_res = strsplit(as.character(pwalign::subject(aln)), "")[[1]],
    Diff = ADI_res != Patient_res
  )
}

# --- 2. Build aligned dataset ---
Aligned_df <- CovAbDab_ADI_subset %>%
  select(Name_ADI = Name, v_call, j_call, ADI_seq = junction_aa) %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_for_scoper_filtered %>%
      select(Name_Patient = Name, v_call, j_call, Patient_seq = junction_aa),
    by = c("v_call", "j_call")
  ) %>%
  mutate(Residues = map2(ADI_seq, Patient_seq, align_with_gaps)) %>%
  unnest(Residues)

# --- 3. Stack patient on top of ADI (remove labels) ---
Stacked <- Aligned_df %>%
  mutate(Sequence_Label = Name_Patient,
         Residue = Patient_res,
         Source = "Patient") %>%
  bind_rows(
    Aligned_df %>%
      mutate(Sequence_Label = Name_ADI,
             Residue = ADI_res,
             Source = "ADI",
             Diff = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  # ensure patient rows come first (on top)
  mutate(Sequence_Label = factor(Sequence_Label, levels = unique(Sequence_Label))) %>%
  arrange(Name_ADI, desc(Source), Sequence_Label, pos)

# --- 4. Minimal clean alignment plot ---
p1<-ggplot(Stacked, aes(x = pos, y = Sequence_Label)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Residue, color = Diff),
            family = "Arial", fontface = "bold", size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("FALSE" = "gray20", "TRUE" = "firebrick")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Name_ADI, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_blank(),          # remove ADI labels above plots
    panel.grid = element_blank(),          # remove grid lines
    panel.border = element_blank(),        # remove boxes
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(title = "ADI vs Patient CDR3 Sequence Comparison (Red = Mismatch)")

ggsave(
  "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/image.png",
  p1, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300
)
library(dplyr)
library(pwalign)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

# --- 1. Alignment with gaps ---
align_with_gaps <- function(s1, s2) {
  aln <- pwalign::pairwiseAlignment(
    s1, s2,
    substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
    gapOpening = -10,
    gapExtension = -1
  )
  tibble(
    pos = seq_len(nchar(pwalign::pattern(aln))),
    ADI_res = strsplit(as.character(pwalign::pattern(aln)), "")[[1]],
    Patient_res = strsplit(as.character(pwalign::subject(aln)), "")[[1]],
    Diff = ADI_res != Patient_res
  )
}

# --- 2. Align all ADI–patient pairs that share V/J ---
Aligned_df <- CovAbDab_ADI_subset %>%
  select(Name_ADI = Name, v_call, j_call, ADI_seq = junction_aa) %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_for_scoper_filtered %>%
      select(Name_Patient = Name, v_call, j_call, Patient_seq = junction_aa),
    by = c("v_call", "j_call")
  ) %>%
  mutate(Residues = map2(ADI_seq, Patient_seq, align_with_gaps)) %>%
  unnest(Residues)

# --- 3. Stack: patient on top, ADI underneath; grouped by ADI antibody ---
Stacked <- Aligned_df %>%
  mutate(
    Pair_ID = paste(Name_ADI, Name_Patient, sep = " vs "),
    Sequence_Label = Name_Patient,
    Residue = Patient_res,
    Source = "Patient"
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(
    Aligned_df %>%
      mutate(
        Pair_ID = paste(Name_ADI, Name_Patient, sep = " vs "),
        Sequence_Label = Name_ADI,
        Residue = ADI_res,
        Source = "ADI",
        Diff = FALSE
      )
  ) %>%
  mutate(Source = factor(Source, levels = c("Patient", "ADI"))) %>%
  arrange(Name_ADI, Source, Name_Patient, pos) %>%
  mutate(
    Sequence_Label = factor(
      Sequence_Label,
      levels = rev(unique(Sequence_Label))
    )
  )

# --- 4. Plot (clean style, no labels or grid) ---
ADI_vs_HighClones <- ggplot(Stacked, aes(x = pos, y = Sequence_Label)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Residue, color = Diff),
            family = "Arial", fontface = "bold", size = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray20", "TRUE" = "firebrick")) +
  facet_wrap(~ Name_ADI, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_blank(),       # no ADI labels at top
    panel.grid = element_blank(),       # clean background
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/ADI_vs_HighClones_junction.png", 
       ADI_vs_HighClones, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

# ---- Filter to Spike-binding only ----
spike_df <- cov_abdab %>%
  filter(str_detect(`Protein + Epitope`, "^S;")) %>%
  mutate(
    Epitope = str_remove(`Protein + Epitope`, "^S;\\s*")
  )
# Charge at pH 7
aa_charge <- c(
  K = +1, R = +1, H = +0.1,
  D = -1, E = -1
)

calc_charge <- function(seq) {
  seq_vec <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  sum(aa_charge[seq_vec], na.rm = TRUE)
}
charge_df <- spike_df %>%
  mutate(
    Charge_H = map_dbl(VHorVHH, ~ calc_charge(.x)),
    Charge_L = map_dbl(VL,      ~ calc_charge(.x)),
    Charge_HCDR3 = map_dbl(CDRH3, ~ calc_charge(.x)),
    Charge_LCDR3 = map_dbl(CDRL3, ~ calc_charge(.x))
  )

extract_variants <- function(x) {
  if(is.na(x)) return(character(0))
  str_split(x, ";")[[1]] %>% str_trim()
}

charge_df <- charge_df %>%
  mutate(
    Neut = map(`Neutralising Vs`, extract_variants),
    NonNeut = map(`Not Neutralising Vs`, extract_variants)
  )
variant_df <- charge_df %>%
  mutate(Variant_Neut = Neut, Variant_NonNeut = NonNeut) %>%
  dplyr::select(Name, Epitope, Charge_H, Charge_L, Charge_HCDR3, Charge_LCDR3,
         Variant_Neut, Variant_NonNeut) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Variant_Neut, Variant_NonNeut),
    names_to = "Neutralization_Type",
    values_to = "Variants"
  ) %>%
  unnest(Variants) %>%
  mutate(
    Neutralizes = if_else(Neutralization_Type == "Variant_Neut", "Yes", "No")
  )
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(variant_df,
       aes(x = Variants, y = Charge_H, fill = Neutralizes)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Heavy-chain Charge Among Variant-specific Neutralizing Antibodies",
    y = "Charge at pH 7",
    x = "Variant"
  )
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

variant_df2 <- variant_df %>%
  mutate(
    Variant_Group = case_when(
      str_detect(Variants, regex("Wuhan|WT|WA1", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Wuhan",
      str_detect(Variants, regex("Alpha|B\\.1\\.1\\.7", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Alpha",
      str_detect(Variants, regex("Beta|B\\.1\\.351", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Beta",
      str_detect(Variants, regex("Delta|B\\.1\\.617\\.2", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Delta",
      str_detect(Variants, regex("Omicron|BA\\.", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Omicron",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )


ggplot(variant_df2,
       aes(x = Variant_Group, y = Charge_H, fill = Neutralizes)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.18, alpha = 0.35, size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("No" = "firebrick2", "Yes" = "dodgerblue3")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Heavy-chain Charge by Variant Group",
    x = "Variant Group",
    y = "Charge at pH 7"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

stats_summary <- variant_df2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Variant_Group, Neutralizes) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    mean_charge = mean(Charge_H, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_charge = sd(Charge_H, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_charge = median(Charge_H, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_charge = IQR(Charge_H, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


stats_summary
wilcox_tests <- variant_df2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Variant_Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch(
      wilcox.test(Charge_H ~ Neutralizes)$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


full_stats <- stats_summary %>%
  left_join(wilcox_tests, by = "Variant_Group")

full_stats

      str_detect(Epitope, regex("S1", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "S1",
      str_detect(Epitope, regex("S2", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "S2",
      TRUE ~ "Other_Spike_Region"
    )
  )

# ---- Variant plot ----
library(httr)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

get_wuhan_spike <- function() {
  url <- "https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/efetch.fcgi?db=protein&id=YP_009724390.1&rettype=fasta&retmode=text"
  resp <- httr::GET(url)
  fasta_txt <- httr::content(resp, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  
  lines <- unlist(strsplit(fasta_txt, "\n"))
  seq_lines <- lines[!grepl("^>", lines) & lines != ""]
  
  paste(seq_lines, collapse = "")
}

wuhan_seq <- get_wuhan_spike()

apply_mutations <- function(seq, muts) {
  seq_vec <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  
  subs <- muts[!grepl("del$", muts) & !grepl("^ins", muts)]
  dels <- muts[grepl("del$", muts)]
  ins  <- muts[grepl("^ins", muts)]
  
  for (m in subs) {
    pos <- as.numeric(str_extract(m, "\\d+"))
    from <- substr(m, 1, 1)
    to <- str_sub(m, -1, -1)
    
    if (!identical(seq_vec[pos], from)) {
      warning(
        paste0(
          "Expected ", from,
          " at position ", pos,
          " but found ", seq_vec[pos]
        )
      )
    }
    
    seq_vec[pos] <- to
  }
  
  for (m in rev(dels)) {
    pos <- as.numeric(str_extract(m, "\\d+"))
    seq_vec <- seq_vec[-pos]
  }
  
  for (m in ins) {
    pos <- as.numeric(str_extract(m, "\\d+"))
    ins_seq <- str_replace(m, "ins\\d+", "")
    ins_vec <- strsplit(ins_seq, "")[[1]]
    seq_vec <- append(seq_vec, ins_vec, after = pos)
  }
  
  paste(seq_vec, collapse = "")
}

alpha_muts <- c(
  "H69del","V70del","Y144del",
  "N501Y","A570D","D614G","P681H",
  "T716I","S982A","D1118H"
)

beta_muts <- c(
  "L18F","D80A","D215G",
  "L241del","L242del","A243del",
  "K417N","E484K","N501Y","D614G","A701V"
)

delta_muts <- c(
  "T19R","G142D","E156del","F157del","R158G",
  "L452R","T478K","D614G","P681R","D950N"
)

omicron_muts <- c(
  "A67V","H69del","V70del","T95I",
  "G142D","V143del","Y144del","Y145del",
  "N211del","L212I","ins214EPE",
  "G339D","S371L","S373P","S375F",
  "K417N","N440K","G446S",
  "S477N","T478K","E484A",
  "Q493R","G496S","Q498R","N501Y","Y505H",
  "T547K","D614G","H655Y",
  "N679K","P681H",
  "N764K","D796Y","N856K",
  "Q954H","N969K","L981F"
)



variant_seq_df <- tibble(
  Variant_Group = c("Wuhan","Alpha","Beta","Delta","Omicron"),
  mutation_list = list(
    character(0),
    alpha_muts,
    beta_muts,
    delta_muts,
    omicron_muts
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    Spike_Sequence = map_chr(mutation_list, ~ apply_mutations(wuhan_seq, .x))
  )
domain_df <- tibble(
  Epitope_Group = c("NTD","RBD","S1","S2"),
  start = c(14,330,14,686),
  end   = c(305,530,685,1273)
)
calc_charge <- function(seq, pH = 7.4) {
  aa <- strsplit(toupper(seq), "")[[1]]
  
  aa_charge <- function(residue, pH = 7.4) {
    pos_pka <- c(K = 10.5, R = 12.5, H = 6.0)
    neg_pka <- c(D = 3.9, E = 4.1, C = 8.3, Y = 10.1)
    
    charge <- 0
    
    if (residue %in% names(pos_pka)) {
      charge <- charge + 1 / (1 + 10^(pH - pos_pka[residue]))
    }
    
    if (residue %in% names(neg_pka)) {
      charge <- charge - 1 / (1 + 10^(neg_pka[residue] - pH))
    }
    
    charge
  }
  
  n_term_charge <- 1 / (1 + 10^(pH - 9.69))
  c_term_charge <- -1 / (1 + 10^(2.34 - pH))
  
  n_term_charge + c_term_charge + sum(vapply(aa, aa_charge, numeric(1), pH = pH))
}

extract_region <- function(seq, start, end) {
  substr(seq, start, end)
}

epitope_charge_df <- variant_seq_df %>%
  crossing(domain_df) %>%
  mutate(
    Epitope_Sequence = pmap_chr(
      list(Spike_Sequence, start, end),
      ~ extract_region(..1, ..2, ..3)
    ),
    epitope_charge = map_dbl(Epitope_Sequence, ~ calc_charge(.x, pH = 7.4))
  ) %>%
  select(Variant_Group, Epitope_Group, epitope_charge)

facet_ranges <- variant_epitope_df %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Group) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin = min(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    ymax = max(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    yrange = ymax - ymin,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    yrange = ifelse(yrange == 0, 1, yrange),

    stat_base   = ymax + 0.05 * yrange,

    # 🔥 increase spacing between comparisons
    stat_step   = 0.07 * yrange,

    # keep top boxes safely above
    top_box_y   = ymax + 0.6 * yrange,

    bottom_box_y = ymin - 0.25 * yrange
  )

mean_boxes <- variant_epitope_df %>%
  group_by(Variant_Group, Epitope_Group) %>%
  summarise(mean_charge = mean(Charge_HCDR3), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(facet_ranges, by = "Epitope_Group") %>%
  mutate(label = paste0("Mean ", round(mean_charge,2)))

top_boxes <- epitope_charge_df %>%
  left_join(facet_ranges, by = "Epitope_Group") %>%
  mutate(
    label = paste0("Subunit\ncharge ", round(epitope_charge, 2))
  )

library(FSA)

dunn_results <- variant_epitope_df %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Group) %>%
  do({
    df <- .
    
    if (length(unique(df$Variant_Group)) > 1) {
      res <- dunnTest(Charge_HCDR3 ~ Variant_Group, data = df, method = "bh")
      
      tibble(
        comparison = res$res$Comparison,
        p_adj = res$res$P.adj
      )
    } else {
      tibble(comparison = NA_character_, p_adj = NA_real_)
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(comparison))

library(stringr)

dunn_results <- dunn_results %>%
  separate(comparison, into = c("group1","group2"), sep = " - ") %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      p_adj < 0.0001 ~ "****",
      p_adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_adj < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_adj < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )
variant_levels <- levels(factor(variant_epitope_df$Variant_Group))

dunn_plot <- dunn_results %>%
  left_join(facet_ranges, by = "Epitope_Group") %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Group) %>%
  mutate(
    n_comparisons = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    x1 = match(group1, levels(factor(variant_epitope_df$Variant_Group))),
    x2 = match(group2, levels(factor(variant_epitope_df$Variant_Group)))
  ) %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Group) %>%
  arrange(p_adj, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    # 🔥 dynamic spacing
    y.position = stat_base + (row_number() - 1) * stat_step
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

Variant_Epitope_charges <- ggplot(
  variant_epitope_df,
  aes(x = Variant_Group, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Variant_Group)
) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.75, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ Epitope_Group, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 charge by variant and epitope",
    y = "HCDR3 charge",
    x = "Variant"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  
  # 🔽 Bottom mean boxes (FIXED FONT)
  geom_label(
    data = mean_boxes,
    aes(x = Variant_Group, y = bottom_box_y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    label.size = 0.25,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # 🔼 Top epitope boxes (FIXED FONT)
  geom_label(
    data = top_boxes,
    aes(x = Variant_Group, y = top_box_y, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3,
    fill = "white",
    label.size = 0.25,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # 📊 Dunn stats (bars)
  geom_segment(
    data = dunn_plot %>% filter(p_label != "ns"),
    aes(x = x1, xend = x2, y = y.position, yend = y.position),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = dunn_plot %>% filter(p_label != "ns"),
    aes(x = x1, xend = x1,
        y = y.position,
        yend = y.position - 0.03 * yrange),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = dunn_plot %>% filter(p_label != "ns"),
    aes(x = x2, xend = x2,
        y = y.position,
        yend = y.position - 0.03 * yrange),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  
  # ✨ Stats text (FIXED FONT)
  geom_text(
    data = dunn_plot %>% filter(p_label != "ns"),
    aes(
      x = (x1 + x2) / 2,
      y = y.position + 0.03 * yrange,
      label = p_label
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold"
  )
```
