```{r Identifying High Clones in }
    data = dunn_plot %>%
      filter(Epitope_Group %in% supp_epitopes, p_label != "ns"),
    aes(x = x1, xend = x2, y = y.position, yend = y.position),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = dunn_plot %>%
      filter(Epitope_Group %in% supp_epitopes, p_label != "ns"),
    aes(
      x = x1, xend = x1,
      y = y.position,
      yend = y.position - 0.03 * yrange
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = dunn_plot %>%
      filter(Epitope_Group %in% supp_epitopes, p_label != "ns"),
    aes(
      x = x2, xend = x2,
      y = y.position,
      yend = y.position - 0.03 * yrange
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = dunn_plot %>%
      filter(Epitope_Group %in% supp_epitopes, p_label != "ns"),
    aes(
      x = (x1 + x2) / 2,
      y = y.position + 0.03 * yrange,
      label = p_label
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold"
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Variant_Epitope_charges_supp.png", Variant_Epitope_charges_supp, width = 13 , height = 6, dpi = 600, bg = "white" )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Variant_Epitope_charges_supp.svg", Variant_Epitope_charges_supp, width = 13 , height = 6, dpi = 600, bg = "white" )

#---- Omicron vs Others ----
wt_pattern <- regex("WT|Wuhan|WA1", ignore_case = TRUE)
omicron_pattern <- regex("Omicron|BA\\.", ignore_case = TRUE)

wt_yes_omicron_no <- charge_df %>%
  filter(
    map_lgl(Neut, ~ any(str_detect(.x, wt_pattern))),          # CAN neutralize WT
    map_lgl(NonNeut, ~ any(str_detect(.x, omicron_pattern)))   # CANNOT neutralize Omicron
  ) %>%
  select(Name, Epitope, Charge_HCDR3)


wt_yes_omicron_no
omicron_neutralizers <- charge_df %>%
  filter(
    map_lgl(Neut, ~ any(str_detect(.x, omicron_pattern)))
  ) %>%
  select(Name, Epitope, Charge_HCDR3)
compare_df <- bind_rows(
  wt_yes_omicron_no %>% mutate(Group = "WT_neut_ONLY"),
  omicron_neutralizers %>% mutate(Group = "Omicron_neut")
)

library(dplyr)

stats_compare <- compare_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_HCDR3 = mean(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_HCDR3 = median(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_HCDR3 = sd(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_HCDR3 = IQR(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stats_compare

wt_bind_omicron_no <- charge_df %>%
  filter(
    map_lgl(`Binds to`, ~ any(str_detect(.x, wt_pattern))),               # binds WT
    map_lgl(`Doesn't Bind to`, ~ any(str_detect(.x, omicron_pattern)))    # does NOT bind Omicron
  ) %>%
  select(Name, Epitope, Charge_HCDR3)
omicron_binders <- charge_df %>%
  filter(
    map_lgl(`Binds to`, ~ any(str_detect(.x, omicron_pattern)))
  ) %>%
  select(Name, Epitope, Charge_HCDR3)
compare_bind_df <- bind_rows(
  wt_bind_omicron_no %>% mutate(Group = "WT_bind_ONLY"),
  omicron_binders %>% mutate(Group = "Omicron_bind")
)
stats_bind <- compare_bind_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_HCDR3 = mean(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_HCDR3 = median(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_HCDR3 = sd(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_HCDR3 = IQR(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stats_bind
wt_bind_omicron_no <- wt_bind_omicron_no %>%
  mutate(Group = "WT_bind_ONLY")
all_other <- charge_df %>%
  filter(!Name %in% wt_bind_omicron_no$Name) %>%
  select(Name, Epitope, Charge_HCDR3) %>%
  mutate(Group = "All_other")
compare_df <- bind_rows(
  wt_bind_omicron_no,
  all_other
)


table(compare_df$Group)
stats_compare <- compare_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stats_compare
wilcox.test(Charge_HCDR3 ~ Group, data = compare_df)
# Rename groups properly
compare_df2 <- compare_df %>%
  mutate(Group = case_when(
    Group == "WT_bind_ONLY" ~ "Wuhan-only antibodies",
    Group == "All_other"     ~ "Other-variant binders",
    TRUE ~ Group
  ))
wilc <- wilcox.test(Charge_HCDR3 ~ Group, data = compare_df2)
pval <- signif(wilc$p.value, 3)
p_label <- paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", pval)
p_label
my_cols <- c(
  "Wuhan-only antibodies" = "firebrick",
  "Other-variant binders" = "#3BA3EC"
)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)

ggplot(compare_df2, aes(x = Group, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Group)) +
  
  # Raincloud half-eye
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    .width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
    justification = -0.25,
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  
  # Boxplot inside
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 0.5,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
  # Raw data points
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.30,
    size = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # Color palette
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_cols) +
  
  # Labeling + theme
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge Comparison",
    subtitle = p_label,
    x = "",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14)
  )
compare_df2 <- compare_df %>%
  mutate(Group = case_when(
    Group == "WT_bind_ONLY" ~ "Wuhan-only antibodies",
    Group == "All_other"     ~ "Other-variant binders",
    TRUE ~ Group
  ))

stats_compare <- compare_df2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

wilc <- wilcox.test(Charge_HCDR3 ~ Group, data = compare_df2)
pval <- wilc$p.value

# Convert to stars
p_star <- case_when(
  pval < 0.001 ~ "***",
  pval < 0.01  ~ "**",
  pval < 0.05  ~ "*",
  TRUE         ~ "ns"
)
p_star
y_max <- max(compare_df2$Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE)
y_bar <- y_max + 0.5   # height of the bar
y_text <- y_bar + 0.3  # height of the asterisk
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)
compare_df2$Group <- recode(
  compare_df2$Group,
  "Other-variant binders"   = "Other-variant\nbinders",
  "Wuhan-only antibodies"   = "Wuhan-only\nantibodies"
)

HCDR3_Charge_WuhanvsOthers <- ggplot(compare_df2, aes(x = Group, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Group)) +
  
  # Raincloud half-eye
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    .width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),

    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  
  # Boxplot inside
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,

    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
  # Raw points

    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.30,
    size = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # Significance bar
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar),
               linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar - 0.2),
               linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 2, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar - 0.2),
               linewidth = 0.6) +
  
  # Asterisk annotation
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = y_text, label = p_star, size = 8) +
  
  # Colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Wuhan-only\nantibodies" = "firebrick",
    "Other-variant\nbinders" = "navy"
  )) +
  
  # Theme + labels

  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
theme(

  axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),

  legend.position = "none"
)

  select(Name, Group, Charge_HCDR3)

omicron_nonbinders <- charge_df %>%
  filter(!Name %in% omicron_binders$Name) %>%
  mutate(Group = "Omicron_nonbinder") %>%
  select(Name, Group, Charge_HCDR3)
compare_omicron <- bind_rows(omicron_binders, omicron_nonbinders)
wilc_omicron <- wilcox.test(Charge_HCDR3 ~ Group, data = compare_omicron)
pval <- wilc_omicron$p.value

p_star <- case_when(
  pval < 0.001 ~ "***",
  pval < 0.01  ~ "**",

)

y_text <- y_bar + 0.3
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)

compare_omicron$Group <- recode(

)

omicron_cols <- c(

)


OmicronBinderPlot <- ggplot(compare_omicron, 
       aes(x = Group, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Group)) +
  
  # Raincloud half-eye
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    justification = -0.25,
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  
  # Boxplot
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 1,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
  # Raw points
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.25,
    size = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # --- Full significance bar (3 segments) ---
  # Top horizontal
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  # Left tick
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar - 0.2),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  # Right tick
  geom_segment(aes(x = 2, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar - 0.2),
               linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # Asterisk
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = y_text, label = p_star, size = 8, fontface = "bold") +
  
  # Colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = omicron_cols) +
  
  # Theme
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),

    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),

    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 18),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge in Omicron Binders vs Non-binders",
    x = "",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  )

wt_pattern <- "WT|Wuhan|WA1"
omicron_pattern <- "Omicron|BA\\.1|BA\\.2|BA\\.4|BA\\.5"
wuhan_only <- charge_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    map_lgl(`Binds to`, ~ any(str_detect(.x, wt_pattern))),      # binds Wuhan
    map_lgl(`Binds to`, ~ !any(str_detect(.x, omicron_pattern))) # does NOT bind Omicron
  ) %>%
  mutate(Group = "Wuhan_only") %>%
  dplyr::select(Name, Group, Charge_HCDR3)

omicron_not_wuhan <- charge_df %>%
  filter(
    map_lgl(`Binds to`, ~ any(str_detect(.x, omicron_pattern))), # binds Omicron
    map_lgl(`Binds to`, ~ !any(str_detect(.x, wt_pattern)))      # does NOT bind Wuhan
  ) %>%
  mutate(Group = "Omicron_only_vsWT") %>%
  dplyr::select(Name, Group, Charge_HCDR3)


compare_OvsW <- bind_rows(wuhan_only, omicron_not_wuhan)
stats_OvsW <- compare_OvsW %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stats_OvsW
wilc <- wilcox.test(Charge_HCDR3 ~ Group, data = compare_OvsW)
pval <- wilc$p.value

p_star <- case_when(
  pval < 0.001 ~ "***",
  pval < 0.01  ~ "**",
  pval < 0.05  ~ "*",
  TRUE ~ "ns"
)
y_max <- max(compare_OvsW$Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE)
y_bar <- y_max + 0.5
y_text <- y_bar + 0.3

compare_OvsW$Group <- recode(
  compare_OvsW$Group,
  "Wuhan_only" = "Wuhan\nonly",
  "Omicron_only_vsWT" = "Omicron\n(not Wuhan)"
)

  "Wuhan\nonly"          = "firebrick",
  "Omicron\n(not Wuhan)" = "forestgreen"
)


# (Assuming compare_OvsW$Group already contains "Wuhan" and "Omicron")
compare_OvsW$Group <- factor(
  compare_OvsW$Group,
  levels = c("Wuhan\nonly", "Omicron\n(not Wuhan)")
)

Omicron_vs_Wuhan <- ggplot(compare_OvsW, aes(x = Group, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Group)) +
  
  # Raincloud half-eye

    width = 0.7,
    .width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),

  ) +

    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 1,

  ) +
  
  # Jitter points

    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.30,
    size = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +

               linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar - 0.2),
               linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 2, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar - 0.2),
               linewidth = 0.6) +

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

wt_pattern_sep <- regex("WT|Wuhan|WA1", ignore_case = TRUE)
omicron_pattern_sep <- regex("Omicron|BA\\.|XBB|BQ\\.", ignore_case = TRUE)

binding_epitope_master_sep <- charge_df %>%
  mutate(
    binds_wuhan_sep = map_lgl(`Binds to`, ~ any(str_detect(.x, wt_pattern_sep))),
    binds_omicron_sep = map_lgl(`Binds to`, ~ any(str_detect(.x, omicron_pattern_sep))),
    Epitope_Class_sep = case_when(
      str_detect(Epitope, regex("RBD", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "RBD",
      str_detect(Epitope, regex("NTD", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "NTD",
      str_detect(Epitope, regex("S1", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "S1",
      str_detect(Epitope, regex("S2", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "S2",
      TRUE ~ "Other_Spike_Region"
    )
  ) %>%
  distinct(
    Name, Epitope_Class_sep, binds_wuhan_sep, binds_omicron_sep,
    Charge_HCDR3, Charge_H, Charge_L, Charge_LCDR3,
    .keep_all = TRUE
  )

omicron_bind_compare_sep <- binding_epitope_master_sep %>%
  mutate(
    Omicron_Binding_Class_sep = case_when(
      binds_omicron_sep ~ "Omicron_binder",
      !binds_omicron_sep ~ "Omicron_nonbinder",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Omicron_Binding_Class_sep)) %>%
  mutate(
    Omicron_Binding_Class_sep = factor(
      Omicron_Binding_Class_sep,
      levels = c("Omicron_nonbinder", "Omicron_binder")
    ),
    Epitope_Class_sep = factor(
      Epitope_Class_sep,
      levels = c("RBD", "NTD", "S1", "S2", "Other_Spike_Region")
    )
  )

wuhan_omicron_compare_sep <- binding_epitope_master_sep %>%
  mutate(
    Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep = case_when(
      binds_wuhan_sep & !binds_omicron_sep ~ "Wuhan_only",
      binds_omicron_sep & !binds_wuhan_sep ~ "Omicron_not_Wuhan",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep)) %>%
  mutate(
    Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep = factor(
      Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep,
      levels = c("Wuhan_only", "Omicron_not_Wuhan")
    ),
    Epitope_Class_sep = factor(
      Epitope_Class_sep,
      levels = c("RBD", "NTD", "S1", "S2", "Other_Spike_Region")
    )
  )

omicron_bind_facet_plot_sep <- ggplot(
  omicron_bind_compare_sep,
  aes(
    x = Omicron_Binding_Class_sep,
    y = Charge_HCDR3,
    fill = Omicron_Binding_Class_sep
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.85, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, alpha = 0.30, size = 1.1, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ Epitope_Class_sep, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Omicron_nonbinder" = "navy",
    "Omicron_binder" = "forestgreen"
  )) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge in Omicron Binders vs Non binders by Epitope",
    x = "",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
omicron_bind_stats_sep <- omicron_bind_compare_sep %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Class_sep, Omicron_Binding_Class_sep) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_charge = mean(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_charge = median(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_charge = sd(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_charge = IQR(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

omicron_bind_stats_sep
omicron_bind_wilcox_sep <- omicron_bind_compare_sep %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Class_sep) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch(
      wilcox.test(Charge_HCDR3 ~ Omicron_Binding_Class_sep)$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      is.na(p_value) ~ NA_character_,
      p_value < 0.0001 ~ "****",
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )
omicron_bind_label_df_sep <- omicron_bind_compare_sep %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Class_sep) %>%
  summarise(
    y_pos = max(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.4,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(omicron_bind_wilcox_sep, by = "Epitope_Class_sep")

omicron_bind_facet_plot_labeled_sep <- ggplot(
  omicron_bind_compare_sep,
  aes(
    x = Omicron_Binding_Class_sep,
    y = Charge_HCDR3,
    fill = Omicron_Binding_Class_sep
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.85, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, alpha = 0.30, size = 1.1, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ Epitope_Class_sep, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_text(
    data = omicron_bind_label_df_sep,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = y_pos, label = p_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 6
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Omicron_nonbinder" = "navy",
    "Omicron_binder" = "forestgreen"
  )) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge in Omicron Binders vs Non binders by Epitope",
    x = "",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

omicron_bind_facet_plot_labeled_sep
omicron_bind_wilcox_sep

omicron_bind_facet_plot_sep


omicron_bind_label_plot_sep <- omicron_bind_compare_sep %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Class_sep) %>%
  summarise(
    y_max = max(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_min = min(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(omicron_bind_wilcox_sep, by = "Epitope_Class_sep") %>%
  mutate(
    y_range = pmax(y_max - y_min, 0.5),
    y_bar = y_max + 0.10 * y_range,
    y_tick = y_bar - 0.05 * y_range,
    y_text = y_bar + 0.06 * y_range
  )
omicron_bind_compare_sep <- omicron_bind_compare_sep %>%
  mutate(
    Omicron_Binding_Class_sep = recode(
      as.character(Omicron_Binding_Class_sep),
      "Omicron_binder" = "Omicron\nbinder",
      "Omicron_nonbinder" = "Omicron\nnon-binder"
    ),
    Omicron_Binding_Class_sep = factor(
      Omicron_Binding_Class_sep,
      levels = c("Omicron\nnon-binder", "Omicron\nbinder")
    )
  )

omicron_bind_facet_plot_sep <- ggplot(
  omicron_bind_compare_sep,
  aes(
    x = Omicron_Binding_Class_sep,
    y = Charge_HCDR3,
    fill = Omicron_Binding_Class_sep
  )
) +
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    .width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
    justification = -0.25,
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 1,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.30,
    size = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Epitope_Class_sep, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_segment(
    data = omicron_bind_label_plot_sep,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = omicron_bind_label_plot_sep,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = y_bar, yend = y_tick),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = omicron_bind_label_plot_sep,
    aes(x = 2, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_tick),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = omicron_bind_label_plot_sep,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = y_text, label = p_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 7,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
  "Omicron\nnon-binder" = "navy",
  "Omicron\nbinder" = "forestgreen"
)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "HCDR3 Charge in Omicron Binders vs Non binders",
    x = "",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  )

ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HCDR3_Charge_Bindersvsnon_epitope.png", omicron_bind_facet_plot_sep, width = 9, height = 8.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white" )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/HCDR3_Charge_Bindersvsnon_epitope.svg", omicron_bind_facet_plot_sep, width = 9, height = 8.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white" )

    omicron_bind_wilcox_sep %>%

wuhan_omicron_compare_sep <- wuhan_omicron_compare_sep %>%
  mutate(
    Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep = recode(
      as.character(Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep),
      "Wuhan_only" = "Wuhan\nonly",
      "Omicron_not_Wuhan" = "Omicron\n(not Wuhan)"
    ),
    Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep = factor(
      Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep,
      levels = c("Wuhan\nonly", "Omicron\n(not Wuhan)")
    )
  )

wuhan_omicron_compare_sep_rbd <- wuhan_omicron_compare_sep %>%
  filter(Epitope_Class_sep == "RBD")

wuhan_omicron_label_plot_sep_rbd <- wuhan_omicron_compare_sep_rbd %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Class_sep) %>%
  summarise(
    y_max = max(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_min = min(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    wuhan_omicron_wilcox_sep %>%
      filter(Epitope_Class_sep == "RBD"),
    by = "Epitope_Class_sep"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    y_range = pmax(y_max - y_min, 0.5),
    y_bar = y_max + 0.10 * y_range,
    y_tick = y_bar - 0.05 * y_range,
    y_text = y_bar + 0.06 * y_range
  )

wuhan_omicron_facet_plot_sep_rbd <- ggplot(
  wuhan_omicron_compare_sep_rbd,
  aes(
    x = Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep,
    y = Charge_HCDR3,
    fill = Wuhan_Omicron_Class_sep
  )
) +
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    .width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
    justification = -0.25,
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 1,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.30,
    size = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = wuhan_omicron_label_plot_sep_rbd,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_bar),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = wuhan_omicron_label_plot_sep_rbd,
    aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = y_bar, yend = y_tick),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = wuhan_omicron_label_plot_sep_rbd,
    aes(x = 2, xend = 2, y = y_bar, yend = y_tick),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = wuhan_omicron_label_plot_sep_rbd,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = y_text, label = p_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 7,
    fontface = "bold",
    family = "Arial"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Wuhan\nonly" = "firebrick",
      "Omicron\n(not Wuhan)" = "forestgreen"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Wuhan only vs Omicron not Wuhan, RBD",
    x = "",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge"
  )

library(dplyr)
library(stringdist)
library(purrr)
library(readxl)

HCDR_highclones_IMGTinfo <- read_xlsx(
  "/home/wen-lab/Downloads/Cloning_3 IgH IMGT Info.xlsx",
  sheet = "AA-sequences"
)

query_df <- HCDR_highclones_IMGTinfo %>%
  select(Clone = `Sequence ID`,
         Query_CDR3 = `CDR3-IMGT`) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Query_CDR3))

cov_df <- charge_df %>%
  select(CovAb_name = Name,
         CovAb_CDR3 = CDRH3) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CovAb_CDR3))
library(Biostrings)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

score_pair <- function(seq1, seq2) {
  aln <- pairwiseAlignment(
    AAString(seq1),
    AAString(seq2),
    substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
    gapOpening = 10,
    gapExtension = 0.5,
    type = "global"
  )
  
  tibble(
    score = score(aln),
    pid = pid(aln),  # percent identity
    len1 = nchar(seq1),
    len2 = nchar(seq2),
    len_diff = abs(nchar(seq1) - nchar(seq2))
  )
}
results <- expand.grid(
  query_idx = seq_len(nrow(query_df)),
  cov_idx = seq_len(nrow(cov_df))
) %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(
    Query_CDR3 = query_df$Query_CDR3[query_idx],
    CovAb_CDR3 = cov_df$CovAb_CDR3[cov_idx],
    Clone = query_df$Clone[query_idx],
    CovAb_name = cov_df$CovAb_name[cov_idx]
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(metrics = list(score_pair(Query_CDR3, CovAb_CDR3))) %>%
  unnest(metrics) %>%
  ungroup()


similar_hits <- results %>%
  filter(
    pid > 85,          # adjust threshold
    len_diff <= 3      # allow small indels
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pid), desc(score))
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(Biostrings)

HCDR_highclones_IMGTinfo <- read_xlsx(
  "/home/wen-lab/Downloads/Cloning_3 IgH IMGT Info.xlsx",
  sheet = "AA-sequences"
)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(Biostrings)
library(pwalign)
library(stringdist)
HCDR_highclones_IMGTinfo <- read_xlsx(
  "/home/wen-lab/Downloads/Cloning_3 IgH IMGT Info.xlsx",
  sheet = "AA-sequences"
)
query_df <- HCDR_highclones_IMGTinfo %>%
  select(
    Clone = `Sequence ID`,
    Query_CDR3 = `CDR3-IMGT`
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Query_CDR3)) %>%
  mutate(
    Query_CDR3 = gsub("\\.", "", Query_CDR3),
    Query_len = nchar(Query_CDR3)
  )

cov_df <- charge_df %>%
  select(
    CovAb_name = Name,
    CovAb_CDR3 = CDRH3
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CovAb_CDR3)) %>%
  mutate(
    CovAb_CDR3 = gsub("\\.", "", CovAb_CDR3),
    Cov_len = nchar(CovAb_CDR3)
  )

candidate_pairs <- query_df %>%
  crossing(cov_df) %>%
  filter(Query_len == Cov_len)

results <- candidate_pairs %>%
  mutate(
    mismatches = stringdist(Query_CDR3, CovAb_CDR3, method = "hamming"),
    pid_exact = 100 * (Query_len - mismatches) / Query_len
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pid_exact), mismatches)

CovAbDab_HCDR3similarity_comparisons <- ggplot(results, aes(x = pid_exact)) +
  geom_histogram(
    binwidth = 5,
    fill = "grey70",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 100,
    color = "firebrick",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 100,
    y = Inf,
    label = "100% identity",
    vjust = 1.5,
    hjust = 1.1,
    color = "firebrick",
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold",
    family = "Arial"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "HCDR3 amino acid identity (%)",
    y = "Number of comparisons at each % similarity",
    title = "CovAbDab HCDR3 AA sequence similarity with polreactive clones "
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/CovAbDab_HCDR3similarity_comparisons.png", CovAbDab_HCDR3similarity_comparisons, width = 12, height = 5 , dpi = 600, bg = "white" )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/CovAbDab_HCDR3similarity_comparisons.svg", CovAbDab_HCDR3similarity_comparisons, width = 12, height = 5 , dpi = 600, bg = "white" )
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

query_df_filt <- query_df %>%
  filter(Clone %in% High_clones$Clone_ID) %>%
  mutate(
    Query_CDR3 = gsub("\\.", "", Query_CDR3),
    Query_len = nchar(Query_CDR3)
  )

cov_df2 <- cov_df %>%
  mutate(
    CovAb_CDR3 = gsub("\\.", "", CovAb_CDR3),
    Cov_len = nchar(CovAb_CDR3)
  )

aa_charge <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x %in% c("R", "K", "H") ~ "+",
    x %in% c("D", "E") ~ "-",
    TRUE ~ "0"
  )
}

get_charge_pattern <- function(seq) {
  aas <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  paste0(aa_charge(aas), collapse = "")
}

get_net_charge <- function(seq) {
  aas <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  sum(aas %in% c("R", "K", "H")) - sum(aas %in% c("D", "E"))
}

query_df_filt <- query_df_filt %>%
  mutate(
    Query_charge_pattern = sapply(Query_CDR3, get_charge_pattern),
    Query_net_charge = sapply(Query_CDR3, get_net_charge)
  )

cov_df2 <- cov_df2 %>%
  mutate(
    Cov_charge_pattern = sapply(CovAb_CDR3, get_charge_pattern),
    Cov_net_charge = sapply(CovAb_CDR3, get_net_charge)
  )

charge_matches <- query_df_filt %>%
  crossing(cov_df2) %>%
  filter(
    Query_len == Cov_len,
    Query_charge_pattern == Cov_charge_pattern
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    same_net_charge = Query_net_charge == Cov_net_charge
  ) %>%
  arrange(Clone, desc(same_net_charge), CovAb_name)

charge_matches
matched_names <- charge_matches %>%
  pull(CovAb_name) %>%
  unique()
matched_charge_df <- charge_df %>%
  filter(Name %in% matched_names)

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(rstatix)
matched_charge_df2 <- charge_matches %>%
  dplyr::select(Clone, CovAb_name) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::left_join(matched_charge_df, by = c("CovAb_name" = "Name")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Variant_Group = dplyr::case_when(
      stringr::str_detect(`Binds to`, stringr::regex("Wuhan|WT|WA1", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Wuhan",
      stringr::str_detect(`Binds to`, stringr::regex("Alpha|B\\.1\\.1\\.7", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Alpha",
      stringr::str_detect(`Binds to`, stringr::regex("Beta|B\\.1\\.351", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Beta",
      stringr::str_detect(`Binds to`, stringr::regex("Delta|B\\.1\\.617\\.2", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Delta",
      stringr::str_detect(`Binds to`, stringr::regex("Omicron|BA\\.", ignore_case=TRUE)) ~ "Omicron",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )
variant_plot_df <- matched_charge_df2 %>%
  dplyr::count(Clone, Variant_Group, name = "n") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Clone) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()
variant_table <- matched_charge_df2 %>%
  dplyr::count(Clone, Variant_Group) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Variant_Group,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )

variant_matrix <- variant_table %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("Clone") %>%
  as.matrix()

chisq.test(variant_matrix, simulate.p.value = TRUE, B = 10000)
variant_counts <- matched_charge_df2 %>%
  dplyr::count(Variant_Group)
wt_count <- variant_counts %>%
  filter(Variant_Group == "WT") %>%
  pull(n)

total_count <- sum(variant_counts$n)

variant_counts <- matched_charge_df2 %>%
  mutate(
    Variant_Group = case_when(
      Variant_Group == "WT" ~ "Wuhan",
      TRUE ~ Variant_Group
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::count(Variant_Group)

wuhan_count <- variant_counts %>%
  filter(Variant_Group == "Wuhan") %>%
  pull(n)

total_count <- sum(variant_counts$n)

binom_res <- binom.test(
  x = wuhan_count,
  n = total_count,
  p = 0.5,
  alternative = "greater"
)

p_value <- signif(binom_res$p.value, 3)

plot_df <- variant_counts %>%
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n),
    label = paste0(Variant_Group, "\n", scales::percent(prop, accuracy = 1))
  )
variant_colors <- c(
  "Wuhan" = "firebrick",
  "Alpha" = "darkorchid4",   # warm peach
  "Beta" = "aquamarine3",    # soft blue
  "Delta" = "coral1",   # muted teal
  "Omicron" = "forestgreen", # dusty purple
  "Other" = "#D2B48C"    # tan
)
plot_df_donut <- variant_counts %>%
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n),
    label = paste0(Variant_Group, "\n(n=", n, ", ", scales::percent(prop, 1), ")")
  )

Matched_Charge_ClonestoCovabdab <- ggplot(plot_df_donut, aes(x = 2, y = prop, fill = Variant_Group)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.8) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  xlim(0.5, 2.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = variant_colors) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 4.5
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 0,
    y = 0,
    label = paste0(
      "Wuhan bias\n",
      "n = ", wuhan_count, "/", total_count, "\n",
      "p = ", formatC(p_value, format = "e", digits = 2)
    ),
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(fill = "Variant") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right"
  )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Matched_Charge_ClonestoCovabdab.png", Matched_Charge_ClonestoCovabdab, width = 7, height =8 , dpi = 600, bg = "white" )
ggsave("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/Matched_Charge_ClonestoCovabdab.svg", Matched_Charge_ClonestoCovabdab, width = 7, height =8 , dpi = 600, bg = "white" )

  dplyr::mutate(
    Variant_Group = dplyr::case_when(

    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::count(Clone, Variant_Group, name = "n") %>%

library(Biostrings)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
fasta_files <- c(
  "/home/wen-lab/Downloads/rcsb_pdb_6XDG.fasta",
  "/home/wen-lab/Downloads/rcsb_pdb_7KMG.fasta",
  "/home/wen-lab/Downloads/rcsb_pdb_7RA8.fasta",
  "/home/wen-lab/Downloads/rcsb_pdb_7JX3.fasta"
)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)






heavy_seqs <- lapply(fasta_files, function(f) {
  
  fa <- readAAStringSet(f)
  headers <- names(fa)
  
  keep <- str_detect(headers, regex("heavy", ignore_case = TRUE)) &
          !str_detect(headers, regex("light", ignore_case = TRUE)) &
          !str_detect(headers, regex("spike|S1|S2", ignore_case = TRUE))
  
  if (sum(keep) == 0) {
    warning(paste("No heavy chain found in", f))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  fa[keep]
}) %>%
  unlist(use.names = FALSE)


# 1. Define heavy-chain sequences explicitly


heavy_chains <- c(
  S309 =

extract_hcdr3 <- function(heavy_seq) {
  # Find Cys that starts CDR3
  cys_pos <- gregexpr("C", heavy_seq)[[1]]
  
  # Find WG or FG motif near the end
  end_match <- regexpr("WG.G|FG.G", heavy_seq)
  
  if (cys_pos[1] == -1 || end_match == -1) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  
  start <- cys_pos[length(cys_pos)] + 1
  end <- end_match - 1
  
  substr(heavy_seq, start, end)
}
aa_charge <- c(
  K = 1, R = 1, H = 0.1,
  D = -1, E = -1
)

calc_charge <- function(seq) {
  sum(aa_charge[strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]], na.rm = TRUE)
}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)

# 1) Extract HCDR3 and compute charge
ab_hcdr3_tbl <- tibble(
  Antibody = names(heavy_chains),
  Heavy_AA = unname(heavy_chains)
) %>%
  mutate(
    HCDR3 = vapply(Heavy_AA, extract_hcdr3, character(1)),
    HCDR3_len = nchar(HCDR3),
    HCDR3_charge = vapply(HCDR3, calc_charge, numeric(1))
  )

# Any failures?
ab_hcdr3_tbl %>% filter(is.na(HCDR3) | HCDR3_len < 5)

# Typical heavy CDR3 length is often ~8–20 AA (can be outside, but this flags weird ones)
ab_hcdr3_tbl %>% arrange(HCDR3_len)

# Any failures?
ab_hcdr3_tbl %>% filter(is.na(HCDR3) | HCDR3_len < 5)

# Typical heavy CDR3 length is often ~8–20 AA (can be outside, but this flags weird ones)
ab_hcdr3_tbl %>% arrange(HCDR3_len)
extract_hcdr3 <- function(heavy_seq) {

  # find all cysteines
  cys_pos <- gregexpr("C", heavy_seq)[[1]]
  if (cys_pos[1] == -1) return(NA_character_)

  cys_start <- tail(cys_pos, 1)

  # common FR4 motifs (expanded)
  fr4_match <- regexpr(
    "WGQG|WGGG|FGQG|YGQG|WGQGT|WGQGA|WGQGV",
    substr(heavy_seq, cys_start + 1, nchar(heavy_seq))
  )

  if (fr4_match == -1) return(NA_character_)

  fr4_start <- cys_start + fr4_match - 1

  substr(heavy_seq, cys_start + 1, fr4_start - 1)
}
ab_hcdr3_tbl <- tibble(
  Antibody = names(heavy_chains),
  Heavy_AA = unname(heavy_chains)
) %>%
  mutate(
    HCDR3 = vapply(Heavy_AA, extract_hcdr3, character(1)),
    HCDR3_len = nchar(HCDR3),
    HCDR3_charge = vapply(HCDR3, calc_charge, numeric(1))
  )

ab_hcdr3_tbl
```

```{r Converting PDBePISA XMLs}

library(xml2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(writexl)

xml <- read_xml("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/PDBePISA Info/14_22.PF_PISA.xml")

hbonds <- xml %>%
  xml_find_all(".//HYDROGENBONDS/STRUCTURE") %>%
  map_df(~{
    tibble(
      structure1 = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./STRUCTURE1")),
      distance   = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./DISTANCE")),
      structure2 = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./STRUCTURE2"))
    )
  })

res1 <- xml %>%
  xml_find_all(".//RESIDUES/RESIDUE1/RESIDUE") %>%
  map_df(~{
    tibble(
      structure = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./STRUCTURE")),
      solvent_accessible_area = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./SOLVENTACCESSIBLEAREA")),
      buried_surface_area      = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./BURIEDSURFACEAREA")),
      buried_surface_score     = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./BURIEDSURFACEAREASCORE")),
      solvation_energy         = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./SOLVATIONENERGY"))
    )
  })

res2 <- xml %>%
  xml_find_all(".//RESIDUES/RESIDUE2/RESIDUE") %>%
  map_df(~{
    tibble(
      structure = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./STRUCTURE")),
      solvent_accessible_area = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./SOLVENTACCESSIBLEAREA")),
      buried_surface_area      = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./BURIEDSURFACEAREA")),
      buried_surface_score     = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./BURIEDSURFACEAREASCORE")),
      solvation_energy         = xml_text(xml_find_first(.x, "./SOLVATIONENERGY"))
    )
  })

write_xlsx(
  list(
    Hydrogen_Bonds = hbonds,
    Residues_Structure1 = res1,
    Residues_Structure2 = res2
  ),
  path = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/PDBePISA Info/14_22.PF_PISA_interface_output.xlsx"
)
```

```{r Making Trees}

library(dplyr)
library(dowser)
library(ggtree)   # if you use theme_tree2(), geom_tippoint(), etc.
library(ggplot2)

igphyml_exec <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis/bin/igphyml"

# Goal:
#   For each Cloning ID of interest (e.g., 14_22),
#   1) use Cell.ID to find the corresponding clone_id(s) in LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc
#   2) pull ALL cells in LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc with those clone_id(s)
#   3) keep track of which original Cloning ID seeded the pull via:
#        Sister_Clone = <original Cloning ID>
#
# Assumptions (edit if your column names differ):
#   - cdr3_subset has: Cell.ID, `Cloning ID`
#   - LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc has: cell.id, clone_id


library(dplyr)

# clones you care about
target_clones <- c("14_22", "15_42", "15_60", "17_25")

# Step A: only the seed rows (cells) for the target Cloning IDs
seed_cells <- cdr3_subset %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% target_clones) %>%
  transmute(
    Sister_Clone = as.character(`Cloning ID`),
    Cell.ID      = as.character(Cell.ID)
  ) %>%
  distinct()
LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc <- read_xlsx("/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/In_House_COVID_Analysis/LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc.xlsx")
# Step B: join into LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc to get clone_id for each seed cell
# (If multiple seed cells map to the same clone_id, we keep distinct pairs)
seed_clone_map <- seed_cells %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
      transmute(
        cell_id  = as.character(cell_id),
        clone_id = as.character(clone_id)
      ),
    by = c("Cell.ID" = "cell_id")
  ) %>%
  distinct(Sister_Clone, clone_id)

# Sanity checks
seed_clone_map
# table(seed_clone_map$Sister_Clone)  # how many clone_ids per Sister_Clone


LC_for_dowser <- seed_clone_map %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
      mutate(
        cell_id  = as.character(cell_id),
        clone_id = as.character(clone_id)
      ),
    by = "clone_id"
  ) %>%
  # Ensure we keep the original Sister_Clone column from seed_clone_map
  mutate(Sister_Clone = as.character(Sister_Clone))

# Optional: if the same clone_id got seeded by multiple Sister_Clone values,
# this will duplicate rows (one per Sister_Clone). That may be what you want.
# If you instead want ONE label per clone_id, collapse Sister_Clone:
# LC_for_dowser <- LC_for_dowser %>%
#   group_by(clone_id) %>%
#   mutate(Sister_Clone = paste(sort(unique(Sister_Clone)), collapse = ",")) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   distinct()

qa_counts <- LC_for_dowser %>%
  count(Sister_Clone, clone_id, name = "n_cells") %>%
  arrange(Sister_Clone, desc(n_cells))

qa_counts

# Also: total cells per Sister_Clone label
LC_for_dowser %>%
  count(Sister_Clone, name = "n_cells_total") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_cells_total))


# Make sure columns used as traits are characters (adjust to your real trait columns)
LC_for_dowser <- LC_for_dowser %>%
  mutate(
    Sister_Clone = as.character(Sister_Clone),
    c_call       = if ("c_call" %in% names(.)) as.character(c_call) else c_call,
    v_call       = if ("v_call" %in% names(.)) as.character(v_call) else v_call
  )

# Pretty dowser trees + mark the exact "clone of interest" cells
#
# Updates per your notes:
# - cell.id column is actually: cell_id
# - clones of interest now: 14_22, 15_42, 15_60, 17_25
#
# Strategy:
# 1) Build LC_for_dowser exactly as we did (all cells in the clone_id(s) seeded by those clones)
# 2) Create a per cell flag: Is_Target_Cell (TRUE if the cell_id belongs to the original clone-of-interest cells)
# 3) Run dowser + plotTrees
# 4) Overlay a second geom_tippoint layer to highlight those target cells


library(dplyr)
library(dowser)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtree)

target_clones <- c("14_22", "15_42", "15_60", "17_25")

colors <- c(
  "cMBC" = "darkgreen",
  "PB/PC" = "navy",
  "Germline" = "black",
  "Atypical" = "firebrick",
  "Naive" = "darkorchid4",
  "Activated Naive" = "aquamarine3"
)

igphyml_exec <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis/bin/igphyml"



target_clones <- c("14_22", "15_42", "15_60", "17_25")

colors <- c(
  "Naive"            = "#F4A3A3",   # replace with your UMAP palette
  "cMBC"             = "#B3A100",
  "Atypical"         = "#00A66C",
  "PB/PC"            = "#30C2D8",
  "Activated Naive"  = "#6D8EFF",
  "PB/PC Precursors" = "#E36AE0", 
  "Germline" = "black"
)


igphyml_exec <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/bin/igphyml"

seed_cells <- cdr3_subset %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% target_clones) %>%
  transmute(
    Sister_Clone = as.character(`Cloning ID`),
    cell_id      = as.character(Cell.ID)
  ) %>%
  distinct()

target_cell_ids <- unique(seed_cells$cell_id)

seed_map <- seed_cells %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
      transmute(
        cell_id  = as.character(cell_id),
        clone_id = as.character(clone_id)
      ),
    by = "cell_id"
  ) %>%
  distinct(Sister_Clone, clone_id)

clone_ids_to_pull <- seed_map %>%
  pull(clone_id) %>%
  unique()

LC_for_dowser <- LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
  mutate(
    cell_id  = as.character(cell_id),
    clone_id = as.character(clone_id)
  ) %>%
  filter(clone_id %in% clone_ids_to_pull) %>%
  mutate(
    # highlight only the exact seed cells
    Is_Target_Cell = cell_id %in% target_cell_ids,
    # keep a bookkeeping label: which Sister_Clone(s) seeded this clone_id
    Sister_Clone = seed_map$Sister_Clone[match(clone_id, seed_map$clone_id)]
  )

# If a clone_id was seeded by multiple Sister_Clone values, match() only keeps one.
# This is just bookkeeping; if you want the full list collapsed, use this:
LC_for_dowser <- LC_for_dowser %>%
  left_join(
    seed_map %>%
      group_by(clone_id) %>%
      summarise(Sister_Clone = paste(sort(unique(Sister_Clone)), collapse = ","),
                .groups = "drop"),
    by = "clone_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    New_Clusters = as.character(New_Clusters),
    c_call = as.character(c_call),
    v_call = as.character(v_call)
  )

clone_sizes <- LC_for_dowser %>%
  count(clone_id, name = "n_seq") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_seq))

print(clone_sizes)

if (!any(clone_sizes$n_seq >= 2)) {
  stop("All clone_id groups have only 1 sequence. Trees require >=2. Your pull did not capture clonal families.")
}

minseq_use <- if (any(clone_sizes$n_seq >= 5)) 5 else if (any(clone_sizes$n_seq >= 3)) 3 else 2
message("Using minseq = ", minseq_use)

LC_changeO <- dowser::formatClones(
  LC_for_dowser,
  traits = c("New_Clusters", "c_call", "v_call", "Is_Target_Cell"),
  minseq = 2,
  nproc  = 1
)

# guardrail: if empty, lower minseq to 2
if (length(LC_changeO) == 0) {
  message("formatClones returned empty. Retrying with minseq = 2 ...")
  LC_changeO <- dowser::formatClones(
    LC_for_dowser,
    traits = c("New_Clusters", "c_call", "v_call", "Is_Target_Cell"),
    minseq = 2,
    nproc  = 1
  )
}

if (length(LC_changeO) == 0) stop("Still empty after minseq=2. Something is off with clone_id grouping or required columns.")
igphyml_exec <- "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/software/igphyml/src/igphyml"
Sys.setenv(IGPHYML_PATH = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/software/igphyml/src")

stopifnot(file.exists(igphyml_exec))
stopifnot(dir.exists(file.path(Sys.getenv("IGPHYML_PATH"), "motifs")))

# now rerun
LC_trees <- dowser::getTrees(
  LC_changeO,
  build = "igphyml",
  exec  = igphyml_exec,
  nproc = 1
)
tree_plots <- plotTrees(LC_trees)


styled_tree_plots <- lapply(seq_along(tree_plots), function(i) {
  tree_plots[[i]] +
    geom_tippoint(aes(colour = New_Clusters, shape = v_call), size = 2, alpha = 0.95) +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = c_call), offset = 0.2) +
    geom_tippoint(
      data = function(d) {
        d %>%
          mutate(
            Is_Target_Cell_chr = tolower(trimws(as.character(Is_Target_Cell))),
            Is_Target_Cell = Is_Target_Cell_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")
          ) %>%
          filter(Is_Target_Cell)
      },
      shape = 21, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2, size = 4.2, colour = "goldenrod"
    ) +
    theme_tree2() +
    scale_colour_manual(name = "Clusters", values = colors) +
    scale_shape_discrete(name = "V Region")
})

styled_tree_plots[[3]]

ggsave(
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/clone_7157_1560_tree.png",
  plot = styled_tree_plots[[2]] + geom_tiplab(aes(label = c_call), offset = 0.02),
  width = 7, height = 4.5, dpi = 300,)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggtree)

# 1) Make the base plots from dowser
tree_plots <- plotTrees(LC_trees)

# 2) Remove ALL text/label layers that plotTrees added
strip_text_layers <- function(p) {
  keep <- vapply(p$layers, function(l) {
    !inherits(l$geom, c("GeomText", "GeomLabel", "GeomTextRepel", "GeomLabelRepel"))
  }, logical(1))
  p$layers <- p$layers[keep]
  p
}

tree_plots_clean <- lapply(tree_plots, strip_text_layers)

# 3) Add your styling ONCE (one label layer only)
styled_tree_plots <- lapply(seq_along(tree_plots_clean), function(i) {
  tree_plots_clean[[i]] +
    geom_tippoint(aes(colour = New_Clusters, shape = v_call), size = 2, alpha = 0.95) +
    geom_tiplab(aes(label = c_call), offset = 0.01, align = FALSE) +
    geom_tippoint(
      data = function(d) {
        d %>%
          mutate(Is_Target_Cell = tolower(trimws(as.character(Is_Target_Cell))) %in% c("true","t","1","yes","y")) %>%
          filter(Is_Target_Cell)
      },
      shape = 21, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2, size = 4.2, colour = "goldenrod"
    ) +
    theme_tree2() +
    scale_colour_manual(name = "Clusters", values = colors) +
    scale_shape_discrete(name = "V Region") +
    xlim_tree(0.03)   # <- reduce/right-pad; try 0.02–0.06
})

styled_tree_plots[[1]]

tr1 <- LC_trees[[1]]

# Build base tree ONLY (no extra labels)

p
theme_tree_arial <- function(base_size = 14) {
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = base_size),
    
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold"),
    
    legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = base_size - 2),
    legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = base_size - 1),
    
    plot.title = element_text(
      family = "Arial",
      face = "bold",
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = base_size + 2
    )
  )
}

  )

p1_fix <- ggtree(tr1) %<+% meta1 +
  geom_tippoint(aes(colour = New_Clusters, shape = v_call), size = 2, alpha = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_tiplab(aes(label = c_call), offset = 0.001, align = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_tippoint(
    data = function(d) d %>% filter(Is_Target_Cell),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    show.legend = FALSE,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    shape = 21, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2, size = 4.2, colour = "goldenrod",
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_text2(
  data = function(d) d %>% filter(Is_Target_Cell),
  aes(label = Target_Label),
  hjust = 0.5,
  vjust = 2.5,
  size = 4,
  family = "Arial",
  fontface = "bold",
  color = "black",
  show.legend = FALSE
)+
  theme_tree2() +
  theme_tree_arial(base_size = 14)+
  scale_colour_manual(
    name = "Clusters",
    values = colors,
    na.value = "grey60",
    drop = TRUE,
    na.translate = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "V Region",
    drop = TRUE,
    na.translate = FALSE
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.box.just = "center",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "lines"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 10, 30, 5.5)
  ) +
  guides(
    colour = guide_legend(title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE),
    shape  = guide_legend(title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE)
  ) +
  xlim_tree(0.002)

    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "lines"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 10, 30, 5.5)
  ) +
  guides(
    colour = guide_legend(title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE),
    shape  = guide_legend(title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE)
  ) +
  xlim_tree(0.002)
p2_fix <- p2_fix +
  guides(
    shape  = guide_legend(order = 1, title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE),
    colour = guide_legend(order = 2, title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE)
  )
p2_fix

ggsave(
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/clone_7157_15_60_tree.png",
  plot = p2_fix,
  width = 9, height = 4.5, dpi = 300
)

tr3 <- LC_trees$trees[[3]]
meta3 <- LC_trees$data[[3]]@data %>%
  mutate(
    Is_Target_Cell = tolower(trimws(as.character(Is_Target_Cell))) %in% c("true","t","1","yes","y"),
    New_Clusters   = factor(New_Clusters, levels = c("Germline","Naive","Activated Naive","cMBC","Atypical","PB/PC", "PB/PC Precursors"))
  )

p3_fix <- ggtree(tr3) %<+% meta3 +
  geom_tippoint(aes(colour = New_Clusters, shape = v_call), size = 2, alpha = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_tiplab(aes(label = c_call), offset = 0.001, align = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_tippoint(
    data = function(d) d %>% filter(Is_Target_Cell),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    show.legend = FALSE,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    shape = 21, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2, size = 4.2, colour = "goldenrod",
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_text2(
  data = function(d) d %>% filter(Is_Target_Cell),
  aes(label = Target_Label),
  hjust = 0.5,
  vjust = -2,
  size = 4,
  family = "Arial",
  fontface = "bold",
  color = "black",
  show.legend = FALSE
)+
  theme_tree2() +
  theme_tree_arial(base_size = 14)+
  scale_colour_manual(
    name = "Clusters",
    values = colors,
    na.value = "grey60",
    drop = TRUE,
    na.translate = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_shape_discrete(
    name = "V Region",
    drop = TRUE,
    na.translate = FALSE
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.box.just = "center",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "lines"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 10, 30, 5.5)
  ) +
  guides(
    colour = guide_legend(title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE),
    shape  = guide_legend(title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE)
  ) +
  xlim_tree(0.002)
p3_fix

ggsave(
  filename = "/home/wen-lab/Nathan_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/clone_2925_17_25_tree.png",
  plot = p3_fix,
  width = 9, height = 4.5, dpi = 300
)
library(patchwork)

Combined_LineageTrees <- (p1_fix / p2_fix / p3_fix) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1)) 

p1_stack <- p1_fix + theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 10, 2, 5.5))
p2_stack <- p2_fix + theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 10, 2, 5.5))
p3_stack <- p3_fix + theme(plot.margin = margin(2, 10, 2, 5.5))

tight_margins <- theme(
  plot.margin = margin(2, 8, 6, 5.5)  # top, right, bottom, left
)

p1_comp <- p1_fix + tight_margins
p2_comp <- p2_fix + tight_margins
p3_comp <- p3_fix + tight_margins

# 3) stack with minimal spacing between panels
combined_tight <- (p1_comp / p2_comp / p3_comp) &
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.1, "lines")  # reduce gap between panels
  )

combined_tight
combined_tight
ggsave(

)

library(ggtree)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

library(ggtree)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtree)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

target_clones <- c("14_22", "15_60", "17_25")

seed_cells <- cdr3_subset %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% target_clones) %>%
  transmute(
    Sister_Clone = as.character(`Cloning ID`),
    cell_id = as.character(Cell.ID)
  ) %>%
  distinct()

target_cell_ids <- unique(seed_cells$cell_id)

seed_map <- seed_cells %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
      transmute(
        cell_id = as.character(cell_id),
        clone_id = as.character(clone_id)
      ),
    by = "cell_id"
  ) %>%
  distinct(Sister_Clone, clone_id)

seed_map
clone_ids_to_pull <- seed_map %>%
  pull(clone_id) %>%
  unique()

LC_for_dowser <- LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
  mutate(
    cell_id = as.character(cell_id),
    clone_id = as.character(clone_id)
  ) %>%
  filter(clone_id %in% clone_ids_to_pull) %>%
  left_join(
    seed_map %>%
      group_by(clone_id) %>%
      summarise(
        Sister_Clone = paste(sort(unique(Sister_Clone)), collapse = ","),
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = "clone_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Is_Target_Cell = cell_id %in% target_cell_ids,
    New_Clusters = as.character(New_Clusters),
    c_call = as.character(c_call),
    v_call = as.character(v_call)
  )

LC_changeO <- dowser::formatClones(
  LC_for_dowser,
  traits = c("Is_Target_Cell"),
  minseq = 2,
  nproc = 1
)

LC_trees <- dowser::getTrees(
  LC_changeO,
  build = "igphyml",
  exec = igphyml_exec,
  nproc = 1
)
tree_labels <- LC_for_dowser %>%
  distinct(clone_id, Sister_Clone) %>%
  arrange(match(Sister_Clone, target_clones))

tree_labels
theme_tree_mutationdistance <- function(base_size = 14) {
  theme_tree2() +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = base_size),
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black"),
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
      axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin = margin(4, 8, 4, 5.5)
    )
}

mutationdistance_tree_plot <- function(tree_object, tree_seurat, clone_name, target_vjust = -1.8) {
  mutationdistance_meta <- tree_seurat@data %>%
    mutate(
      Is_Target_Cell = tolower(trimws(as.character(Is_Target_Cell))) %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")
    )

  ggtree(tree_object) %<+% mutationdistance_meta +
    geom_tippoint(
      size = 2.2,
      alpha = 0.95,
      color = "black",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    geom_tippoint(
      data = function(d) d %>% filter(Is_Target_Cell),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      show.legend = FALSE,
      aes(x = x, y = y),
      shape = 21,
      fill = NA,
      stroke = 1.2,
      size = 4.2,
      colour = "goldenrod",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Mutation distance",
      title = clone_name
    ) +
    theme_tree_mutationdistance(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}

mutationdistance_plot_list <- lapply(seq_along(LC_trees$trees), function(i) {
  mutationdistance_tree_plot(
    tree_object = LC_trees$trees[[i]],
    tree_seurat = LC_trees$data[[i]],
    clone_name = tree_labels$Sister_Clone[i]
  )
})
mutationdistance_xmax <- max(
  sapply(LC_trees$trees, function(tree_i) max(ggtree(tree_i)$data$x, na.rm = TRUE))
)

mutationdistance_plot_list <- lapply(
  mutationdistance_plot_list,
  function(tree_plot) tree_plot + xlim(0, mutationdistance_xmax)
)
combined_mutationdistance_trees <- wrap_plots(mutationdistance_plot_list, ncol = 1) &
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.15, "lines")
  )

combined_mutationdistance_trees
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtree)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

target_clones <- c("14_22", "15_60", "17_25")

seed_cells <- cdr3_subset %>%
  filter(`Cloning ID` %in% target_clones) %>%
  transmute(
    Sister_Clone = as.character(`Cloning ID`),
    cell_id = as.character(Cell.ID)
  ) %>%
  distinct()

target_cell_ids <- unique(seed_cells$cell_id)

seed_map <- seed_cells %>%
  inner_join(
    LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
      transmute(
        cell_id = as.character(cell_id),
        clone_id = as.character(clone_id)
      ),
    by = "cell_id"
  ) %>%
  distinct(Sister_Clone, cell_id, clone_id)

seed_map

seed_map %>%
  arrange(Sister_Clone)

clone_ids_to_pull <- unique(seed_map$clone_id)

LC_for_dowser <- LC_ChangeO_clean_merged_sc %>%
  mutate(
    cell_id = as.character(cell_id),
    clone_id = as.character(clone_id)
  ) %>%
  filter(clone_id %in% clone_ids_to_pull) %>%
  left_join(
    seed_map %>%
      select(cell_id, Sister_Clone),
    by = "cell_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Is_Target_Cell = cell_id %in% target_cell_ids,
    Sister_Clone = if_else(Is_Target_Cell, Sister_Clone, NA_character_),
    New_Clusters = as.character(New_Clusters),
    c_call = as.character(c_call),
    v_call = as.character(v_call)
  )
LC_for_dowser %>%
  filter(Is_Target_Cell) %>%
  select(cell_id, clone_id, Sister_Clone, c_call, v_call)

LC_changeO <- dowser::formatClones(
  LC_for_dowser,
  traits = c("Is_Target_Cell", "Sister_Clone"),
  minseq = 2,
  nproc = 1
)

LC_trees <- dowser::getTrees(
  LC_changeO,
  build = "igphyml",
  exec = igphyml_exec,
  nproc = 1
)
tree_identity_df <- lapply(seq_along(LC_trees$data), function(i) {
  tree_meta_i <- LC_trees$data[[i]]@data %>%
    mutate(
      Is_Target_Cell = tolower(trimws(as.character(Is_Target_Cell))) %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y"),
      Sister_Clone = as.character(Sister_Clone)
    )
  
  target_rows_i <- tree_meta_i %>%
    filter(Is_Target_Cell)
  
  data.frame(
    tree_index = i,
    target_clone = paste(unique(na.omit(target_rows_i$Sister_Clone)), collapse = ","),
    n_target_cells = nrow(target_rows_i)
  )
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

tree_identity_df

}

  })
)

mutationdistance_plot_list <- lapply(

)

combined_mutationdistance_trees <- wrap_plots(mutationdistance_plot_list, ncol = 1) &

  )

combined_mutationdistance_trees

combined_mutationdistance_trees <- (

) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1, 0.25))

combined_mutationdistance_trees <- combined_mutationdistance_trees & theme_tree2()
```

```{r Spike used in ELISA charge changes}
library(httr)
library(Biostrings)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

wuhan_color <- "#B22222"
omicron_color <- "#1A8F1A"
window_size <- 15

wuhan_fasta_url <- "https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/efetch.fcgi?db=protein&id=YP_009724390.1&rettype=fasta&retmode=text"

wuhan_resp <- httr::GET(wuhan_fasta_url)
wuhan_fasta <- httr::content(wuhan_resp, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")

wuhan_lines <- unlist(strsplit(wuhan_fasta, "\n"))
wuhan_seq_lines <- wuhan_lines[!grepl("^>", wuhan_lines) & wuhan_lines != ""]
wuhan_full_seq <- paste(wuhan_seq_lines, collapse = "")

wuhan_trim_seq <- substr(wuhan_full_seq, 16, 1211)

omicron_variant_mutations <- c(
  "A67V", "H69del", "V70del", "T95I",
  "G142D", "V143del", "Y144del", "Y145del",
  "N211del", "L212I", "ins214EPE",
  "G339D", "S371L", "S373P", "S375F",
  "K417N", "N440K", "G446S", "S477N",
  "T478K", "E484A", "Q493R", "G496S",
  "Q498R", "N501Y", "Y505H", "T547K",
  "D614G", "H655Y", "N679K", "P681H",
  "N764K", "D796Y", "N856K", "Q954H",
  "N969K", "L981F"
)

shared_engineered_mutations <- c(
  "R682S", "R685S", "K986P", "V987P"
)

apply_spike_mutations <- function(seq, mutations) {

  seq_vec <- unlist(strsplit(seq, ""))

  # --- 1. substitutions ONLY ---
  subs <- mutations[!grepl("del$", mutations) & !grepl("^ins", mutations)]

  for (m in subs) {
    pos <- as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(m, "\\d+"))
    idx <- pos - 15
    to  <- substr(m, nchar(m), nchar(m))
    seq_vec[idx] <- to
  }

  # --- 2. deletions ---
  dels <- mutations[grepl("del$", mutations)]

  # IMPORTANT: delete from highest position → lowest
  for (m in rev(dels)) {
    pos <- as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(m, "\\d+"))
    idx <- pos - 15
    seq_vec <- seq_vec[-idx]
  }

  # --- 3. insertions ---
  ins <- mutations[grepl("^ins", mutations)]

  for (m in ins) {
    pos <- as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(m, "\\d+"))
    idx <- pos - 15
    insert_seq <- strsplit(gsub("ins\\d+", "", m), "")[[1]]
    seq_vec <- append(seq_vec, insert_seq, after = idx)
  }

  paste(seq_vec, collapse = "")
}
wuhan_engineered_seq <- apply_spike_mutations(
  wuhan_trim_seq,
  shared_engineered_mutations
)

omicron_recombinant_seq <- apply_spike_mutations(
  wuhan_trim_seq,
  c(omicron_variant_mutations, shared_engineered_mutations)
)

nchar(wuhan_engineered_seq)
nchar(omicron_recombinant_seq)

aa_sidechain_charge <- function(spike_aa, pH = 7.4) {
  if (spike_aa == "-") {
    return(0)
  }

  positive_pka <- c(K = 10.5, R = 12.5, H = 6.0)
  negative_pka <- c(D = 3.9, E = 4.1, C = 8.3, Y = 10.1)

  spike_charge <- 0

  if (spike_aa %in% names(positive_pka)) {
    spike_charge <- spike_charge + 1 / (1 + 10^(pH - positive_pka[spike_aa]))
  }

  if (spike_aa %in% names(negative_pka)) {
    spike_charge <- spike_charge - 1 / (1 + 10^(negative_pka[spike_aa] - pH))
  }

  spike_charge
}

sequence_net_charge <- function(spike_seq, pH = 7.4) {
  spike_seq_vec <- unlist(strsplit(spike_seq, ""))

  spike_n_term_charge <- 1 / (1 + 10^(pH - 9.69))
  spike_c_term_charge <- -1 / (1 + 10^(2.34 - pH))

  spike_sidechain_charge <- sum(
    sapply(spike_seq_vec, aa_sidechain_charge, pH = pH)
  )

  spike_n_term_charge + spike_c_term_charge + spike_sidechain_charge
}

sliding_window_sidechain_charge <- function(aligned_spike_seq, window = 15, pH = 7.4) {
  aligned_spike_vec <- unlist(strsplit(aligned_spike_seq, ""))

  sapply(seq_len(length(aligned_spike_vec) - window + 1), function(spike_i) {
    spike_window_vec <- aligned_spike_vec[spike_i:(spike_i + window - 1)]
    sum(sapply(spike_window_vec, aa_sidechain_charge, pH = pH))
  })
}

charge_summary_df <- tibble(
  Spike = c("Wuhan", "Omicron"),
  Charge_pH7_4 = c(
    sequence_net_charge(wuhan_engineered_seq, pH = 7.4),
    sequence_net_charge(omicron_recombinant_seq, pH = 7.4)
  )
)

print(charge_summary_df)

spike_domains_df <- tibble(
  Domain = c("NTD", "RBD", "S1", "S2"),
  Full_Start = c(16, 330, 16, 686),
  Full_End = c(305, 530, 685, 1211)
) %>%
  mutate(
    Trim_Start = Full_Start - 15,
    Trim_End = Full_End - 15
  )

domain_charge_summary_df <- spike_domains_df %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Wuhan_Charge_pH7_4 = sequence_net_charge(
      substr(wuhan_engineered_seq, Trim_Start, Trim_End),
      pH = 7.4
    ),
    Omicron_Charge_pH7_4 = sequence_net_charge(
      substr(omicron_recombinant_seq, Trim_Start, Trim_End),
      pH = 7.4
    ),
    Delta_Charge = Omicron_Charge_pH7_4 - Wuhan_Charge_pH7_4
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

print(domain_charge_summary_df)

spike_pH_values <- seq(5, 9, by = 0.1)

whole_spike_pH_df <- expand_grid(
  pH = spike_pH_values,
  Spike = c("Wuhan", "Omicron")
) %>%
  mutate(
    Net_Charge = case_when(
      Spike == "Wuhan" ~ sapply(pH, function(spike_pH) {
        sequence_net_charge(wuhan_engineered_seq, pH = spike_pH)
      }),
      Spike == "Omicron" ~ sapply(pH, function(spike_pH) {
        sequence_net_charge(omicron_recombinant_seq, pH = spike_pH)
      })
    )
  )

whole_spike_pH_plot <- ggplot(
  whole_spike_pH_df,
  aes(x = pH, y = Net_Charge, color = Spike)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Wuhan" = wuhan_color,
      "Omicron" = omicron_color
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Net Charge vs pH",
    x = "pH",
    y = "Net Charge"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

whole_spike_pH_plot

domain_pH_df <- expand_grid(
  pH = spike_pH_values,
  Domain = spike_domains_df$Domain,
  Spike = c("Wuhan", "Omicron")
) %>%
  left_join(spike_domains_df, by = "Domain") %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Net_Charge = case_when(
      Spike == "Wuhan" ~ sequence_net_charge(
        substr(wuhan_engineered_seq, Trim_Start, Trim_End),
        pH = pH
      ),
      Spike == "Omicron" ~ sequence_net_charge(
        substr(omicron_recombinant_seq, Trim_Start, Trim_End),
        pH = pH
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

domain_pH_plot <- ggplot(
  domain_pH_df,
  aes(x = pH, y = Net_Charge, color = Spike)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Domain, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Wuhan" = wuhan_color,
      "Omicron" = omicron_color
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Domain Net Charge vs pH",
    x = "pH",
    y = "Net Charge"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

domain_pH_plot

wuhan_aligned_aa <- AAString(wuhan_engineered_seq)
omicron_aligned_aa <- AAString(omicron_recombinant_seq)
library(pwalign)
spike_alignment <- pwalign::pairwiseAlignment(
  pattern = wuhan_aligned_aa,
  subject = omicron_aligned_aa,
  type = "global",
  substitutionMatrix = "BLOSUM62",
  gapOpening = -10,
  gapExtension = -0.5
)

wuhan_aligned_seq <- as.character(pattern(spike_alignment))
omicron_aligned_seq <- as.character(subject(spike_alignment))

wuhan_window_charge <- sliding_window_sidechain_charge(
  aligned_spike_seq = wuhan_aligned_seq,
  window = window_size,
  pH = 7.4
)

omicron_window_charge <- sliding_window_sidechain_charge(
  aligned_spike_seq = omicron_aligned_seq,
  window = window_size,
  pH = 7.4
)

window_charge_df <- tibble(
  Alignment_Position = seq_along(wuhan_window_charge),
  Wuhan = wuhan_window_charge,
  Omicron = omicron_window_charge
) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Wuhan, Omicron),
    names_to = "Spike",
    values_to = "Window_Charge"
  )

wuhan_alignment_vec <- unlist(strsplit(wuhan_aligned_seq, ""))
wuhan_trim_position_map <- cumsum(wuhan_alignment_vec != "-")

map_aligned_domain <- function(trim_start, trim_end, trim_position_map) {
  which(trim_position_map >= trim_start & trim_position_map <= trim_end)
}

aligned_domain_rects_df <- spike_domains_df %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Aligned_Start = min(map_aligned_domain(Trim_Start, Trim_End, wuhan_trim_position_map)),
    Aligned_End = max(map_aligned_domain(Trim_Start, Trim_End, wuhan_trim_position_map))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    Domain,
    xmin = Aligned_Start,
    xmax = Aligned_End,
    ymin = -Inf,
    ymax = Inf
  )

domain_window_charge_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    data = aligned_domain_rects_df,
    aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, fill = Domain),
    alpha = 0.18,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = window_charge_df,
    aes(x = Alignment_Position, y = Window_Charge, color = Spike),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Wuhan" = wuhan_color,
      "Omicron" = omicron_color
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "NTD" = "skyblue3",
      "RBD" = "goldenrod2",
      "S1" = "grey80",
      "S2" = "grey60"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "Sliding-window variant charge profile",
    x = "Aligned Position",
    y = "Local Side-Chain Charge"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

domain_window_charge_plot
```

```{r Competitive RBD ELISA}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(pracma)

df <- data.frame(
  Dilution = c(
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold",
    "5 fold","25 fold","125 fold"
  ),
  Sample = c(
    "COVID6","COVID6","COVID6",
    "COVID115","COVID115","COVID115",
    "COVID80","COVID80","COVID80",
    "COVID128","COVID128","COVID128",
    "COVID43","COVID43","COVID43",
    "COVID104","COVID104","COVID104",
    "COVID119","COVID119","COVID119",
    "COVID126","COVID126","COVID126",
    "COVID41","COVID41","COVID41",
    "COVID127","COVID127","COVID127"
  ),
  Inhibition = c(
    24.6563665423548,-3.37773042088438,0.149174214171544,
    30.3143313798615,2.33351092168352,1.48108684070325,
    88.0340969632392,87.0538092701119,79.2647842301545,
    88.1619605753863,87.9275439531167,88.1619605753863,
    26.7341502397443,8.86521044219499,-4.19818859882792,
    60.0532765050613,23.9957378795951,-7.98082045817796,
    35.0452850293021,10.1545018646777,0.245071923281837,
    88.9291422482685,88.4603090037293,87.5119872136388,
    29.2488012786361,1.05487480021311,-0.0213106020245268,
    89.1848694725626,88.8119339371337,86.1481086840703
  )
)
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Dilution_num = case_when(
      Dilution == "5 fold" ~ 5,
      Dilution == "25 fold" ~ 25,
      Dilution == "125 fold" ~ 125
    )
  )
p_titration <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Dilution_num, y = Inhibition, group = Sample)) +
  geom_line(
    color = "grey60",
    alpha = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 2.5,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "black"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "line",
    color = "firebrick",
    linewidth = 1.3
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    color = "firebrick",
    size = 3
  ) +

  scale_x_log10(
    breaks = c(5, 25, 125),
    labels = c("1:5", "1:25", "1:125")
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Serum dilution",
    y = "RBD:ACE2 inhibition (%)"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_titration
auc_df <- df %>%
  arrange(Sample, Dilution_num) %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz(log10(Dilution_num), Inhibition),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
ana_df <- data.frame(
  Sample = c(
    "COVID6","COVID115","COVID80","COVID128","COVID43",
    "COVID104","COVID119","COVID126","COVID41","COVID127"
  ),
  ANA = c(
    137.139781384564,
    60.8424423098156,
    56.7627249641162,
    50.9071601941748,
    49.0228552500828,
    45.1059953627029,
    41.8654079717346,
    39.9757281553398,
    30.5095506238269,
    28.0309466019417
  )
)
auc_df <- df %>%
  arrange(Sample, Dilution_num) %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarise(
    AUC = trapz(log10(Dilution_num), Inhibition),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(ana_df, by = "Sample")
p_corr <- ggplot(auc_df, aes(x = ANA, y = AUC)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3.5,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "navy",
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = TRUE,
    color = "firebrick",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +

  stat_cor(
    method = "spearman",
    label.x.npc = "left",
    label.y.npc = "top",
    size = 5
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "ANA score",
    y = "RBD inhibition (AUC)"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

p_corr
```
