```{r Influenza Analysis}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)

flu_mmc2_raw <- read_excel("/Users/nathanwitman/Downloads/mmc2.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet1", skip = 1)

flu_mmc2 <- flu_mmc2_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Specificity = str_to_title(str_trim(Specificity))
  )

calc_charge <- function(seq) {
  aa_charge <- c(
    K = +1, R = +1, H = +0.1,
    D = -1, E = -1
  )
  seq_vec <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  sum(aa_charge[seq_vec], na.rm = TRUE)
}

flu_charge_df <- flu_mmc2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(CDRH3_AA)) %>%
  mutate(
    Charge_HCDR3 = map_dbl(CDRH3_AA, ~ calc_charge(.x))
  )

flu_charge_df <- flu_charge_df %>%
  mutate(
    Specificity_Group = case_when(
      str_detect(Specificity, regex("Group 1,2", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Cross-group",
      str_detect(Specificity, regex("Group 1|^H1$|^H5$|^H9$", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Group 1",
      str_detect(Specificity, regex("Group 2|^H3$|^H7$", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Group 2",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    Epitope_Location = case_when(
      str_detect(`Binds to`, "Head") ~ "Head",
      str_detect(`Binds to`, "Stem") ~ "Stem",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(Epitope_Location != "Unknown")

flu_charge_boxplot <- ggplot(flu_charge_df, aes(x = Epitope_Location, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Specificity_Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    y = "HCDR3 Charge at pH 7",
    x = "Epitope Location",
    fill = "Specificity Group",
    title = "HCDR3 Charge: Head vs Stem Antibodies by Group"
  )

print(flu_charge_boxplot)

flu_charge_faceted <- ggplot(flu_charge_df, aes(x = Epitope_Location, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Epitope_Location)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ Specificity_Group) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(
    y = "HCDR3 Charge at pH 7",
    x = "Epitope Location",
    title = "HCDR3 Charge by Epitope Location and Specificity Group"
  )

print(flu_charge_faceted)


library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)

flu_mmc2_raw <- read_excel("/mnt/user-data/uploads/mmc2.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet1", skip = 1)

flu_mmc2 <- flu_mmc2_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Specificity = str_to_title(str_trim(Specificity))
  )

calc_charge <- function(seq) {
  aa_charge <- c(
    K = +1, R = +1, H = +0.1,
    D = -1, E = -1
  )
  seq_vec <- strsplit(seq, "")[[1]]
  sum(aa_charge[seq_vec], na.rm = TRUE)
}

flu_charge_df <- flu_mmc2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(CDRH3_AA)) %>%
  mutate(
    Charge_HCDR3 = map_dbl(CDRH3_AA, ~ calc_charge(.x))
  )

flu_charge_df <- flu_charge_df %>%
  mutate(
    Specificity_Group = case_when(
      str_detect(Specificity, regex("Group 1,2", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Cross-group",
      str_detect(Specificity, regex("Group 1|^H1$|^H5$|^H9$", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Group 1",
      str_detect(Specificity, regex("Group 2|^H3$|^H7$", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Group 2",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    Epitope_Location = case_when(
      str_detect(`Binds to`, "Head") ~ "Head",
      str_detect(`Binds to`, "Stem") ~ "Stem",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(Epitope_Location != "Unknown", Specificity_Group != "Other")

flu_overall_wilcox <- wilcox.test(
  Charge_HCDR3 ~ Epitope_Location,
  data = flu_charge_df,
  exact = FALSE
)

flu_head_data <- flu_charge_df %>% filter(Epitope_Location == "Head")
flu_stem_data <- flu_charge_df %>% filter(Epitope_Location == "Stem")

flu_head_wilcox <- if(length(unique(flu_head_data$Specificity_Group)) > 1) {
  pairwise.wilcox.test(
    flu_head_data$Charge_HCDR3,
    flu_head_data$Specificity_Group,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )
} else {
  NULL
}

flu_stem_wilcox <- if(length(unique(flu_stem_data$Specificity_Group)) > 1) {
  pairwise.wilcox.test(
    flu_stem_data$Charge_HCDR3,
    flu_stem_data$Specificity_Group,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )
} else {
  NULL
}

cat("Overall Head vs Stem:\n")
print(flu_overall_wilcox)
cat("\nHead-binding antibodies - Pairwise comparisons by Group:\n")
if(!is.null(flu_head_wilcox)) print(flu_head_wilcox) else cat("Only one group present\n")
cat("\nStem-binding antibodies - Pairwise comparisons by Group:\n")
if(!is.null(flu_stem_wilcox)) print(flu_stem_wilcox) else cat("Only one group present\n")

flu_overall_plot <- ggplot(flu_charge_df, aes(x = Epitope_Location, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Epitope_Location)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(
    y = "HCDR3 Charge at pH 7",
    x = "Epitope Location",
    title = paste0("Overall HCDR3 Charge: Head vs Stem\n(p = ", 
                   format(flu_overall_wilcox$p.value, digits = 3), ")")
  )

print(flu_overall_plot)

flu_stratified_plot <- ggplot(flu_charge_df, aes(x = Specificity_Group, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Specificity_Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Epitope_Location) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(
    y = "HCDR3 Charge at pH 7",
    x = "Specificity Group",
    fill = "Specificity Group",
    title = "HCDR3 Charge by Specificity Group within Epitope Location"
  )
flu_get_pvalues <- function(wilcox_obj) {
  if(is.null(wilcox_obj)) return(NULL)
  as.data.frame(wilcox_obj$p.value) %>%
    rownames_to_column("Comparison") %>%
    pivot_longer(-Comparison, names_to = "Group2", values_to = "p_value") %>%
    filter(!is.na(p_value)) %>%
    mutate(
      Group1 = Comparison,
      Comparison = paste0(Group1, " vs ", Group2)
    )
}

flu_head_pvals <- flu_get_pvalues(flu_head_wilcox)
flu_stem_pvals <- flu_get_pvalues(flu_stem_wilcox)

flu_pval_summary <- bind_rows(
  flu_head_pvals %>% mutate(Epitope_Location = "Head"),
  flu_stem_pvals %>% mutate(Epitope_Location = "Stem")
) %>%
  select(Epitope_Location, Comparison, p_value) %>%
  mutate(
    p_sig = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )

cat("\n\nPairwise Comparisons Summary:\n")
print(flu_pval_summary)

flu_stratified_plot <- ggplot(flu_charge_df, aes(x = Specificity_Group, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Specificity_Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Epitope_Location) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(
    y = "HCDR3 Charge at pH 7",
    x = "Specificity Group",
    fill = "Specificity Group",
    title = "HCDR3 Charge by Specificity Group within Epitope Location"
  )

print(flu_stratified_plot)
print(flu_pval_summary)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)
library(tidyverse)

stats_flu_overall <- flu_charge_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Epitope_Location) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Overall Head vs Stem - Statistics:\n")
print(stats_flu_overall)

pval_overall <- flu_overall_wilcox$p.value

p_star_overall <- case_when(
  pval_overall < 0.001 ~ "***",
  pval_overall < 0.01  ~ "**",
  pval_overall < 0.05  ~ "*",
  TRUE         ~ "ns"
)

cat("\nOverall Head vs Stem Wilcoxon Test:\n")
print(flu_overall_wilcox)
cat("P-value significance:", p_star_overall, "\n")

y_max_overall <- max(flu_charge_df$Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE)
y_bar_overall <- y_max_overall + 0.5
y_text_overall <- y_bar_overall + 0.3

flu_charge_df$Epitope_Location <- recode(
  flu_charge_df$Epitope_Location,
  "Head" = "Head",
  "Stem" = "Stem"
)

flu_overall_raincloud <- ggplot(flu_charge_df, aes(x = Epitope_Location, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Epitope_Location)) +
  
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    .width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
    justification = -0.25,
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 1,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.30,
    size = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = y_bar_overall, yend = y_bar_overall),
               linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = y_bar_overall, yend = y_bar_overall - 0.2),
               linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 2, xend = 2, y = y_bar_overall, yend = y_bar_overall - 0.2),
               linewidth = 0.6) +
  
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = y_text_overall, label = p_star_overall, size = 8) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Head" = "#9B8B7E",
    "Stem" = "#6B8E99"
  )) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge at pH 7"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    
    legend.position = "none"
  )

print(flu_overall_raincloud)

ggsave("/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofPittsburgh/Linux_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/flu_HeadvsStem_raincloud.svg", flu_overall_raincloud, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)
library(tidyverse)

stats_flu_stratified <- flu_charge_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Epitope_Location, Specificity_Group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Stratified by Group within Epitope Location - Statistics:\n")
print(stats_flu_stratified)

flu_head_pvals <- flu_get_pvalues(flu_head_wilcox)
flu_stem_pvals <- flu_get_pvalues(flu_stem_wilcox)

dunn_results <- bind_rows(
  flu_head_pvals %>% mutate(Epitope_Location = "Head"),
  flu_stem_pvals %>% mutate(Epitope_Location = "Stem")
) %>%
  select(Epitope_Location, Comparison, p_value) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      p_value < 0.0001 ~ "****",
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  separate(Comparison, into = c("group1", "group2"), sep = " vs ")

facet_ranges <- flu_charge_df %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Location) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin = min(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    ymax = max(Charge_HCDR3, na.rm = TRUE),
    yrange = ymax - ymin,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    yrange = ifelse(yrange == 0, 1, yrange),
    stat_base = ymax + 0.15 * yrange,
    stat_step = 0.1 * yrange
  )

dunn_plot <- dunn_results %>%
  left_join(facet_ranges, by = "Epitope_Location") %>%
  group_by(Epitope_Location) %>%
  mutate(
    group_order = match(group1, c("Cross-group", "Group 1", "Group 2")),
    group_order2 = match(group2, c("Cross-group", "Group 1", "Group 2"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_value, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    y.position = stat_base + (row_number() - 1) * stat_step
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

flu_stratified_raincloud <- ggplot(flu_charge_df, aes(x = Specificity_Group, y = Charge_HCDR3, fill = Specificity_Group)) +
  
  stat_halfeye(
    adjust = 0.6,
    width = 0.7,
    .width = c(0.5, 0.8, 0.95),
    justification = -0.25,
    point_colour = NA,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.15,
    alpha = 1,
    outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.12,
    alpha = 0.30,
    size = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  geom_segment(
    data = dunn_plot %>% filter(p_label != "ns"),
    aes(x = group_order, xend = group_order2, y = y.position, yend = y.position),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = dunn_plot %>% filter(p_label != "ns"),
    aes(x = group_order, xend = group_order,
        y = y.position,
        yend = y.position - 0.04 * yrange),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = dunn_plot %>% filter(p_label != "ns"),
    aes(x = group_order2, xend = group_order2,
        y = y.position,
        yend = y.position - 0.04 * yrange),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    data = dunn_plot %>% filter(p_label != "ns"),
    aes(
      x = (group_order + group_order2) / 2,
      y = y.position + 0.05 * yrange,
      label = p_label
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 5,
    family = "Arial",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Group 1" = "#7A8FA3",
    "Group 2" = "#A0826D",
    "Cross-group" = "#8B9E9E"
  )) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Epitope_Location) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16, base_family = "Arial") +
  labs(
    x = "Specificity Group",
    y = "HCDR3 Charge at pH 7",
    title = "HCDR3 Charge by Specificity Group within Epitope Location"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 13),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    
    legend.position = "none",
    
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  )

print(flu_stratified_raincloud)

ggsave("/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofPittsburgh/Linux_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/flu_StratifiedbyGroup_raincloud.png", flu_stratified_raincloud, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("/Users/nathanwitman/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofPittsburgh/Linux_Data/Nathan_sc_data/Polyreactivity_Analysis_COVID/Images/flu_StratifiedbyGroup_raincloud.svg", flu_stratified_raincloud, width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")

  group_by(Epitope_Location, Specificity_Group) %>%

cat("Sample sizes by Group and Epitope Location:\n")

library(bio3d)
library(tidyverse)

pdb_ids <- tibble(
  pdb_id = c("2YP2", "1HGD", "4WE8", "7X6L", "9BDF", 
             "4K62", "4K67", "4MHI", "5E34"),
  group = c("H3", "H3", "H3", "H3", "H3", 
            "H5", "H5", "H5", "H5"),
  strain = c("A/Finland/486/2004", "A/Hong Kong/1/68", 
             "A/Victoria/361/2011", "A/HongKong/01/1968", 
             "A/Darwin/6/2021",
             "A/Indonesia/5/2005", "A/Indonesia/5/2005",
             "A/Goose/Guangdong/1/96", "A/chicken/Vietnam/NCVD-093/2008")
)

download_and_parse_pdbs <- function(pdb_ids) {
  results <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pdb_ids))) {
    pdb_id <- pdb_ids$pdb_id[i]
    group <- pdb_ids$group[i]
    strain <- pdb_ids$strain[i]
    
    cat("Downloading", pdb_id, "...\n")
    
    tryCatch({
      pdb <- read.pdb(pdb_id)
      
      results[[i]] <- list(
        pdb_id = pdb_id,
        group = group,
        strain = strain,
        pdb = pdb
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("Error downloading", pdb_id, ":", e$message, "\n")
    })
  }
  
  return(results)
}

pdb_data <- download_and_parse_pdbs(pdb_ids)


library(bio3d)
library(tidyverse)

calc_charge <- function(seq, pH = 7.4) {
  aa <- strsplit(toupper(seq), "")[[1]]
  
  aa_charge <- function(residue, pH = 7.4) {
    pos_pka <- c(K = 10.5, R = 12.5, H = 6.0)
    neg_pka <- c(D = 3.9, E = 4.1, C = 8.3, Y = 10.1)
    
    charge <- 0
    
    if (residue %in% names(pos_pka)) {
      charge <- charge + 1 / (1 + 10^(pH - pos_pka[residue]))
    }
    
    if (residue %in% names(neg_pka)) {
      charge <- charge - 1 / (1 + 10^(neg_pka[residue] - pH))
    }
    
    charge
  }
  
  n_term_charge <- 1 / (1 + 10^(pH - 9.69))
  c_term_charge <- -1 / (1 + 10^(2.34 - pH))
  
  n_term_charge + c_term_charge + sum(vapply(aa, aa_charge, numeric(1), pH = pH))
}

extract_stem_sequence <- function(pdb, pdb_id) {
  tryCatch({
    chains <- unique(pdb$atom$chain)
    
    sequences <- list()
    for (chain in chains) {
      chain_atoms <- pdb$atom[pdb$atom$chain == chain, ]
      resid <- unique(chain_atoms$resid)
      seq <- paste(resid, collapse = "")
      sequences[[chain]] <- seq
    }
    
    return(sequences)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error extracting sequence from", pdb_id, ":", e$message, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  })
}

stem_analysis <- pdb_ids %>%
  mutate(
    sequences = map(seq_along(pdb_data), ~extract_stem_sequence(
      pdb_data[[.x]]$pdb, 
      pdb_ids$pdb_id[.x]
    )),
    sequence = map_chr(sequences, ~.x[[1]])
  ) %>%
  select(pdb_id, group, strain, sequence) %>%
  mutate(
    seq_length = nchar(sequence),
    charge_ph74 = map_dbl(sequence, ~calc_charge(.x, pH = 7.4)),
    charge_ph50 = map_dbl(sequence, ~calc_charge(.x, pH = 5.0)),
    charge_ph80 = map_dbl(sequence, ~calc_charge(.x, pH = 8.0))
  )

comparison_summary <- stem_analysis %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    mean_charge_ph74 = mean(charge_ph74),
    sd_charge_ph74 = sd(charge_ph74),
    mean_charge_ph50 = mean(charge_ph50),
    mean_charge_ph80 = mean(charge_ph80),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(stem_analysis)
print(comparison_summary)


```
